ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source:
Conditions are used to determine what block is rendered. Conditions are evaluated top to bottom - the first to evaluate to true is the condition that will be used. If the last condition is left blank and no others were true, it will be used.

The expression receives the monster parameter, which can be used to access properties of the monster being rendered, and the plugin parameter, which is a reference to the Fantasy Statblocks plugin and can be used for accessing app and plugin settings.

All conditions must return a true/false value. For example: return monster.ac > 1
ast.target:
条件用于确定渲染哪个区块。条件按从上到下进行评估—— true 的第一个条件将被使用。如果最后一个条件留空且没有其他条件为真，则会使用它。

该表达式接收 monster 参数，可用于访问正在渲染的怪物属性，以及 plugin 参数，它是 Fantasy Statblocks 插件的引用，可用于访问应用和插件设置。

所有条件都必须返回 true/false 值。例如： return monster.ac > 1

ast.name: desc
ast.source: +10 to hit
ast.target: +10 命中

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The aboleth can breathe air and water.
ast.target: 阿波莱斯可以呼吸空气和水。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While underwater, the aboleth is surrounded by transformative mucus. A creature that touches the aboleth or that hits it with a melee attack while within 5 ft. of it must make a DC 14 Constitution saving throw. On a failure, the creature is diseased for 1d4 hours. The diseased creature can breathe only underwater.
ast.target: 在水下时，阿波莱斯被变形黏液包围。触碰阿波莱斯或在其 5 英尺内以近战攻击命中它的生物必须进行 DC 14 体质豁免检定。若失败，该生物会染病 1d4 小时。染病生物只能在水下呼吸。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If a creature communicates telepathically with the aboleth, the aboleth learns the creature's greatest desires if the aboleth can see the creature.
ast.target: 如果有生物与阿波莱斯进行心灵感应交流，且阿波莱斯能看见该生物，阿波莱斯就会知晓该生物最强烈的欲望。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The aboleth makes three tentacle attacks.
ast.target: 阿波莱斯进行三次触手攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 10 ft. one target. Hit: 15 (3d6 + 5) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+9 命中，触及 10 英尺，单一目标。命中：15（3d6 + 5）钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
The aboleth targets one creature it can see within 30 ft. of it. The target must succeed on a DC 14 Wisdom saving throw or be magically charmed by the aboleth until the aboleth dies or until it is on a different plane of existence from the target. The charmed target is under the aboleth's control and can't take reactions, and the aboleth and the target can communicate telepathically with each other over any distance.
Whenever the charmed target takes damage, the target can repeat the saving throw. On a success, the effect ends. No more than once every 24 hours, the target can also repeat the saving throw when it is at least 1 mile away from the aboleth.
ast.target:
阿波莱斯以其可见的 30 英尺内的一名生物为目标。目标必须成功通过 DC 14 感知豁免检定，否则将被阿波莱斯魔法魅惑，直到阿波莱斯死亡或它与目标不在同一位面。被魅惑的目标受阿波莱斯控制，且不能进行反应，并且阿波莱斯与目标可以在任意距离进行心灵感应交流。
每当被魅惑的目标受到伤害时，目标可以重复该豁免检定。成功则效果结束。每 24 小时最多一次，目标在距离阿波莱斯至少 1 英里时也可以重复该豁免检定。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The aboleth makes a Wisdom (Perception) check.
ast.target: 阿波莱斯进行一次感知（察觉）检定。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The aboleth makes one tail attack.
ast.target: 阿波莱斯进行一次尾击攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: One creature charmed by the aboleth takes 10 (3d6) psychic damage, and the aboleth regains hit points equal to the damage the creature takes.
ast.target: 一个被阿波莱斯魅惑的生物受到 10（3d6）心灵伤害，阿波莱斯恢复等同于该生物所受伤害的生命值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +2 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 2 (1d4) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+2 命中，触及 5 英尺，单一目标。命中：2（1d4）钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The dragon can breathe air and water.
ast.target: 该龙可以呼吸空气和水。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the dragon fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.
ast.target: 若该龙豁免失败，它可以选择改为成功。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The dragon can use its Frightful Presence. It then makes three attacks: one with its bite and two with its claws.
ast.target: 该龙可以使用其恐怖威仪。随后进行三次攻击：一次啃咬和两次爪击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +11 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 17 (2d10 + 6) piercing damage plus 4 (1d8) acid damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+11 命中，触及 10 英尺，单一目标。命中：17（2d10 + 6）穿刺伤害外加 4（1d8）酸蚀伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +11 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 13 (2d6 + 6) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+11 命中，触及 5 英尺，单一目标。命中：13（2d6 + 6）挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +11 to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. Hit: 15 (2d8 + 6) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+11 命中，触及 15 英尺，单一目标。命中：15（2d8 + 6）钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Each creature of the dragon's choice that is within 120 feet of the dragon and aware of it must succeed on a DC 16 Wisdom saving throw or become frightened for 1 minute. A creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. If a creature's saving throw is successful or the effect ends for it, the creature is immune to the dragon's Frightful Presence for the next 24 hours.
ast.target: 龙选择的每个在其 120 英尺内且知晓它存在的生物必须成功通过 DC 16 感知豁免检定，否则会恐慌 1 分钟。生物可在其每回合结束时重复该豁免检定，成功则结束其自身所受效果。若生物的豁免成功或效果对其结束，则该生物在接下来的 24 小时内免疫该龙的恐怖威仪。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The dragon exhales acid in a 60-foot line that is 5 feet wide. Each creature in that line must make a DC 18 Dexterity saving throw, taking 54 (12d8) acid damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
ast.target: 该龙在一条 60 英尺长、5 英尺宽的直线中吐出酸液。该直线内的每个生物必须进行 DC 18 敏捷豁免检定，失败则受到 54（12d8）酸蚀伤害，成功则伤害减半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The dragon makes a Wisdom (Perception) check.
ast.target: 该龙进行一次感知（察觉）检定。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The dragon makes a tail attack.
ast.target: 该龙进行一次尾击攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The dragon beats its wings. Each creature within 10 ft. of the dragon must succeed on a DC 19 Dexterity saving throw or take 13 (2d6 + 6) bludgeoning damage and be knocked prone. The dragon can then fly up to half its flying speed.
ast.target: 该龙拍击双翼。龙 10 英尺内的每个生物必须成功通过 DC 19 敏捷豁免检定，否则受到 13（2d6 + 6）钝击伤害并被击倒。该龙随后可以飞行至其飞行速度的一半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the dracolich fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.
ast.target: 若龙巫妖豁免失败，它可以选择改为成功。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The dracolich has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.
ast.target: 龙巫妖对抗法术和其他魔法效果的豁免检定具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The dracolich can use its Frightful Presence. It then makes three attacks: one with its bite and two with its claws.
ast.target: 龙巫妖可以使用其恐怖威仪。随后进行三次攻击：一次啃咬和两次爪击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +12 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 18 (2d10 + 7) piercing damage plus 5 (1d10) lightning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+12 命中，触及 10 英尺，单一目标。命中：18（2d10 + 7）穿刺伤害外加 5（1d10）闪电伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +12 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (2d6 + 7) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+12 命中，触及 5 英尺，单一目标。命中：14（2d6 + 7）挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +12 to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. Hit: 16 (2d8 + 7) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+12 命中，触及 15 英尺，单一目标。命中：16（2d8 + 7）钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Each creature of the dracolich's choice that is within 120 feet of the dracolich and aware of it must succeed on a DC 18 Wisdom saving throw or become frightened for 1 minute. A creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. If a creature's saving throw is successful or the effect ends for it, the creature is immune to the dracolich's Frightful Presence for the next 24 hours.
ast.target: 龙巫妖选择的、在其120英尺内且察觉到它的每个生物必须通过 DC 18 感知豁免检定，否则将恐慌1分钟。生物可以在其每个回合结束时重复该豁免检定，成功则该效果在其身上结束。若生物的豁免检定成功或该效果对其结束，则该生物在接下来24小时内免疫龙巫妖的恐怖威仪。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The dracolich exhales lightning in a 90-foot line that is 5 feet wide. Each creature in that line must make a DC 20 Dexterity saving throw, taking 66 (12d10) lightning damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
ast.target: 龙巫妖吐出一道90英尺长、宽5英尺的闪电线。该线内每个生物必须进行 DC 20 敏捷豁免检定，失败则受到66（12d10）闪电伤害，成功则伤害减半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The dracolich makes a Wisdom (Perception) check.
ast.target: 龙巫妖进行一次感知（察觉）检定。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The dracolich makes a tail attack.
ast.target: 龙巫妖进行一次尾击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The dracolich beats its tattered wings. Each creature within 10 ft. of the dracolich must succeed on a DC 21 Dexterity saving throw or take 14 (2d6 + 7) bludgeoning damage and be knocked prone. After beating its wings this way, the dracolich can fly up to half its flying speed.
ast.target: 龙巫妖拍动其破败的翅膀。龙巫妖10 ft.内的每个生物必须通过 DC 21 敏捷豁免检定，否则受到14（2d6 + 7）钝击伤害并被击倒。以这种方式拍翼后，龙巫妖可以飞行至其飞行速度的一半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Each creature of the dragon's choice that is within 120 ft. of the dragon and aware of it must succeed on a DC 17 Wisdom saving throw or become frightened for 1 minute. A creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. If a creature's saving throw is successful or the effect ends for it, the creature is immune to the dragon's Frightful Presence for the next 24 hours.

ast.source:
The dragon uses one of the following breath weapons.
Fire Breath. The dragon exhales fire in an 60-foot line that is 5 feet wide. Each creature in that line must make a DC 18 Dexterity saving throw, taking 45 (13d6) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
Sleep Breath. The dragon exhales sleep gas in a 60-foot cone. Each creature in that area must succeed on a DC 18 Constitution saving throw or fall unconscious for 10 minutes. This effect ends for a creature if the creature takes damage or someone uses an action to wake it.
ast.target:
巨龙使用以下一种吐息武器。
火焰吐息。巨龙吐出一道60英尺长、宽5英尺的火焰线。该线内每个生物必须进行 DC 18 敏捷豁免检定，失败则受到45（13d6）火焰伤害，成功则伤害减半。
睡眠吐息。巨龙在一个60英尺锥形范围内喷出睡眠气体。该区域内每个生物必须通过 DC 18 体质豁免检定，否则将昏迷10分钟。若该生物受到伤害或有人使用动作将其唤醒，该效果即对其结束。

ast.source:
The dragon uses one of the following breath weapons.
Lightning Breath. The dragon exhales lightning in a 90-foot line that is 5 feet wide. Each creature in that line must make a DC 19 Dexterity saving throw, taking 66 (12d10) lightning damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
Repulsion Breath. The dragon exhales repulsion energy in a 30-foot cone. Each creature in that area must succeed on a DC 19 Strength saving throw. On a failed save, the creature is pushed 60 feet away from the dragon.
ast.target:
巨龙使用以下一种吐息武器。
闪电吐息。巨龙吐出一道90英尺长、宽5英尺的闪电线。该线内每个生物必须进行 DC 19 敏捷豁免检定，失败则受到66（12d10）闪电伤害，成功则伤害减半。
排斥吐息。巨龙在一个30英尺锥形范围内吐出排斥能量。该区域内每个生物必须通过 DC 19 力量豁免检定。失败则该生物被推离巨龙60英尺。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +11 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 17 (2d10 + 6) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中 +11，触及 10 ft.，一个目标。命中：17（2d10 + 6）穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
The dragon uses one of the following breath weapons.
Acid Breath. The dragon exhales acid in an 60-foot line that is 5 feet wide. Each creature in that line must make a DC 18 Dexterity saving throw, taking 54 (12d8) acid damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
Slowing Breath. The dragon exhales gas in a 60-foot cone. Each creature in that area must succeed on a DC 18 Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, the creature can't use reactions, its speed is halved, and it can't make more than one attack on its turn. In addition, the creature can use either an action or a bonus action on its turn, but not both. These effects last for 1 minute. The creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself with a successful save.
ast.target:
巨龙使用以下一种吐息武器。
酸液吐息。巨龙吐出一道60英尺长、宽5英尺的酸液线。该线内每个生物必须进行 DC 18 敏捷豁免检定，失败则受到54（12d8）酸性伤害，成功则伤害减半。
迟缓吐息。巨龙在一个60英尺锥形范围内喷出气体。该区域内每个生物必须通过 DC 18 体质豁免检定。失败则该生物无法使用反应动作，速度减半，且在其回合中不能进行超过一次攻击。此外，该生物在其回合中只能使用动作或额外动作其一，不能同时使用。这些效果持续1分钟。该生物可以在其每个回合结束时重复该豁免检定，成功则该效果在其身上结束。

Fire Breath. The dragon exhales fire in an 90-foot line that is 10 feet wide. Each creature in that line must make a DC 21 Dexterity saving throw, taking 56 (16d6) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
Sleep Breath. The dragon exhales sleep gas in a 90-foot cone. Each creature in that area must succeed on a DC 21 Constitution saving throw or fall unconscious for 10 minutes. This effect ends for a creature if the creature takes damage or someone uses an action to wake it.
ast.target:
巨龙使用以下吐息武器之一：
火焰吐息。巨龙吐出火焰，形成一条长90英尺、宽10英尺的直线。该直线上的每个生物必须进行DC 21的敏捷豁免，豁免失败则受到56（16d6）点火焰伤害，成功则伤害减半。
睡眠吐息。巨龙吐出睡眠气体，形成一个90英尺锥形范围。该区域内每个生物必须进行DC 21的体质豁免，否则昏迷10分钟。若该生物受到伤害或有人用一个动作唤醒它，则效果结束。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
The dragon magically polymorphs into a humanoid or beast that has a challenge rating no higher than its own, or back into its true form. It reverts to its true form if it dies. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying is absorbed or borne by the new form (the dragon's choice).
In a new form, the dragon retains its alignment, hit points, Hit Dice, ability to speak, proficiencies, Legendary Resistance, lair actions, and Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma scores, as well as this action. Its statistics and capabilities are otherwise replaced by those of the new form, except any class features or legendary actions of that form.
ast.target:
巨龙以魔法变形为挑战等级不高于自身的人型生物或野兽，或变回其真身。若其死亡则会恢复真身。它穿戴或携带的任何装备会被吸收或由新形态携带（由巨龙选择）。
在新形态下，巨龙保留其阵营、生命值、生命骰、说话能力、熟练项、传奇抗性、巢穴动作，以及智力、感知和魅力属性值，以及此动作。除此之外，它的属性与能力均由新形态取代，唯独该形态的任何职业特性或传奇动作除外。

On a failed save, the creature can't use reactions, its speed is halved, and it can't make more than one attack on its turn. In addition, the creature can use either an action or a bonus action on its turn, but not both. These effects last for 1 minute. The creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself with a successful save.

If the target is a Large or smaller creature, it is grappled (escape DC 13). Until this grapple ends, the ankheg can bite only the grappled creature and has advantage on attack rolls to do so.

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The ankheg spits acid in a line that is 30 ft. long and 5 ft. wide, provided that it has no creature grappled. Each creature in that line must make a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw, taking 10 (3d6) acid damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
ast.target: 安克赫格吐出一条长30 ft.、宽5 ft.的酸液线，前提是它没有擒抱任何生物。该线内每个生物必须进行DC 13敏捷豁免，失败则受到10（3d6）点酸性伤害，成功则伤害减半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The ape makes two fist attacks.
ast.target: 猿进行两次拳击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+5命中，触及5 ft.，单一目标。命中：6（1d6 + 3）点钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Ranged Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, range 25/50 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 远程武器攻击：+5命中，射程25/50 ft.，单一目标。命中：6（1d6 + 3）点钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The archmage has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.
ast.target: 大法师对抗法术及其他魔法效应的豁免检定具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战或远程武器攻击：+6命中，触及5 ft.或射程20/60 ft.，单一目标。命中：4（1d4 + 2）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: During its first turn, the assassin has advantage on attack rolls against any creature that hasn't taken a turn. Any hit the assassin scores against a surprised creature is a critical hit.
ast.target: 在其第一次回合中，刺客对任何尚未行动的生物的攻击掷骰具有优势。刺客对措手不及的生物造成的任何命中都是重击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the assassin is subjected to an effect that allows it to make a Dexterity saving throw to take only half damage, the assassin instead takes no damage if it succeeds on the saving throw, and only half damage if it fails.
ast.target: 若刺客受到一种效果影响，使其可以进行敏捷豁免以仅承受一半伤害，则刺客在豁免成功时不受伤害，失败时仅受一半伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The assassin deals an extra 13 (4d6) damage when it hits a target with a weapon attack and has advantage on the attack roll, or when the target is within 5 ft. of an ally of the assassin that isn't incapacitated and the assassin doesn't have disadvantage on the attack roll.
ast.target: 刺客在以武器攻击命中目标且该次攻击掷骰具有优势时，或当目标在刺客未失能的盟友5 ft.内且刺客该次攻击掷骰没有劣势时，额外造成13（4d6）点伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The assassin makes two shortsword attacks.
ast.target: 刺客进行两次短剑攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) piercing damage, and the target must make a DC 15 Constitution saving throw, taking 24 (7d6) poison damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+6命中，触及5 ft.，单一目标。命中：6（1d6 + 3）点穿刺伤害，且目标必须进行DC 15体质豁免，失败则受到24（7d6）点毒素伤害，成功则伤害减半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Ranged Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, range 80/320 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) piercing damage, and the target must make a DC 15 Constitution saving throw, taking 24 (7d6) poison damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
ast.target: 远程武器攻击：+6命中，射程80/320 ft.，单一目标。命中：7（1d8 + 3）点穿刺伤害，且目标必须进行DC 15体质豁免，失败则受到24（7d6）点毒素伤害，成功则伤害减半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +1 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 1 (1d4 — 1) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+1命中，触及5 ft.，单一目标。命中：1（1d4 — 1）点挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (3d6 + 4) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+6命中，触及10 ft.，单一目标。命中：14（3d6 + 4）点钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d8 + 2) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+4命中，触及5 ft.，单一目标。命中：6（1d8 + 2）点挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A creature that touches the azer or hits it with a melee attack while within 5 ft. of it takes 5 (1d10) fire damage.
ast.target: 在其5 ft.内触碰阿泽尔或以近战攻击命中它的生物会受到5（1d10）点火焰伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the azer hits with a metal melee weapon, it deals an extra 3 (1d6) fire damage (included in the attack).
ast.target: 阿泽尔以金属近战武器命中时，额外造成3（1d6）点火焰伤害（已包含在攻击中）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The azer sheds bright light in a 10-foot radius and dim light for an additional 10 ft..
ast.target: 阿泽尔在10英尺半径内发出明亮光照，并在额外10 ft..范围内提供微光。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) bludgeoning damage, or 8 (1d10 + 3) bludgeoning damage if used with two hands to make a melee attack, plus 3 (1d6) fire damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+5命中，触及5 ft.，单一目标。命中：7（1d8 + 3）点钝击伤害，或若以双手进行近战攻击则为8（1d10 + 3）点钝击伤害，外加3（1d6）点火焰伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The baboon has advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the baboon's allies is within 5 ft. of the creature and the ally isn't incapacitated.
ast.target: 若狒狒至少有一名盟友在目标5 ft.内且该盟友未失能，则狒狒对该生物的攻击掷骰具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +1 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 1 (1d4 — 1) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+1命中，触及5 ft.，单一目标。命中：1（1d4 — 1）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The badger has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on smell.
ast.target: 獾在依赖嗅觉的感知（察觉）检定上具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +2 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 1 piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+2命中，触及5 ft.，单一目标。命中：1点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the balor dies, it explodes, and each creature within 30 feet of it must make a DC 20 Dexterity saving throw, taking 70 (20d6) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. The explosion ignites flammable objects in that area that aren't being worn or carried, and it destroys the balor's weapons.
ast.target: 巴洛尔死亡时会爆炸，其30英尺内的每个生物必须进行DC 20敏捷豁免，失败则受到70（20d6）点火焰伤害，成功则伤害减半。爆炸会点燃该区域内未被穿戴或携带的易燃物，并摧毁巴洛尔的武器。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: At the start of each of the balor's turns, each creature within 5 feet of it takes 10 (3d6) fire damage, and flammable objects in the aura that aren't being worn or carried ignite. A creature that touches the balor or hits it with a melee attack while within 5 feet of it takes 10 (3d6) fire damage.
ast.target: 在巴洛尔每个回合开始时，其5英尺内的每个生物受到10（3d6）点火焰伤害，且灵光中未被穿戴或携带的易燃物会被点燃。在其5英尺内触碰巴洛尔或以近战攻击命中它的生物会受到10（3d6）点火焰伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The balor has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.
ast.target: 巴洛尔对抗法术及其他魔法效应的豁免检定具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The balor's weapon attacks are magical.
ast.target: 巴洛尔的武器攻击为魔法。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The balor makes two attacks: one with its longsword and one with its whip.
ast.target: 巴洛尔进行两次攻击：一次用长剑，一次用长鞭。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +14 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 21 (3d8 + 8) slashing damage plus 13 (3d8) lightning damage. If the balor scores a critical hit, it rolls damage dice three times, instead of twice.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+14命中，触及10 ft.，单一目标。命中：21（3d8 + 8）点挥砍伤害外加13（3d8）点闪电伤害。若巴洛尔造成重击，则伤害骰掷三次而非两次。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +14 to hit, reach 30 ft., one target. Hit: 15 (2d6 + 8) slashing damage plus 10 (3d6) fire damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 20 Strength saving throw or be pulled up to 25 feet toward the balor.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+14命中，触及30 ft.，单一目标。命中：15（2d6 + 8）点挥砍伤害外加10（3d6）点火焰伤害，且目标必须成功通过DC 20力量豁免，否则被拉向巴洛尔，最多25英尺。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The balor magically teleports, along with any equipment it is wearing or carrying, up to 120 feet to an unoccupied space it can see.
ast.target: 巴洛尔魔法传送，连同其所穿戴或携带的任何装备，最多传送120英尺到其能看见的一个空置空间。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d6 + 1) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+3命中，触及5 ft.，单一目标。命中：4（1d6 + 1）点挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Ranged Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, range 80 ft./320 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d8 + 1) piercing damage.
ast.target: 远程武器攻击：+3命中，射程80 ft./320 ft.，单一目标。命中：5（1d8 + 1）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The captain makes three melee attacks: two with its scimitar and one with its dagger. Or the captain makes two ranged attacks with its daggers.
ast.target: 船长进行三次近战攻击：两次用弯刀，一次用匕首。或船长以匕首进行两次远程攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+5命中，触及5 ft.，单一目标。命中：6（1d6 + 3）点挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d4 + 3) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战或远程武器攻击：+5命中，触及5 ft.或射程20/60 ft.，单一目标。命中：5（1d4 + 3）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The captain adds 2 to its AC against one melee attack that would hit it. To do so, the captain must see the attacker and be wielding a melee weapon.
ast.target: 船长对一次本会命中它的近战攻击的AC增加2。为此，船长必须能看见攻击者并正持有近战武器。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: At the start of each of its turns, the barbed devil deals 5 (1d10) piercing damage to any creature grappling it.
ast.target: 在其每个回合开始时，倒钩魔对任何正在擒抱它的生物造成5（1d10）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Magical darkness doesn't impede the devil's darkvision.
ast.target: 魔法黑暗不会阻碍该魔鬼的黑暗视觉。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The devil has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.
ast.target: 该魔鬼对抗法术及其他魔法效应的豁免检定具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The devil makes three melee attacks: one with its tail and two with its claws. Alternatively, it can use Hurl Flame twice.
ast.target: 该魔鬼进行三次近战攻击：一次用尾刺，两次用爪。或者，它可以使用两次投掷火焰。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft ., one target. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+6命中，触及5 ft .，单一目标。命中：6（1d6 + 3）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+6命中，触及5 ft.，单一目标。命中：10（2d6 + 3）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Ranged Spell Attack: +5 to hit, range 150 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (3d6) fire damage. If the target is a flammable object that isn't being worn or carried, it also catches fire.
ast.target: 远程法术攻击：+5命中，射程150 ft.，单一目标。命中：10（3d6）点火焰伤害。若目标为未被穿戴或携带的易燃物体，其也会着火。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) poison damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+5命中，触及5 ft.，单一目标。命中：10（2d6 + 3）点穿刺伤害外加7（2d6）点毒素伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The bat can't use its blindsight while deafened.
ast.target: 蝙蝠在失聪时无法使用盲视。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The bat has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on hearing.
ast.target: 蝙蝠在依赖听觉的感知（察觉）检定上具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +0 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 1 piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+0命中，触及5 ft.，单一生物。命中：1点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The devil can't be frightened while it can see an allied creature within 30 feet of it.
ast.target: 当该魔鬼能看见其30英尺内的盟友时，它不会陷入恐慌。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The devil makes two attacks: one with its beard and one with its glaive.
ast.target: 该魔鬼进行两次攻击：一次用胡须，一次用长柄刀。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 6 (1d8 + 2) piercing damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 12 Constitution saving throw or be poisoned for 1 minute. While poisoned in this way, the target can't regain hit points. The target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+5命中，触及5 ft.，单一生物。命中：6（1d8 + 2）点穿刺伤害，且目标必须成功通过DC 12体质豁免，否则中毒1分钟。以此方式中毒时，目标无法恢复生命值。目标可在其每回合结束时重复该豁免，成功则结束该效果。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d10 + 3) slashing damage. If the target is a creature other than an undead or a construct, it must succeed on a DC 12 Constitution saving throw or lose 5 (1d10) hit points at the start of each of its turns due to an infernal wound. Each time the devil hits the wounded target with this attack, the damage dealt by the wound increases by 5 (1d10). Any creature can take an action to stanch the wound with a successful DC 12 Wisdom (Medicine) check. The wound also closes if the target receives magical healing.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+5命中，触及10 ft.，单一目标。命中：8（1d10 + 3）点挥砍伤害。若目标为不死生物或构装体之外的生物，则必须成功通过DC 12体质豁免，否则因地狱创伤在其每个回合开始时失去5（1d10）点生命值。每当该魔鬼以此攻击命中受伤目标时，创伤造成的伤害增加5（1d10）。任何生物都可用一个动作通过DC 12感知（医药）检定来止血。若目标接受魔法治疗，创伤也会闭合。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The behir makes two attacks: one with its bite and one to constrict.
ast.target: 贝希尔进行两次攻击：一次用啃咬，一次用缠绕。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 22 (3d10 + 6) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+10命中，触及10 ft.，单一目标。命中：22（3d10 + 6）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 5 ft., one Large or smaller creature. Hit: 17 (2d10 + 6) bludgeoning damage plus 17 (2d10 + 6) slashing damage. The target is grappled (escape DC 16) if the behir isn't already constricting a creature, and the target is restrained until this grapple ends.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+10命中，触及5 ft.，单一大型或更小的生物。命中：17（2d10 + 6）点钝击伤害外加17（2d10 + 6）点挥砍伤害。若贝希尔尚未缠绕某个生物，则目标被擒抱（逃脱DC 16），并在擒抱结束前处于被束缚状态。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The behir exhales a line of lightning that is 20 ft. long and 5 ft. wide. Each creature in that line must make a DC 16 Dexterity saving throw, taking 66 (12d10) lightning damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
ast.target: 贝希尔吐出一条长20 ft.、宽5 ft.的闪电线。该线内每个生物必须进行DC 16敏捷豁免，失败则受到66（12d10）点闪电伤害，成功则伤害减半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: At the start of its turn, the berserker can gain advantage on all melee weapon attack rolls during that turn, but attack rolls against it have advantage until the start of its next turn.
ast.target: 在其回合开始时，狂战士可以获得该回合所有近战武器攻击掷骰的优势，但对其的攻击掷骰直到其下个回合开始前具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (1d12 + 3) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+5命中，触及5 ft.，单一目标。命中：9（1d12 + 3）点挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The bear has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on smell.
ast.target: 熊在依赖嗅觉的感知（察觉）检定上具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The bear makes two attacks: one with its bite and one with its claws.
ast.target: 熊进行两次攻击：一次用啃咬，一次用爪击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+3命中，触及5 ft.，单一目标。命中：5（1d6 + 2）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (2d4 + 2) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+3命中，触及5 ft.，单一目标。命中：7（2d4 + 2）点挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d10 + 2) piercing damage plus 2 (1d4) acid damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+4命中，触及5 ft.，单一目标。命中：7（1d10 + 2）点穿刺伤害外加2（1d4）点酸性伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The dragon exhales acid in a 15-foot line that is 5 feet wide. Each creature in that line must make a DC 11 Dexterity saving throw, taking 22 (Sd8) acid damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
ast.target: 龙吐出一条长15英尺、宽5英尺的酸液线。该线内每个生物必须进行DC 11敏捷豁免，失败则受到22（Sd8）点酸性伤害，成功则伤害减半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The pudding can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing.
ast.target: 该布丁可以在窄至1英寸的空间中通过而无需挤压。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A creature that touches the pudding or hits it with a melee attack while within 5 feet of it takes 4 (1d8) acid damage. Any nonmagical weapon made of metal or wood that hits the pudding corrodes. After dealing damage, the weapon takes a permanent and cumulative -1 penalty to damage rolls. If its penalty drops to -5, the weapon is destroyed. Nonmagical ammunition made of metal or wood that hits the pudding is destroyed after dealing damage. The pudding can eat through 2-inch-thick, nonmagical wood or metal in 1 round.
ast.target: 在其5英尺内触碰布丁或以近战攻击命中它的生物会受到4（1d8）点酸性伤害。任何由金属或木材制成的非魔法武器命中布丁都会被腐蚀。造成伤害后，该武器对伤害掷骰获得永久且累积的-1罚值。若其罚值降至-5，该武器被摧毁。由金属或木材制成的非魔法弹药命中布丁后在造成伤害后被摧毁。布丁可在1轮内腐蚀穿透2英寸厚的非魔法木材或金属。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The pudding can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.
ast.target: 该软泥可以攀爬困难表面，包括倒挂在天花板上，而无需进行属性检定。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) bludgeoning damage plus 18 (4d8) acid damage. In addition, nonmagical armor worn by the target is partly dissolved and takes a permanent and cumulative -1 penalty to the AC it offers. The armor is destroyed if the penalty reduces its AC to 10.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+5命中，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：6（1d6 + 3）钝击伤害，另加18（4d8）酸蚀伤害。此外，目标所穿的非魔法护甲被部分溶解，对其提供的AC造成永久且可累计的-1减值。若该减值使其AC降至10，该护甲被摧毁。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a pudding that is Medium or larger is subjected to lightning or slashing damage, it splits into two new puddings if it has at least 10 hit points. Each new pudding has hit points equal to half the original pudding's, rounded down. New puddings are one size smaller than the original pudding.
ast.target: 当中型或更大的软泥受到闪电或挥砍伤害时，若其至少有10点生命值，则分裂成两只新的软泥。每只新的软泥的生命值等于原软泥的一半，向下取整。新软泥的体型比原软泥小一号。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The dog has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on hearing or smell.
ast.target: 这只狗在依赖听觉或嗅觉的感知（察觉）检定上具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d6 + 1) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+3命中，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：4（1d6 + 1）穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The dog magically teleports, along with any equipment it is wearing or carrying, up to 40 ft. to an unoccupied space it can see. Before or after teleporting, the dog can make one bite attack.
ast.target: 这只狗会魔法传送，连同其穿戴或携带的任何装备，最多40英尺到它能看见的未被占据空间。在传送前或后，狗可以进行一次啃咬攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The hawk has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.
ast.target: 这只鹰在依赖视觉的感知（察觉）检定上具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The hawk has advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the hawk's allies is within 5 ft. of the creature and the ally isn't incapacitated.
ast.target: 若至少有一名鹰的盟友在该生物5英尺内且该盟友未失能，则这只鹰对该生物的攻击检定具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+4命中，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：4（1d4 + 2）穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d10 + 3) piercing damage plus 3 (1d6) lightning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+5命中，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：8（1d10 + 3）穿刺伤害，另加3（1d6）闪电伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The dragon exhales lightning in a 30-foot line that is 5 feet wide. Each creature in that line must make a DC 12 Dexterity saving throw, taking 22 (4d10) lightning damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
ast.target: 巨龙在一条30英尺长、5英尺宽的直线上吐出闪电。该直线内的每个生物必须进行一次DC 12敏捷豁免检定，失败则受到22（4d10）闪电伤害，成功则伤害减半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the boar moves at least 20 ft. straight toward a target and then hits it with a tusk attack on the same turn, the target takes an extra 3 (1d6) slashing damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 11 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.
ast.target: 若野猪在同一回合内直线朝目标移动至少20英尺并以獠牙攻击命中，则目标额外受到3（1d6）挥砍伤害。若目标为生物，则必须通过DC 11力量豁免检定，否则倒地。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the boar takes 7 damage or less that would reduce it to 0 hit points, it is reduced to 1 hit point instead.
ast.target: 如果野猪受到7点或更少的伤害本会使其降至0生命值，则改为降至1生命值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d6 + 1) slashing damage.
ast.target: 武器攻击：+3命中，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：4（1d6 + 1）挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The devil makes three attacks: two with its claws and one with its sting.
ast.target: 魔鬼进行三次攻击：两次爪击和一次尾刺。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+8命中，触及10英尺，单一目标。命中：8（1d8 + 4）挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 13 (2d8 + 4) piercing damage plus 17 (5d6) poison damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 14 Constitution saving throw or become poisoned for 1 minute. The target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success .
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+8命中，触及10英尺，单一目标。命中：13（2d8 + 4）穿刺伤害，另加17（5d6）毒素伤害，且目标必须通过DC 14体质豁免检定，否则中毒1分钟。目标可以在其每个回合结束时重复该豁免检定，成功则结束其自身所受效果。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d10 + 2) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+4命中，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：7（1d10 + 2）穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
The dragon uses one of the following breath weapons.
Fire Breath. The dragon exhales fire in an 20-foot line that is 5 feet wide. Each creature in that line must make a DC 11 Dexterity saving throw, taking 14 (4d6) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
Sleep Breath. The dragon exhales sleep gas in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in that area must succeed on a DC 11 Constitution saving throw or fall unconscious for 1 minute. This effect ends for a creature if the creature takes damage or someone uses an action to wake it.
ast.target:
巨龙使用以下之一的吐息武器。
火焰吐息。巨龙在一条20英尺长、5英尺宽的直线上吐出火焰。该直线内的每个生物必须进行一次DC 11敏捷豁免检定，失败则受到14（4d6）火焰伤害，成功则伤害减半。
睡眠吐息。巨龙在15英尺锥形区域内喷出睡眠气体。该区域内的每个生物必须通过DC 11体质豁免检定，否则昏迷1分钟。若该生物受到伤害或有人用一个动作将其唤醒，该效果结束。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d10 + 3) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+5命中，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：8（1d10 + 3）穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
The dragon uses one of the following breath weapons.
Lightning Breath. The dragon exhales lightning in a 40-foot line that is 5 feet wide. Each creature in that line must make a DC 12 Dexterity saving throw, taking 16 (3d10) lightning damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
Repulsion Breath. The dragon exhales repulsion energy in a 30-foot cone. Each creature in that area must succeed on a DC 12 Strength saving throw. On a failed save, the creature is pushed 30 feet away from the dragon.
ast.target:
巨龙使用以下之一的吐息武器。
闪电吐息。巨龙在一条40英尺长、5英尺宽的直线上吐出闪电。该直线内的每个生物必须进行一次DC 12敏捷豁免检定，失败则受到16（3d10）闪电伤害，成功则伤害减半。
排斥吐息。巨龙在30英尺锥形区域内吐出排斥能量。该区域内的每个生物必须通过DC 12力量豁免检定。豁免失败则被推离巨龙30英尺。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) piercing damage.
ast.target: 武器攻击：+5命中，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：8（1d8 + 4）穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+5命中，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：11（2d6 + 4）挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A melee weapon deals one extra die of its damage when the bugbear hits with it (included in the attack).
ast.target: 当熊地精用近战武器命中时，该武器额外造成一枚伤害骰（已包含在该攻击中）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the bugbear surprises a creature and hits it with an attack during the first round of combat, the target takes an extra 7 (2d6) damage from the attack.
ast.target: 若熊地精奇袭某生物并在战斗第一轮以一次攻击命中，则目标额外受到7（2d6）伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d8 + 2) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+4命中，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：11（2d8 + 2）穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 30/120 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (2d6 + 2) piercing damage in melee or 5 (1d6 + 2) piercing damage at range.
ast.target: 近战或远程武器攻击：+4命中，触及5英尺或射程30/120英尺，单一目标。命中：近战时造成9（2d6 + 2）穿刺伤害，远程时造成5（1d6 + 2）穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The bulette's long jump is up to 30 ft. and its high jump is up to 15 ft., with or without a running start.
ast.target: 掘地兽的远跳最多30英尺，高跳最多15英尺，无论是否有助跑。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 30 (4d12 + 4) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+7命中，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：30（4d12 + 4）穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 2 (1d4) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+5命中，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：2（1d4）钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The carrion crawler has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on smell.
ast.target: 腐肉爬行者在依赖嗅觉的感知（察觉）检定上具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The carrion crawler can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.
ast.target: 腐肉爬行者可以攀爬困难表面，包括倒挂在天花板上，而无需进行属性检定。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The carrion crawler makes two attacks: one with its tentacles and one with its bite.
ast.target: 腐肉爬行者进行两次攻击：一次用触须，一次用啃咬。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 10 ft., one creature. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) poison damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 13 Constitution saving throw or be poisoned for 1 minute. Until this poison ends, the target is paralyzed. The target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the poison on itself on a success.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+8命中，触及10英尺，单一生物。命中：4（1d4 + 2）毒素伤害，且目标必须通过DC 13体质豁免检定，否则中毒1分钟。在毒素结束前，目标处于麻痹状态。目标可以在其每个回合结束时重复该豁免检定，成功则结束其自身的中毒。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (2d4 + 2) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+4命中，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：7（2d4 + 2）穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The cat has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on smell.
ast.target: 这只猫在依赖嗅觉的感知（察觉）检定上具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +0 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 1 slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+0命中，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：1挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (1d8 + 5) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+7命中，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：9（1d8 + 5）穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 12 (2d6 + 5) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+7命中，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：12（2d6 + 5）挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the centaur moves at least 30 ft. straight toward a target and then hits it with a pike attack on the same turn, the target takes an extra 10 (3d6) piercing damage.
ast.target: 若半人马在同一回合内直线朝目标移动至少30英尺并以长枪攻击命中，则目标额外受到10（3d6）穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The centaur makes two attacks: one with its pike and one with its hooves or two with its longbow.
ast.target: 半人马进行两次攻击：一次用长枪、一次用蹄击，或用长弓进行两次攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (1d10 + 4) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+6命中，触及10英尺，单一目标。命中：9（1d10 + 4）穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+6命中，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：11（2d6 + 4）钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, range 150/600 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d8 + 2) piercing damage.
ast.target: 远程武器攻击：+4命中，射程150/600英尺，单一目标。命中：6（1d8 + 2）穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The devil makes two attacks with its chains.
ast.target: 魔鬼用它的锁链进行两次攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) slashing damage. The target is grappled (escape DC 14) if the devil isn't already grappling a creature. Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained and takes 7 (2d6) piercing damage at the start of each of its turns.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+8命中，触及10英尺，单一目标。命中：11（2d6 + 4）挥砍伤害。若魔鬼未擒抱其他生物，则目标被擒抱（逃脱DC 14）。在擒抱结束前，目标被束缚，并在其每个回合开始时受到7（2d6）穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
Up to four chains the devil can see within 60 feet of it magically sprout razor-edged barbs and animate under the devil's control, provided that the chains aren't being worn or carried.
Each animated chain is an object with AC 20, 20 hit points, resistance to piercing damage, and immunity to psychic and thunder damage. When the devil uses Multiattack on its turn, it can use each animated chain to make one additional chain attack. An animated chain can grapple one creature of its own but can't make attacks while grappling. An animated chain reverts to its inanimate state if reduced to 0 hit points or if the devil is incapacitated or dies.
ast.target:
魔鬼可在其60英尺内看到的至多四条锁链（前提是这些锁链未被穿戴或携带）魔法性长出带刀刃的倒钩，并在魔鬼控制下活动。
每条被动画化的锁链都是一个物体，AC 20，20点生命值，对穿刺伤害具有抗性，并免疫心灵与雷鸣伤害。当魔鬼在其回合使用多重攻击时，它可以让每条被动画化的锁链各进行一次额外的锁链攻击。被动画化的锁链可以擒抱一个生物，但在擒抱时不能进行攻击。若其生命值降至0或魔鬼失能或死亡，被动画化的锁链会恢复为无生命状态。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The chimera makes three attacks: one with its bite, one with its horns, and one with its claws. When its fire breath is available, it can use the breath in place of its bite or horns.
ast.target: 奇美拉进行三次攻击：一次啃咬、一次角撞、一次爪击。当其火焰吐息可用时，它可以用吐息取代啃咬或角撞。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+7命中，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：11（2d6 + 4）穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (1d12 + 4) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+7命中，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：10（1d12 + 4）钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+7命中，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：11（2d6 + 4）挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The dragon head exhales fire in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw, taking 31 (7d8) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
ast.target: 龙首在15英尺锥形区域内吐出火焰。该区域内的每个生物必须进行一次DC 15敏捷豁免检定，失败则受到31（7d8）火焰伤害，成功则伤害减半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The chuul can breathe air and water.
ast.target: 丘尔可以在空气和水中呼吸。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The chuul senses magic within 120 feet of it at will. This trait otherwise works like the detect magic spell but isn't itself magical.
ast.target: 丘尔可随意感知其120英尺内的魔法。此特性在其他方面与侦测魔法法术相同，但本身并非魔法。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The chuul makes two pincer attacks. If the chuul is grappling a creature, the chuul can also use its tentacles once.
ast.target: 丘尔进行两次螯击。若丘尔正擒抱一名生物，它还可以使用一次触须。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) bludgeoning damage. The target is grappled (escape DC 14) if it is a Large or smaller creature and the chuul doesn't have two other creatures grappled.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+6命中，触及10英尺，单一目标。命中：11（2d6 + 4）钝击伤害。若目标为大型或更小生物且丘尔未擒抱另外两名生物，则目标被擒抱（逃脱DC 14）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: One creature grappled by the chuul must succeed on a DC 13 Constitution saving throw or be poisoned for 1 minute. Until this poison ends, the target is paralyzed. The target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.
ast.target: 被丘尔擒抱的一名生物必须通过DC 13体质豁免检定，否则中毒1分钟。在毒素结束前，目标处于麻痹状态。目标可以在其每个回合结束时重复该豁免检定，成功则结束其自身所受效果。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While attached to a creature, the cloaker takes only half the damage dealt to it (rounded down). and that creature takes the other half.
ast.target: 当披风怪附着在生物上时，它只承受对其造成伤害的一半（向下取整），而该生物承受另一半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While in bright light, the cloaker has disadvantage on attack rolls and Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.
ast.target: 在明亮光线下，披风怪在攻击检定和依赖视觉的感知（察觉）检定上具有劣势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The cloaker makes two attacks: one with its bite and one with its tail.
ast.target: 披风怪进行两次攻击：一次啃咬，一次尾击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 10 ft., one creature. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+6命中，触及10英尺，单一生物。命中：7（1d8 + 3）挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Each creature within 60 feet of the cloaker that can hear its moan and that isn't an aberration must succeed on a DC 13 Wisdom saving throw or become frightened until the end of the cloaker's next turn. If a creature's saving throw is successful, the creature is immune to the cloaker's moan for the next 24 hours.
ast.target: 披风怪60英尺内能听到其哀嚎且不为异怪的每个生物必须通过DC 13感知豁免检定，否则恐惧至披风怪下回合结束。若生物的豁免成功，则在接下来的24小时内免疫披风怪的哀嚎。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The giant has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on smell.
ast.target: 巨人在依赖嗅觉的感知（察觉）检定上具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
The giant's innate spellcasting ability is Charisma. It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

At will: detect magic, fog cloud, light
3/day each: feather fall, fly, misty step, telekinesis
1/day each: control weather, gaseous form
ast.target:
巨人的天生施法能力为魅力。它可以天生施放以下法术，不需要材料成分：

随意：侦测魔法、云雾术、光亮术
每日3次：羽落术、飞行术、迷踪步、心灵遥控
每日1次：控制天气、气化形体

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The giant makes two morningstar attacks.
ast.target: 巨人进行两次钉头锤攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +12 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 21 (3d8 + 8) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+12命中，触及10英尺，单一目标。命中：21（3d8 + 8）穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Ranged Weapon Attack: +12 to hit, range 60/240 ft., one target. Hit: 30 (4d10 + 8) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 远程武器攻击：+12命中，射程60/240英尺，单一目标。命中：30（4d10 + 8）钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 3 (1d4 + 1) piercing damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 11 Constitution saving throw against being magically petrified. On a failed save, the creature begins to turn to stone and is restrained. It must repeat the saving throw at the end of its next turn. On a success, the effect ends. On a failure, the creature is petrified for 24 hours.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+3命中，触及5英尺，单一生物。命中：3（1d4 + 1）穿刺伤害，且目标必须通过DC 11体质豁免检定以抵抗魔法石化。豁免失败则该生物开始变为石头并被束缚。它必须在其下个回合结束时重复该豁免检定。成功则效果结束，失败则该生物石化24小时。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+4命中，触及5英尺，单一生物。命中：5（1d6 + 2）穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 6 (1d8 + 2) bludgeoning damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 14). Until this grapple ends, the creature is restrained, and the snake can't constrict another target.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+4命中，触及5英尺，单一生物。命中：6（1d8 + 2）钝击伤害，且目标被擒抱（逃脱DC 14）。在擒抱结束前，该生物被束缚，且蛇无法再缠绕另一个目标。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
The dragon uses one of the following breath weapons.
Acid Breath. The dragon exhales acid in an 20-foot line that is 5 feet wide. Each creature in that line must make a DC 11 Dexterity saving throw, taking 18 (4d8) acid damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
Slowing Breath. The dragon exhales gas in a 1 5-foot cone. Each creature in that area must succeed on a DC 11 Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, the creature can't use reactions, its speed is halved, and it can't make more than one attack on its turn. In addition, the creature can use either an action or a bonus action on its turn, but not both. These effects last for 1 minute. The creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself with a successful save.
ast.target:
巨龙使用以下之一的吐息武器。
酸蚀吐息。巨龙在一条20英尺长、5英尺宽的直线上吐出酸液。该直线内的每个生物必须进行一次DC 11敏捷豁免检定，失败则受到18（4d8）酸蚀伤害，成功则伤害减半。
迟缓吐息。巨龙在1 5英尺锥形区域内吐出气体。该区域内的每个生物必须通过DC 11体质豁免检定。豁免失败则该生物无法使用反应，其速度减半，并且在其回合内不能进行超过一次攻击。此外，该生物在其回合内只能使用一个动作或一个附赠动作，不能两者兼用。这些效果持续1分钟。该生物可以在其每个回合结束时重复该豁免检定，成功则结束其自身所受效果。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
The couatl's spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 14). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring only verbal components:

At will: detect evil and good, detect magic, detect thoughts
3/day each: bless, create food and water, cure wounds, lesser restoration, protection from poison, sanctuary, shield
1/day each: dream, greater restoration, scrying
ast.target:
库奥特尔的施法能力为魅力（法术豁免DC 14）。它可以天生施放以下法术，只需要言语成分：

随意：侦测善恶、侦测魔法、侦测思想
每日3次：祝福术、造粮与水、治疗伤口、次级复原术、防护毒素、圣域术、护盾术
每日1次：梦境术、高等复原术、探知术

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The couatl's weapon attacks are magical.
ast.target: 库奥特尔的武器攻击视为魔法。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 8 (1d6 + 5) piercing damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 13 Constitution saving throw or be poisoned for 24 hours. Until this poison ends, the target is unconscious. Another creature can use an action to shake the target awake.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+8命中，触及5英尺，单一生物。命中：8（1d6 + 5）穿刺伤害，且目标必须通过DC 13体质豁免检定，否则中毒24小时。在毒素结束前，目标处于昏迷状态。另一名生物可以用一个动作将目标摇醒。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 10 ft., one Medium or smaller creature. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) bludgeoning damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 15). Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained, and the couatl can't constrict another target.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+6命中，触及10英尺，单一中型或更小生物。命中：10（2d6 + 3）钝击伤害，且目标被擒抱（逃脱DC 15）。在擒抱结束前，目标被束缚，且库奥特尔无法再缠绕另一个目标。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The crab can breathe air and water.
ast.target: 螃蟹可以呼吸空气和水。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +0 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 1 bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+0，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：1点钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The crocodile can hold its breath for 15 minutes.
ast.target: 鳄鱼可以屏息15分钟。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 7 (1d10 + 2) piercing damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 12). Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained, and the crocodile can't bite another target
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+4，触及5英尺，单一生物。命中：7（1d10 + 2）穿刺伤害，且目标被擒抱（逃脱DC 12）。在擒抱结束前，目标处于束缚状态，且鳄鱼无法啃咬另一个目标

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The fanatic has advantage on saving throws against being charmed or frightened.
ast.target: 狂热者对抗魅惑或恐慌的豁免检定具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The fanatic makes two melee attacks.
ast.target: 狂热者进行两次近战攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one creature. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战或远程武器攻击：命中+4，触及5英尺或射程20/60英尺，单一生物。命中：4（1d4 + 2）穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The cultist has advantage on saving throws against being charmed or frightened.
ast.target: 邪教徒对抗魅惑或恐慌的豁免检定具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 4 (1d6 + 1) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+3，触及5英尺，单一生物。命中：4（1d6 + 1）挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The darkmantle can't use its blindsight while deafened.
ast.target: 暗披怪在耳聋时无法使用盲视。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A 15-foot radius of magical darkness extends out from the darkmantle, moves with it, and spreads around corners. The darkness lasts as long as the darkmantle maintains concentration, up to 10 minutes (as if concentrating on a spell). Darkvision can't penetrate this darkness, and no natural light can illuminate it. If any of the darkness overlaps with an area of light created by a spell of 2nd level or lower, the spell creating the light is dispelled.
ast.target: 以暗披怪为中心的15英尺半径内延展出魔法黑暗，随其移动并绕过拐角扩散。黑暗持续时间与暗披怪保持专注相同，最多10分钟（如同专注于法术）。黑暗视觉无法穿透此黑暗，任何自然光也无法照亮它。若该黑暗与由2环或更低法术创造的光照区域重叠，则创造光照的法术被驱散。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The dog has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks and on saving throws against being blinded, charmed, deafened, frightened, stunned, or knocked unconscious.
ast.target: 犬在感知（察觉）检定以及对抗目盲、魅惑、耳聋、恐慌、震慑或被击晕的豁免检定上具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The dog makes two bite attacks.
ast.target: 犬进行两次啃咬攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) piercing damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 12 Constitution saving throw against disease or become poisoned until the disease is cured. Every 24 hours that elapse, the creature must repeat the saving throw, reducing its hit point maximum by 5 (1d10) on a failure. This reduction lasts until the disease is cured. The creature dies if the disease reduces its hit point maximum to 0.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+4，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：5（1d6 + 2）穿刺伤害。如果目标是生物，它必须进行DC 12体质豁免以抵抗疾病，否则在疾病治愈前陷入中毒状态。每过24小时，该生物必须重复该豁免，失败则其生命值上限降低5（1d10）。该降低效果持续至疾病治愈。若疾病将其生命值上限降至0，则该生物死亡。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The gnome has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks made to hide in rocky terrain.
ast.target: 侏儒在岩石地形中进行用于躲藏的敏捷（潜行）检定时具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The gnome has advantage on Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma saving throws against magic.
ast.target: 侏儒对抗魔法的智力、感知与魅力豁免检定具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
The gnome's innate spellcasting ability is Intelligence (spell save DC 11). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:
At will: nondetection (self only)
1/day each: blindness/deafness, blur, disguise self
ast.target:
侏儒的天生施法能力为智力（法术豁免DC 11）。它可以天生施放以下法术，无需材料成分：
随意施放：nondetection（仅自身）
每日1次：blindness/deafness、blur、disguise self

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d8 + 2) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+4，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：6（1d8 + 2）穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, range 30/120 ft., one creature. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) piercing damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 12 Constitution saving throw or be poisoned for 1 minute. The target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success
ast.target: 远程武器攻击：命中+4，射程30/120英尺，单一生物。命中：4（1d4 + 2）穿刺伤害，且目标必须进行DC 12体质豁免，否则中毒1分钟。目标可在其每个回合结束时重复该豁免，成功则终止该效果

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +2 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 2 (1d4) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+2，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：2（1d4）穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The deva's weapon attacks are magical. When the deva hits with any weapon, the weapon deals an extra 4d8 radiant damage (included in the attack).
ast.target: 天使的武器攻击具有魔法性。当该天使以任何武器命中时，该武器额外造成4d8光辉伤害（已包含在攻击中）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
The deva's spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 17). The deva can innately cast the following spells, requiring only verbal components:
At will: detect evil and good
1/day each: commune, raise dead
ast.target:
天使的施法能力为魅力（法术豁免DC 17）。该天使可以天生施放以下法术，仅需言语成分：
随意施放：detect evil and good
每日1次：commune、raise dead

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The deva has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.
ast.target: 天使对法术和其他魔法效果的豁免检定具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The deva makes two melee attacks.
ast.target: 天使进行两次近战攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d6 + 4) bludgeoning damage plus 18 (4d8) radiant damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+8，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：7（1d6 + 4）点钝击伤害外加18（4d8）点光耀伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The deva touches another creature. The target magically regains 20 (4d8 + 2) hit points and is freed from any curse, disease, poison, blindness, or deafness.
ast.target: 天使触碰另一生物。目标以魔法恢复20（4d8 + 2）点生命值，并解除任何诅咒、疾病、中毒、失明或失聪。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The wolf has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on hearing or smell.
ast.target: 狼在依赖听觉或嗅觉的感知（察觉）检定上具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The wolf has advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the wolf's allies is within 5 ft. of the creature and the ally isn't incapacitated.
ast.target: 若狼的至少一名盟友在目标生物5尺内且该盟友未陷入无能状态，狼对该生物的攻击检定具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) piercing damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 13 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+5，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：10（2d6 + 3）点穿刺伤害。若目标为生物，须通过DC 13力量豁免，否则被击倒。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the djinni dies, its body disintegrates into a warm breeze, leaving behind only equipment the djinni was wearing or carrying.
ast.target: 如果风灵死亡，其身体会分解为一阵暖风，仅留下其所穿戴或携带的装备。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The djinni makes three scimitar attacks.
ast.target: 风灵进行三次弯刀攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 12 (2d6 + 5) slashing damage plus 3 (1d6) lightning or thunder damage (djinni's choice).
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+9，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：12（2d6 + 5）点挥砍伤害外加3（1d6）点闪电或雷鸣伤害（由风灵选择）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
A 5-foot-radius, 30-foot-tall cylinder of swirling air magically forms on a point the djinni can see within 120 feet of it. The whirlwind lasts as long as the djinni maintains concentration (as if concentrating on a spell). Any creature but the djinni that enters the whirlwind must succeed on a DC 18 Strength saving throw or be restrained by it. The djinni can move the whirlwind up to 60 feet as an action, and creatures restrained by the whirlwind move with it. The whirlwind ends if the djinni loses sight of it.
A creature can use its action to free a creature restrained by the whirlwind, including itself, by succeeding on a DC 18 Strength check. If the check succeeds, the creature is no longer restrained and moves to the nearest space outside the whirlwind.
ast.target:
一个半径5尺、高30尺的旋风气柱在风灵120尺内可见的一点以魔法形成。旋风持续到风灵维持专注（如同专注于法术）。除风灵外，任何进入旋风的生物必须通过DC 18力量豁免，否则被其束缚。风灵可以用一个动作将旋风移动至多60尺，被旋风束缚的生物随之移动。若风灵失去对其的视线，旋风结束。
生物可以用其动作通过DC 18力量检定，解救被旋风束缚的生物（包括其自身）。若检定成功，该生物不再被束缚并移动到旋风外最近的空间。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The doppelganger can use its action to polymorph into a Small or Medium humanoid it has seen, or back into its true form. Its statistics, other than its size, are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed. It reverts to its true form if it dies.
ast.target: 拟形怪可以用其动作变形为它见过的小型或中型类人生物，或变回其真实形态。除体型外，其各项数据在每种形态中相同。它所穿戴或携带的任何装备不会随之变形。若其死亡，则恢复为真实形态。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The doppelganger has advantage on attack rolls against any creature it has surprised.
ast.target: 拟形怪对它令其措手不及的任何生物的攻击检定具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the doppelganger surprises a creature and hits it with an attack during the first round of combat, the target takes an extra 10 (3d6) damage from the attack.
ast.target: 若拟形怪在战斗第一轮令一生物措手不及并以攻击命中之，目标从该攻击额外受到10（3d6）点伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The doppelganger makes two melee attacks.
ast.target: 拟形怪进行两次近战攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d6 + 4) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+6，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：7（1d6 + 4）点钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The doppelganger magically reads the surface thoughts of one creature within 60 ft. of it. The effect can penetrate barriers, but 3 ft. of wood or dirt, 2 ft. of stone, 2 inches of metal, or a thin sheet of lead blocks it. While the target is in range, the doppelganger can continue reading its thoughts, as long as the doppelganger's concentration isn't broken (as if concentrating on a spell). While reading the target's mind, the doppelganger has advantage on Wisdom (Insight) and Charisma (Deception, Intimidation, and Persuasion) checks against the target.
ast.target: 拟形怪以魔法读取其60尺内一名生物的表层思绪。该效果可穿透屏障，但3尺厚的木或土、2尺厚的石、2英寸厚的金属或一层薄铅板可阻隔。只要目标在范围内且拟形怪的专注未被打断（如同专注于法术），它就能继续读取其思绪。在读取目标心智时，拟形怪对该目标进行感知（洞悉）以及魅力（欺瞒、威吓和劝说）检定具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (2d4 + 4) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+6，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：9（2d4 + 4）点钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The dragon turtle can breathe air and water.
ast.target: 龙龟可以在空气和水中呼吸。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The dragon turtle makes three attacks: one with its bite and two with its claws. It can make one tail attack in place of its two claw attacks.
ast.target: 龙龟进行三次攻击：一次撕咬与两次爪击。它可以用一次尾击替代两次爪击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +13 to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. Hit: 26 (3d12 + 7) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+13，触及15尺，单一目标。命中：26（3d12 + 7）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +13 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 16 (2d8 + 7) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+13，触及10尺，单一目标。命中：16（2d8 + 7）点挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +13 to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. Hit: 26 (3d12 + 7) bludgeoning damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 20 Strength saving throw or be pushed up to 10 feet away from the dragon turtle and knocked prone.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+13，触及15尺，单一目标。命中：26（3d12 + 7）点钝击伤害。若目标为生物，须通过DC 20力量豁免，否则被推离龙龟至多10尺并倒地。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The dragon turtle exhales scalding steam in a 60-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 18 Constitution saving throw, taking 52 (15d6) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. Being underwater doesn't grant resistance against this damage.
ast.target: 龙龟在60尺锥形范围内吐出滚烫蒸汽。该区域内的每个生物必须进行DC 18体质豁免，失败则受到52（15d6）点火焰伤害，成功则伤害减半。处于水下不会对该伤害获得抗性。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The dretch makes two attacks: one with its bite and one with its claws.
ast.target: 魔鬼幼体进行两次攻击：一次撕咬与一次爪击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +2 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 3 (1d6) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+2，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：3（1d6）穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +2 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (2d4) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+2，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：5（2d4）挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A 10-foot radius of disgusting green gas extends out from the dretch. The gas spreads around corners, and its area is lightly obscured. It lasts for 1 minute or until a strong wind disperses it. Any creature that starts its turn in that area must succeed on a DC 11 Constitution saving throw or be poisoned until the start of its next turn. While poisoned in this way, the target can take either an action or a bonus action on its turn, not both, and can't take reactions.
ast.target: 一股令人作呕的绿色毒气从夔雷奇身上扩散，形成半径10英尺的区域。气体会绕过拐角扩散，其区域轻度遮蔽。持续1分钟，或直到被强风吹散。任何在该区域开始其回合的生物必须通过DC 11体质豁免，否则将中毒至其下回合开始。以此方式中毒时，目标在其回合只能执行一个动作或一个附赠动作，不能同时进行，且不能进行反应。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The drider has advantage on saving throws against being charmed, and magic can't put the drider to sleep.
ast.target: 蛛化精对抗魅惑的豁免具有优势，且魔法无法使蛛化精入睡。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
The drider's innate spellcasting ability is Wisdom (spell save DC 13). The drider can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:
At will: dancing lights
1/day each: darkness, faerie fire
ast.target:
蛛化精的天生施法能力为感知（法术豁免DC 13）。蛛化精可以天生施放以下法术，无需材料成分：
随意：dancing lights
每日1次各：darkness，faerie fire

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The drider can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.
ast.target: 蛛化精可以攀爬困难表面，包括倒挂在天花板上，无需进行属性检定。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While in sunlight, the drider has disadvantage on attack rolls, as well as on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.
ast.target: 在阳光下，蛛化精的攻击检定具有劣势，且依赖视觉的感知（Perception）检定也具有劣势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The drider makes three attacks, either with its longsword or its longbow. It can replace one of those attacks with a bite attack.
ast.target: 蛛化精进行三次攻击，使用长剑或长弓。它可以将其中一次攻击替换为啃咬攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 2 (1d4) piercing damage plus 9 (2d8) poison damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+6，触及5英尺，单一生物。命中：2（1d4）穿刺伤害外加9（2d8）毒素伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) slashing damage, or 8 (1d10 + 3) slashing damage if used with two hands.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+6，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：7（1d8 + 3）挥砍伤害；若双手使用则为8（1d10 + 3）挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Ranged Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, range 150/600 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) piercing damage plus 4 (1d8) poison damage.
ast.target: 远程武器攻击：命中+6，射程150/600英尺，单一目标。命中：7（1d8 + 3）穿刺伤害外加4（1d8）毒素伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The drow has advantage on saving throws against being charmed, and magic can't put the drow to sleep.
ast.target: 卓尔对抗魅惑的豁免具有优势，且魔法无法使卓尔入睡。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
The drow's spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 11). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:
At will: dancing lights
1/day each: darkness, faerie fire
ast.target:
卓尔的施法能力为魅力（法术豁免DC 11）。它可以天生施放以下法术，无需材料成分：
随意：dancing lights
每日1次各：darkness，faerie fire

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While in sunlight, the drow has disadvantage on attack rolls, as well as on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.
ast.target: 在阳光下，卓尔的攻击检定具有劣势，且依赖视觉的感知（Perception）检定也具有劣势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+4，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：5（1d6 + 2）穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, range 30/120 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) piercing damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 13 Constitution saving throw or be poisoned for 1 hour. If the saving throw fails by 5 or more, the target is also unconscious while poisoned in this way. The target wakes up if it takes damage or if another creature takes an action to shake it awake.
ast.target: 远程武器攻击：命中+4，射程30/120英尺，单一目标。命中：5（1d6 + 2）穿刺伤害，且目标必须通过DC 13体质豁免，否则中毒1小时。若豁免失败5点或更多，目标在以此方式中毒期间也会昏迷。目标受到伤害，或有其他生物花费一个动作将其摇醒时会醒来。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +2 to hit (+4 to hit with shillelagh), reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 3 (1d6) bludgeoning damage, or 6 (1d8 + 2) bludgeoning damage with shillelagh or if wielded with two hands.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+2（使用shillelagh则为命中+4），触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：3（1d6）钝击伤害；若使用shillelagh或双手持用则为6（1d8 + 2）钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
The dryad's innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 14). The dryad can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

At will: druidcraft
3/day each: entangle, goodberry
1/day each: barkskin, pass without trace, shillelagh
ast.target:
树精的天生施法能力为魅力（法术豁免DC 14）。树精可以天生施放以下法术，无需材料成分：

随意：druidcraft
每日3次各：entangle，goodberry
每日1次各：barkskin，pass without trace，shillelagh

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The dryad has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.
ast.target: 树精对抗法术和其他魔法效果的豁免具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The dryad can communicate with beasts and plants as if they shared a language.
ast.target: 树精能与野兽和植物交流，仿佛它们共享一种语言。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +2 to hit (+6 to hit with shillelagh), reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 2 (1 d4) bludgeoning damage, or 8 (1d8 + 4) bludgeoning damage with shillelagh.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+2（使用shillelagh则为命中+6），触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：2（1 d4）钝击伤害；若使用shillelagh则为8（1d8 + 4）钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
The dryad targets one humanoid or beast that she can see within 30 feet of her. If the target can see the dryad, it must succeed on a DC 14 Wisdom saving throw or be magically charmed. The charmed creature regards the dryad as a trusted friend to be heeded and protected. Although the target isn't under the dryad's control, it takes the dryad's requests or actions in the most favorable way it can.
Each time the dryad or its allies do anything harmful to the target, it can repeat the saving throw, ending the effect on itself on a success. Otherwise, the effect lasts 24 hours or until the dryad dies, is on a different plane of existence from the target, or ends the effect as a bonus action. If a target's saving throw is successful, the target is immune to the dryad's Fey Charm for the next 24 hours.
The dryad can have no more than one humanoid and up to three beasts charmed at a time.
ast.target:
树精选择她30英尺内可见的一个类人生物或野兽作为目标。若目标能看见树精，则必须通过DC 14感知豁免，否则被魔法魅惑。被魅惑的生物将树精视为值得信赖的朋友，愿意听从并保护她。尽管目标不受树精控制，它会以最有利的方式解读树精的请求或行动。
每当树精或其盟友对目标做出任何有害行为时，目标可以重复豁免，成功则结束对自身的效果。否则，该效果持续24小时，或直到树精死亡、与目标不在同一位面，或树精以附赠动作结束效果为止。若目标的豁免成功，则在接下来的24小时内免疫树精的妖精魅惑。
树精同时最多只能魅惑一个类人生物和最多三个野兽。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The duergar has advantage on saving throws against poison, spells, and illusions, as well as to resist being charmed or paralyzed.
ast.target: 灰矮人对抗毒素、法术和幻觉的豁免具有优势，且对抗魅惑或麻痹的豁免也具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While in sunlight, the duergar has disadvantage on attack rolls, as well as on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.
ast.target: 在阳光下，灰矮人的攻击检定具有劣势，且依赖视觉的感知（Perception）检定也具有劣势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: For 1 minute, the duergar magically increases in size, along with anything it is wearing or carrying. While enlarged, the duergar is Large, doubles its damage dice on Strength-based weapon attacks (included in the attacks), and makes Strength checks and Strength saving throws with advantage. If the duergar lacks the room to become Large, it attains the maximum size possible in the space available.
ast.target: 持续1分钟，灰矮人通过魔法变大，连同其所穿戴或携带的物品一起变大。变大期间，灰矮人为大型，在基于力量的武器攻击中其伤害骰翻倍（已包含在攻击中），并以优势进行力量检定和力量豁免。若灰矮人没有足够空间变为大型，则在可用空间内达到最大可能体型。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d8 + 2) piercing damage, or 11 (2d8 + 2) piercing damage while enlarged.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+4命中，触及5 ft.，一个目标。命中：6（1d8 + 2）穿刺伤害，或在变大时为11（2d8 + 2）穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 30/120 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) piercing damage, or 9 (2d6 + 2) piercing damage while enlarged.
ast.target: 近战或远程武器攻击：+4命中，触及5 ft.或射程30/120 ft.，一个目标。命中：5（1d6 + 2）穿刺伤害，或在变大时为9（2d6 + 2）穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The duergar magically turns invisible until it attacks, casts a spell, or uses its Enlarge, or until its concentration is broken, up to 1 hour (as if concentrating on a spell). Any equipment the duergar wears or carries is invisible with it .
ast.target: 灰矮人会以魔法变得隐形，直到它攻击、施放法术或使用其Enlarge，或直到其专注被打破，持续至多1小时（如同在专注一个法术）。灰矮人穿戴或携带的任何装备也会随之隐形 .

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the mephit dies, it explodes in a burst of dust. Each creature within 5 ft. of it must then succeed on a DC 10 Constitution saving throw or be blinded for 1 minute. A blinded creature can repeat the saving throw on each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.
ast.target: 当该小魔怪死亡时，它会在一阵尘土爆发中爆炸。随后其5 ft.内的每个生物必须通过一次DC 10体质豁免检定，否则目盲1分钟。目盲的生物可以在其每个回合重复进行该豁免检定，成功则结束自身效果。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The mephit can innately cast sleep, requiring no material components. Its innate spellcasting ability is Charisma.
ast.target: 该小魔怪可以天生施放睡眠，不需要材料成分。其天生施法属性为魅力。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+4命中，触及5 ft.，一个生物。命中：4（1d4 + 2）挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The mephit exhales a 15-foot cone of blinding dust. Each creature in that area must succeed on a DC 10 Dexterity saving throw or be blinded for 1 minute. A creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.
ast.target: 该小魔怪呼出一片15-foot锥形的致盲尘土。该区域内的每个生物必须通过一次DC 10敏捷豁免检定，否则目盲1分钟。生物可以在其每个回合结束时重复该豁免检定，成功则结束自身效果。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The eagle has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.
ast.target: 该鹰在依赖视觉的感知（察觉）检定上具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+4命中，触及5 ft.，一个目标。命中：4（1d4 + 2）挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (2d8 + 5) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+8命中，触及10 ft.，一个目标。命中：14（2d8 + 5）钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the efreeti dies, its body disintegrates in a flash of fire and puff of smoke, leaving behind only equipment the djinni was wearing or carrying.
ast.target: 如果伊夫利特死亡，它的身体会在一闪火焰和一团烟雾中解体，只留下该djinni穿戴或携带的装备。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The efreeti makes two scimitar attacks or uses its Hurl Flame twice.
ast.target: 伊夫利特进行两次弯刀攻击或使用其Hurl Flame两次。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 13 (2d6 + 6) slashing damage plus 7 (2d6) fire damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+10命中，触及5 ft.，一个目标。命中：13（2d6 + 6）挥砍伤害外加7（2d6）火焰伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Ranged Spell Attack: +7 to hit, range 120 ft., one target. Hit: 17 (5d6) fire damage.
ast.target: 远程法术攻击：+7命中，射程120 ft.，一个目标。命中：17（5d6）火焰伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the elephant moves at least 20 ft. straight toward a creature and then hits it with a gore attack on the same turn, that target must succeed on a DC 12 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone. If the target is prone, the elephant can make one stomp attack against it as a bonus action.
ast.target: 如果大象直线移动至少20 ft.并在同一回合用獠牙冲撞攻击命中一个生物，该目标必须通过一次DC 12力量豁免检定，否则被击倒俯卧。若目标俯卧，大象可以用额外动作对其进行一次践踏攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 19 (3d8 + 6) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+8命中，触及5 ft.，一个目标。命中：19（3d8 + 6）穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one prone creature. Hit: 22 (3d10 + 6) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+8命中，触及5 ft.，一个俯卧生物。命中：22（3d10 + 6）钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the elk moves at least 20 ft. straight toward a target and then hits it with a ram attack on the same turn, the target takes an extra 7 (2d6) damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 13 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.
ast.target: 如果麋鹿直线移动至少20 ft.并在同一回合用顶撞攻击命中目标，该目标额外受到7（2d6）伤害。如果目标是生物，它必须通过一次DC 13力量豁免检定，否则被击倒俯卧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one prone creature. Hit: 8 (2d4 + 3) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+5命中，触及5 ft.，一个俯卧生物。命中：8（2d4 + 3）钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The erinyes's weapon attacks are magical and deal an extra 13 (3d8) poison damage on a hit (included in the attacks).
ast.target: 复仇女妖的武器攻击为魔法攻击，命中时会额外造成13（3d8）毒素伤害（已包含在攻击中）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The erinyes has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.
ast.target: 复仇女妖对抗法术和其他魔法效果的豁免检定具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The erinyes makes three attacks
ast.target: 复仇女妖进行三次攻击

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) slashing damage, or 9 (1d10 + 4) slashing damage if used with two hands, plus 13 (3d8) poison damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+8命中，触及5 ft.，一个目标。命中：8（1d8 + 4）挥砍伤害，若双手使用则为9（1d10 + 4）挥砍伤害，外加13（3d8）毒素伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The erinyes adds 4 to its AC against one melee attack that would hit it. To do so, the erinyes must see the attacker and be wielding a melee weapon.
ast.target: 复仇女妖对一次将命中它的近战攻击将其AC提高4。为此，复仇女妖必须能看到攻击者并正持近战武器。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The ettercap can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.
ast.target: 捕蛛怪可以攀爬困难表面，包括倒挂在天花板上，而无需进行属性检定。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While in contact with a web, the ettercap knows the exact location of any other creature in contact with the same web.
ast.target: 当与蛛网接触时，蛛魔能知晓与同一蛛网接触的任何其他生物的确切位置。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The ettercap makes two attacks: one with its bite and one with its claws.
ast.target: 蛛魔进行两次攻击：一次用啃咬，一次用爪击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 6 (1d8 + 2) piercing damage plus 4 (1d8) poison damage. The target must succeed on a DC 11 Constitution saving throw or be poisoned for 1 minute. The creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+4 命中，触及 5 英尺，单一生物。命中：6（1d8 + 2）点穿刺伤害，外加 4（1d8）点毒素伤害。目标必须成功通过 DC 11 体质豁免，否则中毒 1 分钟。该生物可在其每个回合结束时重复该豁免，成功则结束其身上的效果。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (2d4 + 2) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+4 命中，触及 5 英尺，单一目标。命中：7（2d4 + 2）点挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, range 30/60 ft., one Large or smaller creature. Hit: The creature is restrained by webbing. As an action, the restrained creature can make a DC 11 Strength check, escaping from the webbing on a success. The effect ends if the webbing is destroyed. The webbing has AC 10, 5 hit points, is vulnerable to fire damage and immune to bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 远程武器攻击：+4 命中，射程 30/60 英尺，单一大型或更小生物。命中：该生物被蛛网束缚。作为一个动作，被束缚的生物可进行 DC 11 力量检定，成功则从蛛网中逃脱。若蛛网被摧毁则效果结束。蛛网 AC 10，5 点生命值，易受火焰伤害，免疫钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one Medium or Small creature against which the ettercap has advantage on the attack roll. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) bludgeoning damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 12). Until this grapple ends, the target can't breathe, and the ettercap has advantage on attack rolls against it.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+4 命中，触及 5 英尺，单一中型或小型生物，蛛魔对其攻击检定具有优势。命中：4（1d4 + 2）点钝击伤害，且目标被擒抱（逃脱 DC 12）。直到此擒抱结束前，目标无法呼吸，且蛛魔对其攻击检定具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The ettin has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks and on saving throws against being blinded, charmed, deafened, frightened, stunned, and knocked unconscious.
ast.target: 双头巨人进行感知（察觉）检定时具有优势，并且对目盲、魅惑、耳聋、恐慌、震慑及昏迷的豁免具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When one of the ettin's heads is asleep, its other head is awake.
ast.target: 当双头巨人的一颗头睡着时，另一颗头是醒着的。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The ettin makes two attacks: one with its battleaxe and one with its morningstar.
ast.target: 双头巨人进行两次攻击：一次用战斧，一次用钉头锤。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (2d8 + 5) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+7 命中，触及 5 英尺，单一目标。命中：14（2d8 + 5）点挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (2d8 + 5) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+7 命中，触及 5 英尺，单一目标。命中：14（2d8 + 5）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) fire damage. If the target is a creature or a flammable object, it ignites. Until a creature takes an action to douse the fire, the target takes 5 (1d10) fire damage at the start of each of its turns.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+6 命中，触及 5 英尺，单一目标。命中：10（2d6 + 3）点火焰伤害。若目标为生物或可燃物体，则会被点燃。在有生物用一个动作扑灭火焰之前，目标在其每个回合开始时受到 5（1d10）点火焰伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The giant makes two greatsword attacks.
ast.target: 巨人进行两次巨剑攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +11 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 28 (6d6 + 7) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+11 命中，触及 10 英尺，单一目标。命中：28（6d6 + 7）点挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Ranged Weapon Attack: +11 to hit, range 60/240 ft., one target. Hit: 29 (4d10 + 7) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 远程武器攻击：+11 命中，射程 60/240 英尺，单一目标。命中：29（4d10 + 7）点钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 13 (2d8 + 4) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+7 命中，触及 5 英尺，单一目标。命中：13（2d8 + 4）点钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 1 piercing damage plus 7 (3d4) poison damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+6 命中，触及 5 英尺，单一目标。命中：1 点穿刺伤害外加 7（3d4）点毒素伤害。

ast.name: desc
