ast.source: The sword is incapacitated while in the area of an antimagic field. If targeted by dispel magic, the sword must succeed on a Constitution saving throw against the caster's spell save DC or fall unconscious for 1 minute.
ast.target: 当处于反魔法力场范围内时，这把剑会陷入失能状态。若被解除魔法为目标，这把剑必须进行一次体质豁免对抗施法者的法术豁免 DC，否则将昏迷 1 分钟。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d8 + 1) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+3 命中，触及 5 英尺，单一目标。命中：5（1d8 + 1）点挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The frog can breathe air and water
ast.target: 青蛙可以在空气和水中呼吸。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The frog's long jump is up to 10 ft. and its high jump is up to 5 ft., with or without a running start.
ast.target: 青蛙的跳远最高 10 英尺，跳高最高 5 英尺，无论是否助跑皆可。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The giant makes two greataxe attacks.
ast.target: 巨人进行两次巨斧攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 25 (3d12 + 6) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+9 命中，触及 10 英尺，单一目标。命中：25（3d12 + 6）点挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Ranged Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, range 60/240 ft., one target. Hit: 28 (4d10 + 6) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 远程武器攻击：+9 命中，射程 60/240 英尺，单一目标。命中：28（4d10 + 6）点钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The gargoyle makes two attacks: one with its bite and one with its claws.
ast.target: 石像鬼进行两次攻击：一次用啃咬，一次用爪击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+4，触及5 ft.，一个目标。命中：5（1d6 + 2）挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Even when the cube is in plain sight, it takes a successful DC 15 Wisdom (Perception) check to spot a cube that has neither moved nor attacked. A creature that tries to enter the cube's space while unaware of the cube is surprised by the cube.
ast.target: 即使方块清晰可见，也需要成功通过DC 15的感知（察觉）检定才能发现一个既未移动也未攻击的方块。对方块毫不知情而试图进入其空间的生物会被方块突袭。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 10 (3d6) acid damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+4，触及5 ft.，一个生物。命中：10（3d6）酸蚀伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
The cube moves up to its speed. While doing so, it can enter Large or smaller creatures' spaces. Whenever the cube enters a creature's space, the creature must make a DC 12 Dexterity saving throw.
On a successful save, the creature can choose to be pushed 5 feet back or to the side of the cube. A creature that chooses not to be pushed suffers the consequences of a failed saving throw.
On a failed save, the cube enters the creature's space, and the creature takes 10 (3d6) acid damage and is engulfed. The engulfed creature can't breathe, is restrained, and takes 21 (6d6) acid damage at the start of each of the cube's turns. When the cube moves, the engulfed creature moves with it.
An engulfed creature can try to escape by taking an action to make a DC 12 Strength check. On a success, the creature escapes and enters a space of its choice within 5 feet of the cube.
ast.target:
方块移动至其速度上限。过程中，它可以进入大型或更小生物的空间。每当方块进入某个生物的空间时，该生物必须进行一次DC 12敏捷豁免。
若豁免成功，该生物可选择被推离5英尺或移到方块侧边。选择不被推开的生物将承受豁免失败的后果。
若豁免失败，方块进入该生物的空间，该生物受到10（3d6）酸蚀伤害并被吞没。被吞没的生物无法呼吸、被束缚，并在方块每个回合开始时受到21（6d6）酸蚀伤害。当方块移动时，被吞没的生物随之移动。
被吞没的生物可以用一个动作进行DC 12力量检定以尝试逃脱。成功则生物逃脱并进入距离方块5英尺内其选择的一个空间。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Any creature that starts its turn within 5 ft. of the ghast must succeed on a DC 10 Constitution saving throw or be poisoned until the start of its next turn. On a successful saving throw, the creature is immune to the ghast's Stench for 24 hours.
ast.target: 任何在尸臭鬼5 ft.内开始其回合的生物必须成功通过DC 10体质豁免，否则中毒直到其下回合开始。若豁免成功，该生物在24小时内免疫尸臭鬼的恶臭。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The ghast and any ghouls within 30 ft. of it have advantage on saving throws against effects that turn undead.
ast.target: 尸臭鬼及其30 ft.内的食尸鬼对驱散亡灵的效果进行豁免时具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 12 (2d8 + 3) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+3，触及5 ft.，一个生物。命中：12（2d8 + 3）穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) slashing damage. If the target is a creature other than an undead, it must succeed on a DC 10 Constitution saving throw or be paralyzed for 1 minute. The target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+5，触及5 ft.，一个目标。命中：10（2d6 + 3）挥砍伤害。若目标为非亡灵生物，必须成功通过DC 10体质豁免，否则麻痹1分钟。目标可在其每个回合结束时重复该豁免，成功则终止其身上的该效果。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The ghost can see 60 ft. into the Ethereal Plane when it is on the Material Plane, and vice versa.
ast.target: 幽灵在物质位面时可看见以太位面内60 ft.，反之亦然。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The ghost can move through other creatures and objects as if they were difficult terrain. It takes 5 (1d10) force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.
ast.target: 幽灵可像穿越困难地形一样穿过其他生物和物体。若其在物体内结束回合，会受到5（1d10）力场伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 17 (4d6 + 3) necrotic damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+5，触及5 ft.，一个目标。命中：17（4d6 + 3）黯蚀伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The ghost enters the Ethereal Plane from the Material Plane, or vice versa. It is visible on the Material Plane while it is in the Border Ethereal, and vice versa, yet it can't affect or be affected by anything on the other plane.
ast.target: 幽灵从物质位面进入以太位面，或反之。当它处于以太边界时，在物质位面可见，反之亦然，但它无法影响也不受另一位面上的任何事物影响。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Each non-undead creature within 60 ft. of the ghost that can see it must succeed on a DC 13 Wisdom saving throw or be frightened for 1 minute. If the save fails by 5 or more, the target also ages 1d4 _ 10 years. A frightened target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the frightened condition on itself on a success. If a target's saving throw is successful or the effect ends for it, the target is immune to this ghost's Horrifying Visage for the next 24 hours. The aging effect can be reversed with a greater restoration spell, but only within 24 hours of it occurring.
ast.target: 在幽灵60 ft.内且能看见它的每个非亡灵生物必须成功通过DC 13感知豁免，否则恐惧1分钟。若豁免失败5点或以上，目标还会衰老1d4 _ 10年。被恐惧的目标可在其每个回合结束时重复该豁免，成功则终止其身上的恐惧状态。若目标豁免成功或效果对其结束，则该目标在接下来的24小时内免疫此幽灵的可怖面容。衰老效果可通过强效复原术逆转，但仅限于发生后的24小时内。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
One humanoid that the ghost can see within 5 ft. of it must succeed on a DC 13 Charisma saving throw or be possessed by the ghost; the ghost then disappears, and the target is incapacitated and loses control of its body. The ghost now controls the body but doesn't deprive the target of awareness. The ghost can't be targeted by any attack, spell, or other effect, except ones that turn undead, and it retains its alignment, Intelligence, Wisdom, Charisma, and immunity to being charmed and frightened. It otherwise uses the possessed target's statistics, but doesn't gain access to the target's knowledge, class features, or proficiencies.
The possession lasts until the body drops to 0 hit points, the ghost ends it as a bonus action, or the ghost is turned or forced out by an effect like the dispel evil and good spell. When the possession ends, the ghost reappears in an unoccupied space within 5 ft. of the body. The target is immune to this ghost's Possession for 24 hours after succeeding on the saving throw or after the possession ends.
ast.target:
幽灵可看见的、距离其5 ft.内的一个类人生物必须成功通过DC 13魅力豁免，否则被幽灵附体；随后幽灵消失，目标陷入失能并失去对身体的控制。幽灵现在控制该身体，但不剥夺目标的意识。除对抗亡灵的效果外，幽灵不能成为任何攻击、法术或其他效果的目标，并保留其阵营、智力、感知、魅力以及对魅惑与恐惧的免疫。除此之外，它使用被附体目标的属性数据，但不会获得目标的知识、职业特性或熟练项。
附体持续到身体降至0生命值、幽灵以一个附赠动作结束附体，或幽灵被驱散或被如驱散邪恶与善良之类的效果迫使离开。当附体结束时，幽灵在距离该身体5 ft.内的一个未被占据的空间重新出现。目标在成功豁免或附体结束后的24小时内免疫此幽灵的附体。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +2 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 9 (2d6 + 2) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+2，触及5 ft.，一个生物。命中：9（2d6 + 2）穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (2d4 + 2) slashing damage. If the target is a creature other than an elf or undead, it must succeed on a DC 10 Constitution saving throw or be paralyzed for 1 minute. The target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+4，触及5 ft.，一个目标。命中：7（2d4 + 2）挥砍伤害。若目标为非精灵或非亡灵的生物，必须成功通过DC 10体质豁免，否则麻痹1分钟。目标可在其每个回合结束时重复该豁免，成功则终止其身上的该效果。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 22 (3d10 + 6) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+9，触及10 ft.，一个目标。命中：22（3d10 + 6）钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Ranged Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, range 50/100 ft., one target. Hit: 30 (7d6 + 6) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 远程武器攻击：命中+9，射程50/100 ft.，一个目标。命中：30（7d6 + 6）钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The badger makes two attacks: one with its bite and one with its claws.
ast.target: 獾进行两次攻击：一次用啃咬，一次用爪击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (2d4 + 1) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+3，触及5 ft.，一个目标。命中：6（2d4 + 1）挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the boar moves at least 20 ft. straight toward a target and then hits it with a tusk attack on the same turn, the target takes an extra 7 (2d6) slashing damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 13 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.
ast.target: 若野猪直线向目标移动至少20 ft.并在同一回合以獠牙攻击命中，则目标额外受到7（2d6）挥砍伤害。若目标为生物，必须成功通过DC 13力量豁免，否则被击倒。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the boar takes 10 damage or less that would reduce it to 0 hit points, it is reduced to 1 hit point instead.
ast.target: 若野猪受到10点或更少的伤害且本应将其降至0生命值，则它改为降至1生命值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+5，触及5 ft.，一个目标。命中：10（2d6 + 3）挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Bite. Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) piercing damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 11 Constitution saving throw or take 10 (3d6) poison damage. If the poison damage reduces the target to 0 hit points, the target is stable but poisoned for 1 hour, even after regaining hit points, and is paralyzed while poisoned in this way.
ast.target: 啃咬。近战武器攻击：命中+4，触及5 ft.，一个生物。命中：4（1d4 + 2）穿刺伤害，且目标必须成功通过DC 11体质豁免，否则受到10（3d6）毒素伤害。若毒素伤害将目标降至0生命值，目标稳定但中毒1小时，即使恢复生命值后仍然中毒，并在以此方式中毒时处于麻痹状态。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 10 ft., one creature. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+6，触及10 ft.，一个生物。命中：11（2d6 + 4）穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 13 (2d8 + 4) bludgeoning damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 16). Until this grapple ends, the creature is restrained, and the snake can't constrict another target.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+6，触及5尺，一个生物。命中：13（2d8 + 4）点钝击伤害，且目标被擒抱（逃脱DC 16）。直到该擒抱结束，生物处于受束缚状态，且蛇不能再绞勒另一个目标。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d6 + 1) bludgeoning damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 11). The crab has two claws, each of which can grapple only one target.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+3，触及5尺，一个目标。命中：4（1d6 + 1）点钝击伤害，且目标被擒抱（逃脱DC 11）。螃蟹有两只钳子，每只只能擒抱一个目标。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The crocodile can hold its breath for 30 minutes.
ast.target: 鳄鱼可以屏住呼吸30分钟。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The crocodile makes two attacks: one with its bite and one with its tail.
ast.target: 鳄鱼进行两次攻击：一次用咬击，一次用尾击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 21 (3d10 + 5) piercing damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 16). Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained, and the crocodile can't bite another target.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+8，触及5尺，一个目标。命中：21（3d10 + 5）点穿刺伤害，且目标被擒抱（逃脱DC 16）。直到该擒抱结束，目标处于受束缚状态，且鳄鱼不能再咬击另一个目标。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target not grappled by the crocodile. Hit: 14 (2d8 + 5) bludgeoning damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 16 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+8，触及10尺，一个未被鳄鱼擒抱的目标。命中：14（2d8 + 5）点钝击伤害。如果目标是生物，必须通过DC 16力量豁免，否则被击倒。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The eagle makes two attacks: one with its beak and one with its talons.
ast.target: 老鹰进行两次攻击：一次用喙，一次用爪击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+5，触及5尺，一个目标。命中：6（1d6 + 3）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the elk moves at least 20 ft. straight toward a target and then hits it with a ram attack on the same turn, the target takes an extra 7 (2d6) damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 14 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.
ast.target: 如果麋鹿以直线向目标移动至少20尺，并在同一回合用冲撞攻击命中它，目标额外受到7（2d6）点伤害。如果目标是生物，必须通过DC 14力量豁免，否则被击倒。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+6，触及10尺，一个目标。命中：11（2d6 + 4）点钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one prone creature. Hit: 22 (4d8 + 4) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+6，触及5尺，一个倒地生物。命中：22（4d8 + 4）点钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The beetle sheds bright light in a 10-foot radius and dim light for an additional 10 ft..
ast.target: 甲虫在10尺半径内散发明亮光照，并在额外10尺范围内散发微光。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +1 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 2 (1d6 — 1) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+1，触及5尺，一个目标。命中：2（1d6 — 1）点挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The frog's long jump is up to 20 ft. and its high jump is up to 10 ft., with or without a running start.
ast.target: 青蛙的远跳距离至多20尺，高跳至多10尺，无论是否助跑。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d6 + 1) piercing damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 11). Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained, and the frog can't bite another target.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+3，触及5尺，一个目标。命中：4（1d6 + 1）点穿刺伤害，且目标被擒抱（逃脱DC 11）。直到该擒抱结束，目标处于受束缚状态，且青蛙不能再咬击另一个目标。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the goat moves at least 20 ft. straight toward a target and then hits it with a ram attack on the same turn, the target takes an extra 5 (2d4) bludgeoning damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 13 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.
ast.target: 如果山羊以直线向目标移动至少20尺，并在同一回合用冲撞攻击命中它，目标额外受到5（2d4）点钝击伤害。如果目标是生物，必须通过DC 13力量豁免，否则被击倒。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The goat has advantage on Strength and Dexterity saving throws made against effects that would knock it prone.
ast.target: 山羊在对抗会使其倒地的效果时进行的力量和敏捷豁免具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (2d4 + 3) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+5，触及5尺，一个目标。命中：8（2d4 + 3）点钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the hyena reduces a creature to 0 hit points with a melee attack on its turn, the hyena can take a bonus action to move up to half its speed and make a bite attack.
ast.target: 当鬣狗在自己的回合用近战攻击将一名生物的生命值降至0时，鬣狗可以用一个奖励动作移动至多其速度的一半并进行一次咬击攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+5，触及5尺，一个目标。命中：10（2d6 + 3）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The lizard can hold its breath for 15 minutes. (A lizard that has this trait also has a swimming speed of 30 feet.)
ast.target: 蜥蜴可以屏住呼吸15分钟。（具有该特性的蜥蜴还具有30尺游泳速度。）

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The lizard can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.
ast.target: 蜥蜴可以攀爬困难表面，包括在天花板上倒挂行走，无需进行属性检定。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While out of water, the octopus can hold its breath for 1 hour.
ast.target: 章鱼在离水时可以屏住呼吸1小时。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The octopus has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks made while underwater.
ast.target: 章鱼在水下进行的敏捷（隐匿）检定具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The octopus can breathe only underwater.
ast.target: 章鱼只能在水下呼吸。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) bludgeoning damage. If the target is a creature, it is grappled (escape DC 16). Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained, and the octopus can't use its tentacles on another target.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+5，触及15尺，单一目标。命中：10（2d6 + 3）钝击伤害。如果目标是生物，则被擒抱（逃脱DC 16）。在该擒抱结束前，目标被束缚，章鱼不能用触手攻击另一个目标。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A 20-foot-radius cloud of ink extends all around the octopus if it is underwater. The area is heavily obscured for 1 minute, although a significant current can disperse the ink. After releasing the ink, the octopus can use the Dash action as a bonus action.
ast.target: 若章鱼在水下，一团半径20尺的墨云向其周围扩散。该区域在1分钟内处于重度遮蔽，尽管强劲水流可驱散墨汁。释放墨汁后，章鱼可以附赠动作使用疾走动作。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The owl has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on hearing or sight.
ast.target: 猫头鹰在依赖听觉或视觉的感知（察觉）检定上具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (2d6 + 1) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+3，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：8（2d6 + 1）挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d4 + 4) piercing damage, and the target must make a DC 11 Constitution saving throw, taking 10 (3d6) poison damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+6，触及10尺，单一目标。命中：6（1d4 + 4）穿刺伤害，且目标必须进行DC 11体质豁免，失败则受到10（3d6）毒素伤害，成功则伤害减半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The rat has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on smell.
ast.target: 老鼠在依赖嗅觉的感知（察觉）检定上具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The rat has advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the rat's allies is within 5 ft. of the creature and the ally isn't incapacitated.
ast.target: 如果至少有一名老鼠的盟友在目标5尺内且该盟友未失能，则老鼠对该生物的攻击检定具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 3 (1d4 + 2) piercing damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 10 Constitution saving throw or contract a disease. Until the disease is cured, the target can't regain hit points except by magical means, and the target's hit point maximum decreases by 3 (1d6) every 24 hours. If the target's hit point maximum drops to 0 as a result of this disease, the target dies.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+4，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：3（1d4 + 2）穿刺伤害。如果目标是生物，必须成功通过DC 10体质豁免，否则感染疾病。在疾病治愈前，目标除非通过魔法手段无法恢复生命值，且其生命值上限每24小时减少3（1d6）。如果该疾病导致目标生命值上限降至0，目标死亡。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d8 + 2) bludgeoning damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 12). The scorpion has two claws, each of which can grapple only one target.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+4，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：6（1d8 + 2）钝击伤害，且目标被擒抱（逃脱DC 12）。蝎子有两只钳子，每只只能擒抱一个目标。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The scorpion makes three attacks: two with its claws and one with its sting.
ast.target: 蝎子进行三次攻击：两次使用钳子，一次使用毒刺。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 7 (1d10 + 2) piercing damage, and the target must make a DC 12 Constitution saving throw, taking 22 (4d10) poison damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+4，触及5尺，单一生物。命中：7（1d10 + 2）穿刺伤害，且目标必须进行DC 12体质豁免，失败则受到22（4d10）毒素伤害，成功则伤害减半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the sea horse moves at least 20 ft. straight toward a target and then hits it with a ram attack on the same turn, the target takes an extra 7 (2d6) bludgeoning damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 11 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.
ast.target: 如果海马直线向目标移动至少20尺并在同一回合以冲撞攻击命中，目标额外受到7（2d6）钝击伤害。如果目标是生物，必须成功通过DC 11力量豁免，否则倒地。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The sea horse can breathe only underwater.
ast.target: 海马只能在水下呼吸。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d6 + 1) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+3，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：4（1d6 + 1）钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The shark has advantage on melee attack rolls against any creature that doesn't have all its hit points.
ast.target: 鲨鱼对任何未满生命值的生物进行近战攻击检定时具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The shark can breathe only underwater.
ast.target: 鲨鱼只能在水下呼吸。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 22 (3d10 + 6) piercing damage.
ast.target: 武器攻击：命中+9，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：22（3d10 + 6）穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The spider can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.
ast.target: 蜘蛛可以攀爬困难表面，包括在天花板上倒挂行走，而无需进行属性检定。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While in contact with a web, the spider knows the exact location of any other creature in contact with the same web.
ast.target: 与蛛网接触时，蜘蛛知道任何与同一蛛网接触的其他生物的准确位置。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) piercing damage, and the target must make a DC 11 Constitution saving throw, taking 9 (2d8) poison damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. If the poison damage reduces the target to 0 hit points, the target is stable but poisoned for 1 hour, even after regaining hit points, and is paralyzed while poisoned in this way.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+5，触及5尺，单一生物。命中：7（1d8 + 3）穿刺伤害，且目标必须进行DC 11体质豁免，失败则受到9（2d8）毒素伤害，成功则伤害减半。如果毒素伤害将目标降至0生命值，目标稳定但中毒1小时，即使恢复生命值后仍如此，并在以这种方式中毒时陷入麻痹。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Ranged Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, range 30/60 ft., one creature. Hit: The target is restrained by webbing. As an action, the restrained target can make a DC 12 Strength check, bursting the webbing on a success. The webbing can also be attacked and destroyed (AC 10; hp 5; vulnerability to fire damage; immunity to bludgeoning, poison, and psychic damage).
ast.target: 远程武器攻击：命中+5，射程30/60尺，单一生物。命中：目标被蛛网束缚。作为一个动作，被束缚的目标可以进行DC 12力量检定，成功则挣破蛛网。蛛网也可以被攻击并摧毁（AC 10；hp 5；对火焰伤害易受；对钝击、毒素和心灵伤害免疫）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The toad can breathe air and water
ast.target: 蟾蜍可以呼吸空气和水

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The toad's long jump is up to 20 ft. and its high jump is up to 10 ft., with or without a running start.
ast.target: 蟾蜍的跳远最多20尺，跳高最多10尺，无论是否助跑。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d10 + 2) piercing damage plus 5 (1d10) poison damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 13). Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained, and the toad can't bite another target.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+4，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：7（1d10 + 2）穿刺伤害外加5（1d10）毒素伤害，且目标被擒抱（逃脱DC 13）。在该擒抱结束前，目标被束缚，蟾蜍不能咬另一个目标。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The vulture has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight or smell.
ast.target: 秃鹫在依赖视觉或嗅觉的感知（察觉）检定上具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The vulture has advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the vulture's allies is within 5 ft. of the creature and the ally isn't incapacitated.
ast.target: 若秃鹫的至少一名盟友在该生物5英尺内且未陷入无力状态，则秃鹫对该生物的攻击掷骰具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The vulture makes two attacks: one with its beak and one with its talons.
ast.target: 秃鹫进行两次攻击：一次用喙，一次用爪。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (2d6 + 2) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+4，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：9（2d6 + 2）点挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Sting. Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) piercing damage, and the target must make a DC 11 Constitution saving throw, taking 10 (3d6) poison damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. If the poison damage reduces the target to 0 hit points, the target is stable but poisoned for 1 hour, even after regaining hit points, and is paralyzed while poisoned in this way.
ast.target: 蜇刺。近战武器攻击：命中+4，触及5英尺，单一生物。命中：5（1d6 + 2）点穿刺伤害，且目标必须进行DC 11体质豁免，豁免失败则受到10（3d6）点毒素伤害，成功则伤害减半。若该毒素伤害使目标降至0生命值，目标进入稳定状态但中毒1小时，即使恢复生命值亦然，并在以此方式中毒期间陷入麻痹。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The weasel has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on hearing or smell.
ast.target: 鼬在依赖听觉或嗅觉的感知（感知）检定上具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d4 + 3) piercing damage.
ast.target: 武器攻击：命中+5，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：5（1d4 + 3）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 4 (1d6 + 1) piercing damage, and the target must make a DC 11 Constitution saving throw, taking 7 (2d6) poison damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. If the poison damage reduces the target to 0 hit points, the target is stable but poisoned for 1 hour, even after regaining hit points, and is paralyzed while poisoned in this way.
ast.target: 武器攻击：命中+3，触及5英尺，单一生物。命中：4（1d6 + 1）点穿刺伤害，且目标必须进行DC 11体质豁免，豁免失败则受到7（2d6）点毒素伤害，成功则伤害减半。若该毒素伤害使目标降至0生命值，目标进入稳定状态但中毒1小时，即使恢复生命值亦然，并在以此方式中毒期间陷入麻痹。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The ground in a 10-foot radius around the mouther is doughlike difficult terrain. Each creature that starts its turn in that area must succeed on a DC 10 Strength saving throw or have its speed reduced to 0 until the start of its next turn.
ast.target: mouther周围10英尺半径内的地面为面团般的困难地形。任何在该区域内开始其回合的生物都必须通过DC 10力量豁免，否则其速度在其下个回合开始前降为0。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The gibbering mouther makes one bite attack and, if it can, uses its Blinding Spittle.
ast.target: 胡言乱语者进行一次啃咬攻击，并且若可行则使用其致盲唾液。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +2 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 17 (5d6) piercing damage. If the target is Medium or smaller, it must succeed on a DC 10 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone. If the target is killed by this damage, it is absorbed into the mouther.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+2，触及5英尺，单一生物。命中：17（5d6）点穿刺伤害。若目标为中型或更小，必须通过DC 10力量豁免，否则被击倒。若目标被此伤害杀死，它会被吸收进mouther。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
The glabrezu's spellcasting ability is Intelligence (spell save DC 16). The glabrezu can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:
At will: darkness, detect magic, dispel magic
1/day each: confusion, fly, power word stun
ast.target:
格拉布雷祖的施法能力为智力（法术豁免DC 16）。格拉布雷祖可天生施展以下法术，且不需要材料成分：
随意：darkness, detect magic, dispel magic
每种每日1次：confusion, fly, power word stun

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The glabrezu has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.
ast.target: 格拉布雷祖对抗法术及其他魔法效果的豁免具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The glabrezu makes four attacks: two with its pincers and two with its fists. Alternatively, it makes two attacks with its pincers and casts one spell.
ast.target: 格拉布雷祖进行四次攻击：两次用螯，一次用拳。或者，它用螯进行两次攻击并施放一个法术。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 16 (2d10 + 5) bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it is grappled (escape DC 15). The glabrezu has two pincers, each of which can grapple only one target.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+9，触及10英尺，单一目标。命中：16（2d10 + 5）点钝击伤害。若目标为中型或更小生物，则被擒抱（逃脱DC 15）。格拉布雷祖有两只螯，每只只能擒抱一个目标。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (2d4 + 2) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+9，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：7（2d4 + 2）点钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The gladiator has advantage on saving throws against being frightened.
ast.target: 角斗士对抗恐惧状态的豁免具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A melee weapon deals one extra die of its damage when the gladiator hits with it (included in the attack).
ast.target: 当角斗士用近战武器命中时，该武器造成额外一枚伤害骰（已计入该攻击中）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The gladiator makes three melee attacks or two ranged attacks.
ast.target: 角斗士进行三次近战攻击或两次远程攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft. and range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) piercing damage, or 13 (2d8 + 4) piercing damage if used with two hands to make a melee attack.
ast.target: 近战或远程武器攻击：命中+7，触及5英尺且射程20/60英尺，单一目标。命中：11（2d6 + 4）点穿刺伤害；若用双手进行近战攻击，则为13（2d8 + 4）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 9 (2d4 + 4) bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it must succeed on a DC 15 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+7，触及5英尺，单一生物。命中：9（2d4 + 4）点钝击伤害。若目标为中型或更小生物，必须通过DC 15力量豁免，否则被击倒。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The gladiator adds 3 to its AC against one melee attack that would hit it. To do so, the gladiator must see the attacker and be wielding a melee weapon.
ast.target: 角斗士对一次将命中它的近战攻击的AC加值为+3。为此，角斗士必须看见攻击者并正持近战武器。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the gnoll reduces a creature to 0 hit points with a melee attack on its turn, the gnoll can take a bonus action to move up to half its speed and make a bite attack.
ast.target: 当豺狼人在其回合内用近战攻击将一名生物降至0生命值时，豺狼人可用一个额外动作移动至多其速度的一半并进行一次啃咬攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+4，触及5英尺，单一生物。命中：4（1d4 + 2）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) piercing damage, or 6 (1d8 + 2) piercing damage if used with two hands to make a melee attack.
ast.target: 近战或远程武器攻击：命中+4，触及5英尺或射程20/60英尺，单一目标。命中：5（1d6 + 2）点穿刺伤害；若用双手进行近战攻击，则为6（1d8 + 2）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Ranged Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, range 150/600 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d8 + 1) piercing damage.
ast.target: 远程武器攻击：命中+3，射程150/600英尺，单一目标。命中：5（1d8 + 1）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the goat moves at least 20 ft. straight toward a target and then hits it with a ram attack on the same turn, the target takes an extra 2 (1d4) bludgeoning damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 10 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.
ast.target: 如果山羊至少直线移动20英尺朝向一个目标，并在同一回合用撞击攻击命中该目标，则目标额外受到2（1d4）点钝击伤害。如果目标是生物，它必须通过DC 10力量豁免，否则被击倒。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 3 (1d4 + 1) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+3，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：3（1d4 + 1）点钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The goblin can take the Disengage or Hide action as a bonus action on each of its turns.
ast.target: 地精在其每个回合都可以以一个奖励动作执行脱离或隐藏动作。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, range 80/320 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) piercing damage.
ast.target: 远程武器攻击：命中+4，射程80/320英尺，单一目标。命中：5（1d6 + 2）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (1d10 + 4) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+6，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：9（1d10 + 4）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
The dragon uses one of the following breath weapons.
Fire Breath. The dragon exhales fire in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw, taking 22 (4d10) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
Weakening Breath. The dragon exhales gas in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in that area must succeed on a DC 13 Strength saving throw or have disadvantage on Strength-based attack rolls, Strength checks, and Strength saving throws for 1 minute. A creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.
ast.target:
巨龙使用以下一种吐息武器。
火焰吐息。巨龙在15英尺锥形范围内喷吐火焰。该区域内的每个生物必须进行DC 13敏捷豁免，豁免失败则受到22（4d10）点火焰伤害，成功则伤害减半。
衰弱吐息。巨龙在15英尺锥形范围内喷吐气体。该区域内的每个生物必须通过DC 13力量豁免，否则在1分钟内其基于力量的攻击检定、力量检定和力量豁免具有劣势。生物可以在其每个回合结束时重复该豁免，成功则结束自身效果。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the gorgon moves at least 20 feet straight toward a creature and then hits it with a gore attack on the same turn, that target must succeed on a DC 16 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone. If the target is prone, the gorgon can make one attack with its hooves against it as a bonus action.
ast.target: 如果石化牛至少直线移动20英尺朝向一个生物，并在同一回合用角刺攻击命中它，则该目标必须通过DC 16力量豁免，否则被击倒。如果目标处于倒地状态，石化牛可以以奖励动作用蹄子对其进行一次攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 18 (2d12 + 5) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+8，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：18（2d12 + 5）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 16 (2d10 + 5) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+8，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：16（2d10 + 5）点钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The gorgon exhales petrifying gas in a 30-foot cone. Each creature in that area must succeed on a DC 13 Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, a target begins to turn to stone and is restrained. The restrained target must repeat the saving throw at the end of its next turn. On a success, the effect ends on the target. On a failure, the target is petrified until freed by the greater restoration spell or other magic.
ast.target: 石化牛在30英尺锥形范围内喷吐石化气体。该区域内的每个生物必须通过DC 13体质豁免。豁免失败则目标开始石化并陷入束缚状态。被束缚的目标必须在其下个回合结束时重复该豁免。成功则效果在目标身上结束；失败则目标被石化，直到被高等复原术或其他魔法解救。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The ooze can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing.
ast.target: 软泥怪可以穿过最窄仅1英寸宽的空间而无需挤压。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
Any nonmagical weapon made of metal that hits the ooze corrodes. After dealing damage, the weapon takes a permanent and cumulative -1 penalty to damage rolls. If its penalty drops to -5, the weapon is destroyed. Nonmagical ammunition made of metal that hits the ooze is destroyed after dealing damage.
The ooze can eat through 2-inch-thick, nonmagical metal in 1 round.
ast.target:
任何由金属制成并命中软泥怪的非魔法武器都会被腐蚀。造成伤害后，该武器的伤害掷骰承受永久且可累积的-1惩罚；若惩罚降至-5，武器被摧毁。由金属制成并命中软泥怪的非魔法弹药在造成伤害后会被摧毁。
软泥怪可以在1个回合内腐蚀穿透2英寸厚的非魔法金属。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d6 + 1) bludgeoning damage plus 7 (2d6) acid damage, and if the target is wearing nonmagical metal armor, its armor is partly corroded and takes a permanent and cumulative -1 penalty to the AC it offers. The armor is destroyed if the penalty reduces its AC to 10.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+3 命中，触及 5 英尺，单一目标。命中：4（1d6 + 1）钝击伤害，外加 7（2d6）酸性伤害；若目标穿着非魔法金属护甲，其护甲会被部分腐蚀，并对其提供的 AC 造成永久且可累积的 -1 惩罚。若该惩罚使其 AC 降至 10，则护甲被毁。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d10 + 2) piercing damage plus 3 (1d6) poison damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+4 命中，触及 5 英尺，单一目标。命中：7（1d10 + 2）穿刺伤害，外加 3（1d6）毒素伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The dragon exhales poisonous gas in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 11 Constitution saving throw, taking 21 (6d6) poison damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
ast.target: 巨龙在 15 英尺锥形区域内喷吐毒气。该区域内每个生物必须进行 DC 11 的体质豁免，失败则受到 21（6d6）毒素伤害，成功则伤害减半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The hag can breathe air and water.
ast.target: 女巫可以在空气和水中呼吸。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
The hag's innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 12). She can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

At will: dancing lights, minor illusion, vicious mockery
ast.target:
女巫的天生施法能力为魅力（法术豁免 DC 12）。她可天生施展以下法术，无需材料成分：

随意施展：舞光术、次级幻影、恶言相讥

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The hag can mimic animal sounds and humanoid voices. A creature that hears the sounds can tell they are imitations with a successful DC 14 Wisdom (Insight) check.
ast.target: 女巫可以模仿动物叫声和类人生物的声音。听到这些声音的生物若成功通过 DC 14 的感知（洞悉）检定，即可辨别为模仿。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
When hags must work together, they form covens, in spite of their selfish natures. A coven is made up of hags of any type, all of whom are equals within the group. However, each of the hags continues to desire more personal power.
A coven consists of three hags so that any arguments between two hags can be settled by the third. If more than three hags ever come together, as might happen if two covens come into conflict, the result is usually chaos.
ast.target:
当女巫必须合作时，尽管她们天性自私，仍会组成集会。集会由任意类型的女巫组成，彼此在团体中地位平等。然而，每位女巫仍渴望更多个人力量。
一个集会由三名女巫构成，这样两名女巫之间的争执可由第三名裁决。若超过三名女巫聚在一起，如两支集会发生冲突时常见，其结果通常是混乱。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 13 (2d8 + 4) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+6 命中，触及 5 英尺，单一目标。命中：13（2d8 + 4）挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
The hag covers herself and anything she is wearing or carrying with a magical illusion that makes her look like another creature of her general size and humanoid shape. The illusion ends if the hag takes a bonus action to end it or if she dies.
The changes wrought by this effect fail to hold up to physical inspection. For example, the hag could appear to have smooth skin, but someone touching her would feel her rough flesh. Otherwise, a creature must take an action to visually inspect the illusion and succeed on a DC 20 Intelligence (Investigation) check to discern that the hag is disguised.
ast.target:
女巫用魔法幻象覆盖自身及其穿戴或携带的物品，使她看起来像另一种与其体型相近、外形为类人的生物。若女巫以一个附赠动作结束该幻象或死亡，幻象即终止。
此效果造成的改变无法经受身体检查。例如，女巫看似皮肤光滑，但触碰她的人会感觉到她粗糙的皮肤。否则，生物必须花费一个动作进行视觉检查，并通过 DC 20 的智力（调查）检定，才能识破女巫的伪装。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The hag magically turns invisible until she attacks or casts a spell, or until her concentration ends (as if concentrating on a spell). While invisible, she leaves no physical evidence of her passage, so she can be tracked only by magic. Any equipment she wears or carries is invisible with her.
ast.target: 女巫以魔法变为隐形，直到她攻击或施放法术，或她的专注结束（如同维持专注法术）。隐形时，她不会留下任何经过的物理痕迹，因此只能通过魔法追踪。她所穿戴或携带的任何装备也会随她一起隐形。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The grick has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks made to hide in rocky terrain.
ast.target: 格里克在岩石地形中进行隐藏的敏捷（潜行）检定时具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The grick makes one attack with its tentacles. If that attack hits, the grick can make one beak attack against the same target.
ast.target: 格里克用其触手进行一次攻击。若该攻击命中，格里克可以对同一目标进行一次喙攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The griffon has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.
ast.target: 狮鹫在依赖视觉的感知（察觉）检定上具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The griffon makes two attacks: one with its beak and one with its claws.
ast.target: 狮鹫进行两次攻击：一次用喙，一次用爪。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+6 命中，触及 5 英尺，单一目标。命中：8（1d8 + 4）穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+6，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：11（2d6 + 4）点挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The grimlock can't use its blindsight while deafened and unable to smell.
ast.target: 灰矮怪在耳聋且无法嗅闻时无法使用其盲视。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The grimlock has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on hearing or smell.
ast.target: 灰矮怪在依赖听觉或嗅觉的感知（感知）检定上具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The grimlock has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks made to hide in rocky terrain.
ast.target: 灰矮怪在岩石地形中进行用于隐藏的敏捷（潜行）检定时具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d4 + 3) bludgeoning damage plus 2 (1d4) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+5，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：5（1d4 + 3）点钝击伤害外加2（1d4）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d6 + 1) piercing damage or 5 (1d8 + 1) piercing damage if used with two hands to make a melee attack.
ast.target: 近战或远程武器攻击：命中+3，触及5英尺或射程20/60英尺，单一目标。命中：4（1d6 + 1）点穿刺伤害；若双手用于近战攻击，则为5（1d8 + 1）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If it dies, the naga returns to life in 1d6 days and regains all its hit points. Only a wish spell can prevent this trait from functioning.
ast.target: 若其死亡，那伽会在1d6天后复活并恢复全部生命值。只有祈愿术能阻止此特性生效。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 10 ft., one creature. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) piercing damage, and the target must make a DC 15 Constitution saving throw, taking 45 (10d8) poison damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+8，触及10英尺，单一生物。命中：8（1d8 + 4）点穿刺伤害，且目标必须进行DC 15体质豁免检定，失败则受到45（10d8）点毒素伤害，成功则伤害减半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Ranged Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, range 15/30 ft., one creature. Hit: The target must make a DC 15 Constitution saving throw, taking 45 (10d8) poison damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
ast.target: 远程武器攻击：命中+8，射程15/30英尺，单一生物。命中：目标必须进行DC 15体质豁免检定，失败则受到45（10d8）点毒素伤害，成功则伤害减半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 13 (2d8 + 4) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+9，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：13（2d8 + 4）点挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The veteran makes two longsword attacks. If it has a shortsword drawn, it can also make a shortsword attack.
ast.target: 老兵进行两次长剑攻击。若其已拔出短剑，还可进行一次短剑攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) slashing damage, or 8 (1d10 + 3) slashing damage if used with two hands.
ast.target: 武器攻击：命中+5，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：7（1d8 + 3）点挥砍伤害；若双手使用，则为8（1d10 + 3）点挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Ranged Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, range 100/400 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d10 + 1) piercing damage.
ast.target: 远程武器攻击：命中+3，射程100/400英尺，单一目标。命中：6（1d10 + 1）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The veteran exhales fire in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw, taking 24 (7d6) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
ast.target: 老兵在15英尺锥形范围内喷吐火焰。该区域内的每个生物必须进行DC 15敏捷豁免检定，失败则受到24（7d6）点火焰伤害，成功则伤害减半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The harpy makes two attacks: one with its claws and one with its club.
ast.target: 鹰身女妖进行两次攻击：一次用其爪，一次用其木棒。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
The harpy sings a magical melody. Every humanoid and giant within 300 ft. of the harpy that can hear the song must succeed on a DC 11 Wisdom saving throw or be charmed until the song ends. The harpy must take a bonus action on its subsequent turns to continue singing. It can stop singing at any time. The song ends if the harpy is incapacitated.
While charmed by the harpy, a target is incapacitated and ignores the songs of other harpies. If the charmed target is more than 5 ft. away from the harpy, the must move on its turn toward the harpy by the most direct route. It doesn't avoid opportunity attacks, but before moving into damaging terrain, such as lava or a pit, and whenever it takes damage from a source other than the harpy, a target can repeat the saving throw. A creature can also repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns. If a creature's saving throw is successful, the effect ends on it.
A target that successfully saves is immune to this harpy's song for the next 24 hours.
ast.target:
鹰身女妖唱出一段魔法旋律。所有在其300 ft.内且能听见歌声的类人生物与巨人类必须通过一次DC 11感知豁免检定，否则在歌声结束前陷入魅惑。鹰身女妖必须在其后续回合以附赠动作继续歌唱。它可以随时停止歌唱。若鹰身女妖失能，歌声即结束。
当被鹰身女妖魅惑时，目标失能并忽视其他鹰身女妖的歌声。若被魅惑的目标距离鹰身女妖超过5 ft.，它必须在其回合沿最直接路线向鹰身女妖移动。它不会躲避借机攻击，但在进入熔岩或深坑等危险地形前，以及每当其受到非鹰身女妖来源的伤害时，目标可以重复进行该豁免检定。生物也可以在其每个回合结束时重复进行该豁免检定。若生物的豁免检定成功，该效果在其身上结束。
成功豁免的目标在接下来的24小时内免疫此鹰身女妖的歌声。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 1 slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+5，触及5 ft.，一个目标。命中：1点挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The hound has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on hearing or smell.
ast.target: 该猎犬在依赖听觉或嗅觉的感知（察觉）检定上具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The hound has advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the hound's allies is within 5 ft. of the creature and the ally isn't incapacitated.
ast.target: 若该猎犬至少有一名盟友在目标生物5 ft.内且该盟友未失能，则该猎犬对该生物的攻击检定具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) fire damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+5，触及5 ft.，一个目标。命中：7（1d8 + 3）点穿刺伤害外加7（2d6）点火焰伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The hound exhales fire in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 12 Dexterity saving throw, taking 21 (6d6) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
ast.target: 该猎犬以15英尺锥形喷吐火焰。该区域内的每个生物必须进行一次DC 12敏捷豁免检定，失败则受到21（6d6）点火焰伤害，成功则伤害减半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The hezrou has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.
ast.target: 该赫兹罗斯对抗法术及其他魔法效果的豁免检定具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Any creature that starts its turn within 10 feet of the hezrou must succeed on a DC 14 Constitution saving throw or be poisoned until the start of its next turn. On a successful saving throw, the creature is immune to the hezrou's stench for 24 hours.
ast.target: 任何在赫兹罗斯10英尺内开始其回合的生物必须通过一次DC 14体质豁免检定，否则将中毒，持续至其下一回合开始。若豁免检定成功，该生物在接下来的24小时内免疫赫兹罗斯的恶臭。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The hezrou makes three attacks: one with its bite and two with its claws.
ast.target: 赫兹罗发动三次攻击：一次用它的撕咬，两次用它的爪击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 15 (2d10 + 4) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+7 命中，触及 5 尺，单一目标。命中：15（2d10 + 4）穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The giant makes two greatclub attacks.
ast.target: 巨人发动两次巨棒攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 18 (3d8 + 5) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+8 命中，触及 10 尺，单一目标。命中：18（3d8 + 5）钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Ranged Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, range 60/240 ft., one target. Hit: 21 (3d10 + 5) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 远程武器攻击：+8 命中，射程 60/240 尺，单一目标。命中：21（3d10 + 5）钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The hippogriff has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.
ast.target: 当依赖视觉进行感知（Perception）检定时，骏鹰具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The hippogriff makes two attacks: one with its beak and one with its claws.
ast.target: 骏鹰发动两次攻击：一次用它的喙，一次用它的爪击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Once per turn, the hobgoblin can deal an extra 7 (2d6) damage to a creature it hits with a weapon attack if that creature is within 5 ft. of an ally of the hobgoblin that isn't incapacitated.
ast.target: 每回合一次，若该生物位于一个未失能的熊地精盟友 5 尺内，熊地精用武器攻击命中时可对其造成额外 7（2d6）点伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d8 + 1) slashing damage, or 6 (1d10 + 1) slashing damage if used with two hands.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+3 命中，触及 5 尺，单一目标。命中：5（1d8 + 1）挥砍伤害；若双手持用，则为 6（1d10 + 1）挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While the homunculus is on the same plane of existence as its master, it can magically convey what it senses to its master, and the two can communicate telepathically.
ast.target: 当人造仆与其主人处于同一存在位面时，它可以将所感知的内容以魔法传达给主人，二者可进行心灵感应交流。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 1 piercing damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 10 Constitution saving throw or be poisoned for 1 minute. If the saving throw fails by 5 or more, the target is instead poisoned for 5 (1d10) minutes and unconscious while poisoned in this way.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+4 命中，触及 5 尺，单一生物。命中：1 点穿刺伤害，且目标必须通过 DC 10 体质豁免，否则中毒 1 分钟。若豁免失败差值达到 5 或更多，则目标改为中毒 5（1d10）分钟，并在以这种方式中毒时陷入昏迷。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The devil makes three melee attacks: two with its fork and one with its tail. It can use Hurl Flame in place of any melee attack.
ast.target: 该恶魔进行三次近战攻击：两次用它的叉击，一次用它的尾击。它可以用 Hurl Flame 替代任意一次近战攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 15 (2d8 + 6) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+10 命中，触及 10 尺，单一目标。命中：15（2d8 + 6）穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (1d8 + 6) piercing damage. If the target is a creature other than an undead or a construct, it must succeed on a DC 17 Constitution saving throw or lose 10 (3d6) hit points at the start of each of its turns due to an infernal wound. Each time the devil hits the wounded target with this attack, the damage dealt by the wound increases by 10 (3d6). Any creature can take an action to stanch the wound with a successful DC 12 Wisdom (Medicine) check. The wound also closes if the target receives magical healing.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+10 命中，触及 10 尺，单一目标。命中：10（1d8 + 6）穿刺伤害。若目标为非亡灵或构装体的生物，则必须通过 DC 17 体质豁免，否则因炼狱创伤在其每个回合开始时失去 10（3d6）生命值。每当该恶魔用此攻击命中已受创目标时，创伤造成的伤害增加 10（3d6）。任何生物都可以用一个动作进行一次成功的 DC 12 感知（医学）检定以止血。若目标受到魔法治疗，该创伤也会闭合。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Ranged Spell Attack: +7 to hit, range 150 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (4d6) fire damage. If the target is a flammable object that isn't being worn or carried, it also catches fire.
ast.target: 远程法术攻击：+7 命中，射程 150 尺，单一目标。命中：14（4d6）火焰伤害。若目标为未被穿戴或携带的可燃物体，则其也会着火。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 13 (2d8 + 4) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+6 命中，触及 5 尺，单一目标。命中：13（2d8 + 4）穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The hydra can hold its breath for 1 hour.
ast.target: 九头蛇可以屏息 1 小时。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
The hydra has five heads. While it has more than one head, the hydra has advantage on saving throws against being blinded, charmed, deafened, frightened, stunned, and knocked unconscious.
Whenever the hydra takes 25 or more damage in a single turn, one of its heads dies. If all its heads die, the hydra dies.
At the end of its turn, it grows two heads for each of its heads that died since its last turn, unless it has taken fire damage since its last turn. The hydra regains 10 hit points for each head regrown in this way.
ast.target:
九头蛇有五个头。当它拥有不止一个头时，九头蛇在对抗目盲、魅惑、耳聋、恐慌、震慑以及昏迷的豁免检定上具有优势。
每当九头蛇在单个回合内受到 25 点或更多伤害时，它的一个头会死亡。若所有头都死亡，九头蛇死亡。
在其回合结束时，它会为自上个回合以来死亡的每个头长出两个新头，除非它自上个回合以来受到过火焰伤害。九头蛇以这种方式每长出一个头就恢复 10 点生命值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: For each head the hydra has beyond one, it gets an extra reaction that can be used only for opportunity attacks.
ast.target: 九头蛇每多一个头，就获得一个额外的反应，该反应只能用于借机攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While the hydra sleeps, at least one of its heads is awake.
ast.target: 当九头蛇睡眠时，至少有一个头是清醒的。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The hydra makes as many bite attacks as it has heads.
ast.target: 九头蛇进行与其头数相同次数的撕咬攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (1d10 + 5) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+8 命中，触及 10 尺，单一目标。命中：10（1d10 + 5）穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The hyena has advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the hyena's allies is within 5 ft. of the creature and the ally isn't incapacitated.
ast.target: 若鬣狗的至少一名盟友位于该生物 5 尺内且未失能，鬣狗对该生物的攻击检定具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Weapon Attack: +2 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 3 (1d6) piercing damage.
ast.target: 武器攻击：+2 命中，触及 5 尺，单一目标。命中：3（1d6）穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The devil makes three attacks: one with its bite, one with its claws, and one with its tail.
ast.target: 该恶魔发动三次攻击：一次用它的撕咬，一次用它的爪击，以及一次用它的尾击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 12 (2d6 + 5) piercing damage plus 10 (3d6) cold damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+10，触及5 ft.，一个目标。命中：12（2d6 + 5）点穿刺伤害外加10（3d6）点寒冷伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (2d4 + 5) slashing damage plus 10 (3d6) cold damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+10，触及5 ft.，一个目标。命中：10（2d4 + 5）点挥砍伤害外加10（3d6）点寒冷伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack:+10 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 12 (2d6 + 5) bludgeoning damage plus 10 (3d6) cold damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+10，触及10 ft.，一个目标。命中：12（2d6 + 5）点钝击伤害外加10（3d6）点寒冷伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the mephit dies, it explodes in a burst of jagged ice. Each creature within 5 ft. of it must make a DC 10 Dexterity saving throw, taking 4 (1d8) slashing damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
ast.target: 当小劣魔死亡时，它会爆裂成一团尖锐的冰。其5 ft.内的每个生物必须进行一次DC 10敏捷豁免检定，失败则受到4（1d8）点挥砍伤害，成功则伤害减半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The mephit can innately cast fog cloud, requiring no material components. Its innate spellcasting ability is Charisma.
ast.target: 该小劣魔可天生施放云雾术，无需材料成分。其天生施法属性为魅力。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 3 (1d4 + 1) slashing damage plus 2 (1d4) cold damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+3，触及5 ft.，一个生物。命中：3（1d4 + 1）点挥砍伤害外加2（1d4）点寒冷伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The mephit exhales a 15-foot cone of cold air. Each creature in that area must succeed on a DC 10 Dexterity saving throw, taking 5 (2d4) cold damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
ast.target: 该小劣魔喷吐15英尺锥形的寒冷气流。该区域内的每个生物必须通过一次DC 10敏捷豁免检定，失败则受到5（2d4）点寒冷伤害，成功则伤害减半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Magical darkness doesn't impede the imp's darkvision.
ast.target: 魔法黑暗不会阻碍小魔鬼的黑暗视觉。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The imp has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.
ast.target: 小魔鬼在对抗法术和其他魔法效果的豁免检定上具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The imp can serve another creature as a familiar, forming a telepathic bond with its willing master. While the two are bonded, the master can sense what the quasit senses as long as they are within 1 mile of each other. While the imp is within 10 feet of its master, the master shares the quasit's Magic Resistance trait. At any time and for any reason, the imp can end its service as a familiar, ending the telepathic bond.
ast.target: 小魔鬼可以作为魔宠为另一生物服务，与其自愿的主人形成心灵感应纽带。两者维系纽带时，只要彼此相距不超过1英里，主人就能感知夸塞魔所感知到的事物。当小魔鬼在主人10英尺范围内时，主人共享夸塞魔的魔法抗性特性。无论何时、出于任何原因，小魔鬼都可以终止其作为魔宠的服务，从而结束心灵感应纽带。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft ., one target. Hit: 5 (1d4 + 3) piercing damage, and the target must make on a DC 11 Constitution saving throw, taking 10 (3d6) poison damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+5命中，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：5（1d4 + 3）点穿刺伤害，且目标必须进行DC 11体质豁免，豁免失败则受到10（3d6）点毒素伤害，成功则伤害减半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The imp magically turns invisible until it attacks, or until its concentration ends (as if concentrating on a spell). Any equipment the imp wears or carries is invisible with it.
ast.target: 小魔鬼以魔法变为隐形，直到它发动攻击，或其专注结束（如同对法术进行专注）。小魔鬼穿戴或携带的任何装备也随之隐形。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The stalker is invisible.
ast.target: 追踪者处于隐形状态。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The stalker makes two slam attacks.
ast.target: 追踪者进行两次重击攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+6命中，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：10（2d6 + 3）点钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +13 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 20 (3d8 + 7) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+13命中，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：20（3d8 + 7）点钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +13 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 23 (3d10 + 7) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+13命中，触及10英尺，单一目标。命中：23（3d10 + 7）点挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The jackal has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on hearing or smell.
ast.target: 豺狼在依赖听觉或嗅觉的感知（察觉）检定上具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The jackal has advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the jackal's allies is within 5 ft. of the creature and the ally isn't incapacitated.
ast.target: 若至少一名豺狼的盟友在该生物5英尺范围内且未陷入失能状态，则豺狼对该生物的攻击检定具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The whale can't use its blindsight while deafened.
ast.target: 鲸在失聪时无法使用盲视。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The whale can hold its breath for 30 minutes
ast.target: 鲸可以屏住呼吸30分钟

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The whale has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on hearing.
ast.target: 鲸在依赖听觉的感知（察觉）检定上具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 21 (5d6 + 4) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+6，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：21（5d6 + 4）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The knight has advantage on saving throws against being frightened.
ast.target: 骑士对抗恐慌效果的豁免检定具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The knight makes two melee attacks.
ast.target: 骑士进行两次近战攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Ranged Weapon Attack: +2 to hit, range 100/400 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d10) piercing damage.
ast.target: 远程武器攻击：命中+2，射程100/400英尺，单一目标。命中：5（1d10）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: For 1 minute, the knight can utter a special command or warning whenever a nonhostile creature that it can see within 30 ft. of it makes an attack roll or a saving throw. The creature can add a d4 to its roll provided it can hear and understand the knight. A creature can benefit from only one Leadership die at a time. This effect ends if the knight is incapacitated.
ast.target: 在1分钟内，当骑士能看见的30英尺内的非敌对生物进行攻击检定或豁免检定时，骑士可以发出特殊命令或警告。若该生物能听见并理解骑士，则可在其检定中加入1d4。生物同时只能受益于一个领导力骰。若骑士陷入无行动能力，该效果结束。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The knight adds 2 to its AC against one melee attack that would hit it. To do so, the knight must see the attacker and be wielding a melee weapon.
ast.target: 骑士对一次本会命中的近战攻击将其AC提高2。为此，骑士必须看见攻击者并持有近战武器。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While in sunlight, the kobold has disadvantage on attack rolls, as well as on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.
ast.target: 在阳光下，狗头人进行攻击检定具有劣势，且依赖视觉的感知（感知）检定也具有劣势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The kobold has advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the kobold's allies is within 5 ft. of the creature and the ally isn't incapacitated.
ast.target: 若目标生物5英尺内至少有一名未陷入无行动能力的狗头人盟友，狗头人对该生物的攻击检定具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, range 30/120 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 远程武器攻击：命中+4，射程30/120英尺，单一目标。命中：4（1d4 + 2）点钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The kraken can breathe air and water.
ast.target: 海妖可以在空气和水中呼吸。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The kraken deals double damage to objects and structures.
ast.target: 海妖对物体和建筑造成双倍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The kraken makes three tentacle attacks, each of which it can replace with one use of Fling.
ast.target: 海妖进行三次触手攻击，其中每次都可以替换为一次投掷。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 30 ft., one target. Hit: 20 (3d6 + 10) bludgeoning damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 18). Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained. The kraken has ten tentacles, each of which can grapple one target.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+7，触及30英尺，单一目标。命中：20（3d6 + 10）点钝击伤害，目标被擒抱（逃脱DC 18）。在擒抱结束前，目标被束缚。海妖有十条触手，每条可擒抱一个目标。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: One Large or smaller object held or creature grappled by the kraken is thrown up to 60 feet in a random direction and knocked prone. If a thrown target strikes a solid surface, the target takes 3 (1d6) bludgeoning damage for every 10 feet it was thrown. If the target is thrown at another creature, that creature must succeed on a DC 18 Dexterity saving throw or take the same damage and be knocked prone.
ast.target: 海妖抓持的一个大型或更小的物体或被擒抱的生物被朝随机方向投掷至多60英尺并倒地。若被投掷的目标撞上坚固表面，则其每被投掷10英尺受到3（1d6）点钝击伤害。若目标被投向另一生物，则该生物必须通过DC 18敏捷豁免，否则受到相同伤害并倒地。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The kraken magically creates three bolts of lightning, each of which can strike a target the kraken can see within 120 feet of it. A target must make a DC 23 Dexterity saving throw, taking 22 (4d10) lightning damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
ast.target: 海妖魔法制造三道闪电，每道可击中海妖能看见的120英尺内的一个目标。目标必须进行DC 23敏捷豁免，失败则受到22（4d10）点闪电伤害，成功则伤害减半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The kraken makes one tentacle attack or uses its Fling.
ast.target: 克拉肯进行一次触手攻击或使用其投掷。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The kraken uses Lightning Storm.
ast.target: 克拉肯使用闪电风暴。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While underwater, the kraken expels an ink cloud in a 60-foot radius. The cloud spreads around corners, and that area is heavily obscured to creatures other than the kraken. Each creature other than the kraken that ends its turn there must succeed on a DC 23 Constitution saving throw, taking 16 (3d10) poison damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. A strong current disperses the cloud, which otherwise disappears at the end of the kraken's next turn.
ast.target: 在水下时，克拉肯喷出半径60英尺的墨云。云团可绕过拐角扩散，除克拉肯外的生物在该区域内视线严重受阻。每个非克拉肯生物在该区域结束其回合时必须通过DC 23体质豁免，失败则受到16（3d10）点毒素伤害，成功则伤害减半。强水流会驱散该云团，否则它会在克拉肯下一个回合结束时消失。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The lamia's innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 13). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components. At will: disguise self (any humanoid form), major image 3/day each: charm person, mirror image, scrying, suggestion 1/day: geas
ast.target: 拉米亚的天生施法能力为魅力（法术豁免DC 13）。它可天生施放以下法术，且不需要材料成分。随意：disguise self（任何人形形态）、major image 每日3次各：charm person、mirror image、scrying、suggestion 每日1次：geas

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The lamia makes two attacks: one with its claws and one with its dagger or Intoxicating Touch.
ast.target: 拉米亚进行两次攻击：一次用其爪子，另一次用其匕首或迷醉之触。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (2d10 + 3) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+5，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：14（2d10 + 3）点挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d4 + 3) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+5，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：5（1d4 + 3）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Spell Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: The target is magically cursed for 1 hour. Until the curse ends, the target has disadvantage on Wisdom saving throws and all ability checks.
ast.target: 近战法术攻击：命中+5，触及5英尺，单一生物。命中：目标被魔法诅咒1小时。诅咒结束前，目标在感知豁免和所有属性检定上具有劣势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 2 (1d4) bludgeoning damage
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+3，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：2（1d4）点钝击伤害

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the lich fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.
ast.target: 若巫妖未能通过豁免，它可以选择改为成功。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If it has a phylactery, a destroyed lich gains a new body in 1d10 days, regaining all its hit points and becoming active again. The new body appears within 5 feet of the phylactery.
ast.target: 若其拥有命匣，被摧毁的巫妖将在1d10天后获得新躯体，恢复全部生命值并再次活跃。新躯体会出现在命匣5英尺内。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The lich has advantage on saving throws against any effect that turns undead.
ast.target: 巫妖对任何驱散亡灵的效果进行豁免时具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Spell Attack: +12 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 10 (3d6) cold damage. The target must succeed on a DC 18 Constitution saving throw or be paralyzed for 1 minute. The target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.
ast.target: 近战法术攻击：命中+12，触及5英尺，单一生物。命中：10（3d6）点寒冷伤害。目标必须通过DC 18体质豁免，否则瘫痪1分钟。目标可在其每个回合结束时重复该豁免，成功则终止自身效果。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The lich casts a cantrip.
ast.target: 巫妖施放一个戏法。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The lich uses its Paralyzing Touch.
ast.target: 巫妖使用其麻痹之触。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The lich fixes its gaze on one creature it can see within 10 feet of it. The target must succeed on a DC 18 Wisdom saving throw against this magic or become frightened for 1 minute. The frightened target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. If a target's saving throw is successful or the effect ends for it, the target is immune to the lich's gaze for the next 24 hours.
ast.target: 巫妖将目光锁定在其10英尺内可见的一个生物上。目标必须通过DC 18的感知豁免，否则会陷入恐惧1分钟。受惊的目标可在其每回合结束时重复该豁免，成功则自行结束该效果。如果目标的豁免成功或该效果对其结束，目标在接下来的24小时内免疫巫妖的注视。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Each living creature within 20 feet of the lich must make a DC 18 Constitution saving throw against this magic, taking 21 (6d6) necrotic damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
ast.target: 巫妖20英尺内的每个活体生物必须进行DC 18的体质豁免，失败则受到21（6d6）点死灵伤害，成功则受到一半伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The lion has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on smell.
ast.target: 狮子在依赖嗅觉的感知（察觉）检定上具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The lion has advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the lion's allies is within 5 ft. of the creature and the ally isn't incapacitated.
ast.target: 如果至少有一名狮子的盟友在该生物5英尺内且未失能，狮子对该生物的攻击检定具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the lion moves at least 20 ft. straight toward a creature and then hits it with a claw attack on the same turn, that target must succeed on a DC 13 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone. If the target is prone, the lion can make one bite attack against it as a bonus action.
ast.target: 如果狮子直线朝一个生物移动至少20英尺，并在同一回合用爪击命中该生物，目标必须通过DC 13的力量豁免，否则被击倒。若目标倒地，狮子可以用一个额外动作对其进行一次撕咬攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: With a 10-foot running start, the lion can long jump up to 25 ft..
ast.target: 在10英尺助跑后，狮子可进行最远25英尺的跳远。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+5，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：7（1d8 + 3）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +0 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 1 piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+0，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：1点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The lizardfolk can hold its breath for 15 minutes.
ast.target: 蜥蜴人可以憋气15分钟。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The lizardfolk makes two melee attacks, each one with a different weapon.
ast.target: 蜥蜴人进行两次近战攻击，每次使用不同的武器。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 30/120 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战或远程武器攻击：命中+4，触及5英尺或射程30/120英尺，单一目标。命中：5（1d6 + 2）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战或远程武器攻击：命中+5，触及5英尺或射程20/60英尺，单一目标。命中：4（1d4 + 2）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the mephit dies, it explodes in a burst of lava. Each creature within 5 ft. of it must make a DC 11 Dexterity saving throw, taking 7 (2d6) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
ast.target: 魔焰妖精死亡时会爆裂成一团熔岩。其5英尺内的每个生物必须进行DC 11的敏捷豁免，失败则受到7（2d6）点火焰伤害，成功则受到一半伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The mephit can innately cast heat metal (spell save DC 10), requiring no material components. Its innate spellcasting ability is Charisma.
ast.target: 魔焰妖精可以天生施放热金属（法术豁免DC 10），无需材料成分。其天生施法能力为魅力。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft ., one creature. Hit: 3 (1d4 + 1) slashing damage plus 2 (1d4) fire damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+3，触及5英尺，单一生物。命中：3（1d4 + 1）点挥砍伤害，外加2（1d4）点火焰伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The mephit exhales a 15-foot cone of fire. Each creature in that area must make a DC 11 Dexterity saving throw, taking 7 (2d6) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
ast.target: 小恶魔喷吐出一个15英尺锥形火焰。该区域内的每个生物必须进行DC 11敏捷豁免，失败则受到7（2d6）点火焰伤害，成功则伤害减半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the magmin dies, it explodes in a burst of fire and magma. Each creature within 10 ft. of it must make a DC 11 Dexterity saving throw, taking 7 (2d6) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. Flammable objects that aren't being worn or carried in that area are ignited.
ast.target: 当熔火小妖死亡时，它会在火焰与岩浆的爆裂中爆炸。距离其10英尺内的每个生物必须进行DC 11敏捷豁免，失败则受到7（2d6）点火焰伤害，成功则伤害减半。该区域内未被穿戴或携带的可燃物会被点燃。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: As a bonus action, the magmin can set itself ablaze or extinguish its flames. While ablaze, the magmin sheds bright light in a 10-foot radius and dim light for an additional 10 ft.
ast.target: 作为一个附赠动作，熔火小妖可以点燃自身或熄灭火焰。点燃时，熔火小妖在10英尺半径内发出明亮光照，并在额外10英尺范围内发出昏暗光照。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (2d6) fire damage. If the target is a creature or a flammable object, it ignites. Until a target takes an action to douse the fire, the target takes 3 (1d6) fire damage at the end of each of its turns.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+4，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：7（2d6）点火焰伤害。如果目标是生物或可燃物，则被点燃。直到目标使用一个动作扑灭火焰为止，目标在其每个回合结束时受到3（1d6）点火焰伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the mammoth moves at least 20 ft. straight toward a creature and then hits it with a gore attack on the same turn, that target must succeed on a DC 18 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone. If the target is prone, the mammoth can make one stomp attack against it as a bonus action.
ast.target: 若猛犸在同一回合内直线移动至少20英尺并以獠牙攻击命中该生物，则目标必须通过DC 18力量豁免，否则倒地。若目标倒地，猛犸可以用一个附赠动作对其进行一次践踏攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 25 (4d8 + 7) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+10，触及10英尺，单一目标。命中：25（4d8 + 7）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 5 ft., one prone creature. Hit: 29 (4d10 + 7) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+10，触及5英尺，一名倒地生物。命中：29（4d10 + 7）点钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The manticore has twenty-four tail spikes. Used spikes regrow when the manticore finishes a long rest.
ast.target: 蝎尾狮有24根尾刺。用过的尾刺在蝎尾狮完成一次长休后会再生。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The manticore makes three attacks: one with its bite and two with its claws or three with its tail spikes.
ast.target: 蝎尾狮进行三次攻击：一次啃咬与两次爪击，或三次尾刺攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Ranged Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, range 100/200 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) piercing damage.
ast.target: 远程武器攻击：命中+5，射程100/200英尺，单一目标。命中：7（1d8 + 3）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The marilith has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.
ast.target: 六臂蛇魔对抗法术和其他魔法效果的豁免检定具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The marilith's weapon attacks are magical.
ast.target: 六臂蛇魔的武器攻击为魔法攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The marilith can take one reaction on every turn in combat.
ast.target: 在战斗中，六臂蛇魔在每个回合都可以进行一次反应。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The marilith can make seven attacks: six with its longswords and one with its tail.
ast.target: 六臂蛇魔可进行七次攻击：六次长剑攻击与一次尾击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 10 ft., one creature. Hit: 15 (2d10 + 4) bludgeoning damage. If the target is Medium or smaller, it is grappled (escape DC 19). Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained, the marilith can automatically hit the target with its tail, and the marilith can't make tail attacks against other targets.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+9，触及10英尺，单一生物。命中：15（2d10 + 4）点钝击伤害。若目标为中型或更小体型，则被擒抱（逃脱DC 19）。直到擒抱结束为止，目标被束缚，六臂蛇魔可自动以尾击命中该目标，且六臂蛇魔不能对其他目标进行尾击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The marilith magically teleports, along with any equipment it is wearing or carrying, up to 120 feet to an unoccupied space it can see.
ast.target: 玛莉莉丝会施展魔法传送，连同其所穿戴或携带的所有装备，最多传送至其可见的120英尺内一处未被占据的空间。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The marilith adds 5 to its AC against one melee attack that would hit it. To do so, the marilith must see the attacker and be wielding a melee weapon.
ast.target: 玛莉莉丝对一次将命中的近战攻击的AC增加5。要这样做，玛莉莉丝必须能看见攻击者且正持握近战武器。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The mastiff has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on hearing or smell.
ast.target: 獒犬在依赖听觉或嗅觉的感知（察觉）检定上具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d6 + 1) piercing damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 11 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+3，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：4（1d6 + 1）点穿刺伤害。若目标为生物，则必须进行DC 11力量豁免，失败则被击倒倒地。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
When a creature that can see the medusa's eyes starts its turn within 30 ft. of the medusa, the medusa can force it to make a DC 14 Constitution saving throw if the medusa isn't incapacitated and can see the creature. If the saving throw fails by 5 or more, the creature is instantly petrified. Otherwise, a creature that fails the save begins to turn to stone and is restrained. The restrained creature must repeat the saving throw at the end of its next turn, becoming petrified on a failure or ending the effect on a success. The petrification lasts until the creature is freed by the greater restoration spell or other magic.
Unless surprised, a creature can avert its eyes to avoid the saving throw at the start of its turn. If the creature does so, it can't see the medusa until the start of its next turn, when it can avert its eyes again. If the creature looks at the medusa in the meantime, it must immediately make the save.
If the medusa sees itself reflected on a polished surface within 30 ft. of it and in an area of bright light, the medusa is, due to its curse, affected by its own gaze.
ast.target:
当一名能看见美杜莎双眼的生物在美杜莎30英尺内开始其回合时，若美杜莎未处于失能状态且能看见该生物，美杜莎可迫使其进行DC 14体质豁免。若豁免失败且差值为5或更多，该生物立即石化。否则，豁免失败的生物开始石化并被束缚。被束缚的生物必须在其下一回合结束时再次进行该豁免，失败则石化，成功则结束该效果。石化持续到该生物被高等复原术或其他魔法解放。
除非措手不及，生物可以在其回合开始时移开视线以避免进行该豁免。若如此做，在其下一回合开始前它无法看见美杜莎，届时它可以再次移开视线。若其在此期间看向美杜莎，必须立刻进行该豁免。
若美杜莎在其30英尺内、明亮光照区域的抛光表面上看见自身倒影，由于其诅咒，美杜莎会受到自身凝视的影响。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The medusa makes either three melee attacks —  one with its snake hair and two with its shortsword — or two ranged attacks with its longbow.
ast.target: 美杜莎进行以下其一：三次近战攻击——一次用其蛇发、两次用短剑——或用长弓进行两次远程攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) piercing damage plus 14 (4d6) poison damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+5，触及5英尺，单一生物。命中：4（1d4 + 2）点穿刺伤害外加14（4d6）点毒素伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+5，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：5（1d6 + 2）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Ranged Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, range 150/600 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d8 + 2) piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) poison damage.
ast.target: 远程武器攻击：命中+5，射程150/600英尺，单一目标。命中：6（1d8 + 2）点穿刺伤害外加7（2d6）点毒素伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The merfolk can breathe air and water.
ast.target: 人鱼可以在空气和水中呼吸。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +2 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 3 (1d6) piercing damage, or 4 (1d8) piercing damage if used with two hands to make a melee attack.
ast.target: 近战或远程武器攻击：命中+2，触及5英尺或射程20/60英尺，单一目标。命中：3（1d6）点穿刺伤害；若用双手进行近战攻击，则为4（1d8）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The merrow can breathe air and water.
ast.target: 海妖可以在空气和水中呼吸。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The merrow makes two attacks: one with its bite and one with its claws or harpoon.
ast.target: 海妖进行两次攻击：一次用咬击，另一次用爪击或鱼叉。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (2d4 + 4) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+6，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：9（2d4 + 4）点挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) piercing damage. If the target is a Huge or smaller creature, it must succeed on a Strength contest against the merrow or be pulled up to 20 feet toward the merrow.
ast.target: 近战或远程武器攻击：命中+6，触及5英尺或射程20/60英尺，单一目标。命中：11（2d6 + 4）点穿刺伤害。若目标为超巨型或更小的生物，则必须在与海妖的力量对抗中获胜，否则被拉向海妖最多20英尺。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The mimic can use its action to polymorph into an object or back into its true, amorphous form. Its statistics are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn 't transformed. It reverts to its true form if it dies.
ast.target: 拟形怪可以用其动作变形为一个物体，或变回其真实的、无定形的形态。它在每种形态下的属性相同。它所穿戴或携带的任何装备都不会被变形。若它死亡，则会变回其真实形态。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The mimic adheres to anything that touches it. A Huge or smaller creature adhered to the mimic is also grappled by it (escape DC 13). Ability checks made to escape this grapple have disadvantage.
ast.target: 拟形怪会黏附任何触碰它的东西。一个被拟形怪黏附的超巨型或更小的生物也会被其擒抱（逃脱 DC 13）。为逃脱此擒抱而进行的属性检定具有劣势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The mimic has advantage on attack rolls against any creature grappled by it.
ast.target: 拟形怪对任何被其擒抱的生物进行攻击检定时具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) bludgeoning damage. If the mimic is in object form, the target is subjected to its Adhesive trait.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中 +5，触及 5 ft.，一个目标。命中：7（1d8 + 3）钝击伤害。若拟形怪处于物体形态，目标会受到其粘附特性的影响。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) piercing damage plus 4 (1d8) acid damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中 +5，触及 5 ft.，一个目标。命中：7（1d8 + 3）穿刺伤害外加 4（1d8）酸蚀伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the minotaur moves at least 10 ft. straight toward a target and then hits it with a gore attack on the same turn, the target takes an extra 9 (2d8) piercing damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 14 Strength saving throw or be pushed up to 10 ft. away and knocked prone.
ast.target: 如果牛头怪直线朝向一个目标移动至少 10 ft.，并在同一回合用冲撞攻击命中该目标，则该目标额外受到 9（2d8）穿刺伤害。若目标是生物，它必须通过一次 DC 14 力量豁免，否则会被推开至多 10 ft. 并被击倒。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The minotaur can perfectly recall any path it has traveled.
ast.target: 牛头怪能完美回忆它走过的任何路径。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: At the start of its turn, the minotaur can gain advantage on all melee weapon attack rolls it makes during that turn, but attack rolls against it have advantage until the start of its next turn.
ast.target: 在其回合开始时，牛头怪可以在该回合进行的所有近战武器攻击检定上获得优势，但直到其下个回合开始前，针对它的攻击检定具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 17 (2d12 + 4) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中 +6，触及 5 ft.，一个目标。命中：17（2d12 + 4）挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the skeleton moves at least 10 feet straight toward a target and then hits it with a gore attack on the same turn, the target takes an extra 9 (2d8) piercing damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 14 Strength saving throw or be pushed up to 10 feet away and knocked prone.
ast.target: 如果骷髅直线朝向一个目标移动至少 10 feet，并在同一回合用冲撞攻击命中该目标，则该目标额外受到 9（2d8）穿刺伤害。若目标是生物，它必须通过一次 DC 14 力量豁免，否则会被推开至多 10 feet 并被击倒。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The mule is considered to be a Large animal for the purpose of determining its carrying capacity.
ast.target: 为了确定其负重能力，骡子被视为大型动物。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The mule has advantage on Strength and Dexterity saving throws made against effects that would knock it prone.
ast.target: 骡子在对抗会使其倒地的效果时，进行的力量和敏捷豁免具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +2 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中 +2，触及 5 ft.，一个目标。命中：4（1d4 + 2）钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The mummy can use its Dreadful Glare and makes one attack with its rotting fist.
ast.target: 木乃伊可以使用其恐怖凝视，并用其腐烂之拳进行一次攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The mummy targets one creature it can see within 60 ft. of it. If the target can see the mummy, it must succeed on a DC 11 Wisdom saving throw against this magic or become frightened until the end of the mummy's next turn. If the target fails the saving throw by 5 or more, it is also paralyzed for the same duration. A target that succeeds on the saving throw is immune to the Dreadful Glare of all mummies (but not mummy lords) for the next 24 hours.
ast.target: 木乃伊指定它在 60 ft. 内能看见的一个生物作为目标。若目标能看见木乃伊，则必须通过一次 DC 11 感知豁免以抵抗此魔法，否则会陷入恐慌，持续到木乃伊下个回合结束。若目标的豁免失败 5 点或更多，则它在同样持续时间内也会陷入麻痹。成功通过豁免的目标在接下来的 24 小时内对所有木乃伊（但不包括木乃伊领主）的恐怖凝视免疫。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The mummy lord has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.
ast.target: 木乃伊领主在对抗法术和其他魔法效果的豁免检定上具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A destroyed mummy lord gains a new body in 24 hours if its heart is intact, regaining all its hit points and becoming active again. The new body appears within 5 feet of the mummy lord's heart.
ast.target: 如果木乃伊领主的心脏完好，被摧毁后会在24小时内获得新身体，恢复全部生命值并再次活动。新身体会在其心脏5英尺内出现。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The mummy lord targets one creature it can see within 60 feet of it. If the target can see the mummy lord, it must succeed on a DC 16 Wisdom saving throw against this magic or become frightened until the end of the mummy's next turn. If the target fails the saving throw by 5 or more, it is also paralyzed for the same duration. A target that succeeds on the saving throw is immune to the Dreadful Glare of all mummies and mummy lords for the next 24 hours.
ast.target: 木乃伊领主以其60英尺内可见的一名生物为目标。若目标能看见木乃伊领主，必须通过DC 16的感知豁免，否则会在木乃伊下回合结束前陷入恐慌。若豁免失败且差值达到5或以上，目标还会在相同持续时间内麻痹。成功通过豁免的目标在接下来的24小时内免疫所有木乃伊与木乃伊领主的恐怖凝视。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The mummy lord makes one attack with its rotting fist or uses its Dreadful Glare.
ast.target: 木乃伊领主以其腐烂之拳发动一次攻击，或使用恐怖凝视。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Blinding dust and sand swirls magically around the mummy lord. Each creature within 5 feet of the mummy lord must succeed on a DC 16 Constitution saving throw or be blinded until the end of the creature's next turn.
ast.target: 致盲的尘沙在木乃伊领主周围魔法般盘旋。木乃伊领主5英尺内的每个生物必须通过DC 16的体质豁免，否则会致盲直到该生物下回合结束。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The mummy lord magically unleashes negative energy. Creatures within 60 feet of the mummy lord, including ones behind barriers and around corners, can't regain hit points until the end of the mummy lord's next turn.
ast.target: 木乃伊领主以魔法释放负能量。木乃伊领主60英尺内的生物（包括躲在障碍物后或拐角处的）在木乃伊领主下回合结束前无法恢复生命值。

ast.name: desc
