ast.source: The nalfeshnee has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.
ast.target: 纳尔费什尼在对抗法术和其他魔法效果的豁免检定上具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The nalfeshnee uses Horror Nimbus if it can.  It then makes three attacks: one with its bite and two with its claws.
ast.target: 纳尔费什尼若能使用恐怖星云则会使用之。随后进行三次攻击：一次啃咬，两次利爪。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 32 (5d10 + 5) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+10，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：32（5d10 + 5）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 15 (3d6 + 5) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+10，触及10英尺，单一目标。命中：15（3d6 + 5）点挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The nalfeshnee magically teleports, along with any equipment it is wearing or carrying, up to 120 feet to an unoccupied space it can see.
ast.target: 纳尔费什尼以魔法传送，连同其所穿戴或携带的装备，至多120英尺，至其可见的一个空位。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The hag has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.
ast.target: 女巫在对抗法术和其他魔法效果的豁免检定上具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 13 (2d8 + 4) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+7，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：13（2d8 + 4）点挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The hag magically enters the Ethereal Plane from the Material Plane, or vice versa. To do so, the hag must have a heartstone in her possession.
ast.target: 女巫以魔法从物质位面进入以太位面，或反之。为此，女巫必须持有一块心石。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The nightmare can grant resistance to fire damage to anyone riding it.
ast.target: 梦魇可以使骑乘它的任何生物获得火焰伤害抗性。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The nightmare sheds bright light in a 10-foot radius and dim light for an additional 10 feet.
ast.target: 梦魇在10英尺半径内散发明亮光照，并在额外10英尺范围内散发微光。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 13 (2d8 + 4) bludgeoning damage plus 7 (2d6) fire damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+6，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：13（2d8 + 4）点钝击伤害，外加7（2d6）点火焰伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The nightmare and up to three willing creatures within 5 feet of it magically enter the Ethereal Plane from the Material Plane, or vice versa.
ast.target: 梦魇及其5英尺内至多三个自愿生物以魔法从物质位面进入乙太位面，或反之。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d8 + 1) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+3，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：5（1d8 + 1）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The noble adds 2 to its AC against one melee attack that would hit it. To do so, the noble must see the attacker and be wielding a melee weapon.
ast.target: 贵族对将要命中的一次近战攻击的AC提高2。为此，贵族必须能看见攻击者并正持有近战武器。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The jelly can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing.
ast.target: 胶质怪无需挤压即可通过最窄仅1英寸宽的空间。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The jelly can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.
ast.target: 胶质怪可以攀爬困难的表面，包括倒挂在天花板上，且无需进行属性检定。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (2d6 + 2) bludgeoning damage plus 3 (1d6) acid damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+4，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：9（2d6 + 2）点钝击伤害，外加3（1d6）点酸蚀伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a jelly that is Medium or larger is subjected to lightning or slashing damage, it splits into two new jellies if it has at least 10 hit points. Each new jelly has hit points equal to half the original jelly's, rounded down. New jellies are one size smaller than the original jelly.
ast.target: 当中型或更大的胶质怪受到闪电或挥砍伤害时，若其至少有10点生命值，则会分裂成两个新的胶质怪。每个新胶质怪的生命值等于原胶质怪的一半，向下取整。新胶质怪的体型比原胶质怪小一级。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While out of water, the octopus can hold its breath for 30 minutes.
ast.target: 离开水面时，章鱼可以屏息30分钟。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 1 bludgeoning damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 10). Until this grapple ends, the octopus can't use its tentacles on another target.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+4，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：1点钝击伤害，目标被擒抱（逃脱DC 10）。在此次擒抱结束前，章鱼不能对另一个目标使用其触手。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A 5-foot-radius cloud of ink extends all around the octopus if it is underwater. The area is heavily obscured for 1 minute, although a significant current can disperse the ink. After releasing the ink, the octopus can use the Dash action as a bonus action.
ast.target: 若章鱼在水下，它会在周围释放一个5英尺半径的墨汁云。该区域在1分钟内重度遮蔽，尽管显著的水流可驱散墨汁。释放墨汁后，章鱼可用一个附赠动作进行疾走。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 13 (2d8 + 4) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+6，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：13（2d8 + 4）点钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 30/120 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战或远程武器攻击：命中+6，触及5英尺或射程30/120英尺，单一目标。命中：11（2d6 + 4）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If damage reduces the zombie to 0 hit points, it must make a Constitution saving throw with a DC of 5+the damage taken, unless the damage is radiant or from a critical hit. On a success, the zombie drops to 1 hit point instead.
ast.target: 若伤害使僵尸降至0点生命值，除非该伤害为光耀伤害或来自重击，否则它必须进行一次体质豁免，DC为5+所受伤害。若豁免成功，僵尸改为降至1点生命值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
The oni's innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 13). The oni can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

At will: darkness, invisibility
1/day each: charm person, cone of cold, gaseous form, sleep
ast.target:
鬼怪的天生施法能力为魅力（法术豁免 DC 13）。鬼怪可以天生施放以下法术，无需材料成分：

随意：黑暗术、隐形术
每日一次：魅惑人类、寒冷锥、气体形态、睡眠术

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The oni's weapon attacks are magical.
ast.target: 鬼怪的武器攻击为魔法攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The oni regains 10 hit points at the start of its turn if it has at least 1 hit point.
ast.target: 若鬼怪至少有 1 点生命值，它在其回合开始时恢复 10 点生命值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The oni makes two attacks, either with its claws or its glaive.
ast.target: 鬼怪进行两次攻击，可用其爪击或长柄刀。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中 +7，触及 5 尺，单一目标。命中：8（1d8 + 4）点挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 15 (2d10 + 4) slashing damage, or 9 (1d10 + 4) slashing damage in Small or Medium form.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中 +7，触及 10 尺，单一目标。命中：15（2d10 + 4）点挥砍伤害，或在小型或中型形态下为 9（1d10 + 4）点挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The oni magically polymorphs into a Small or Medium humanoid, into a Large giant, or back into its true form. Other than its size, its statistics are the same in each form. The only equipment that is transformed is its glaive, which shrinks so that it can be wielded in humanoid form. If the oni dies, it reverts to its true form, and its glaive reverts to its normal size.
ast.target: 鬼怪以魔法变形为小型或中型类人生物、巨型巨人，或变回其真形。除体型外，其各项属性在每种形态下相同。唯一会随之变化的装备是它的长柄刀，会缩小以便类人生物形态使用。若鬼怪死亡，则会变回其真形，其长柄刀也恢复正常大小。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: As a bonus action, the orc can move up to its speed toward a hostile creature that it can see.
ast.target: 作为一个附赠动作，兽人可以朝它能看见的敌对生物移动，最多等于其速度。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 30/120 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战或远程武器攻击：命中 +5，触及 5 尺或射程 30/120 尺，单一目标。命中：6（1d6 + 3）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The otyugh can magically transmit simple messages and images to any creature within 120 ft. of it that can understand a language. This form of telepathy doesn't allow the receiving creature to telepathically respond.
ast.target: 奥提厄可以将简单的信息和图像以魔法传递给 120 尺内任何能理解一种语言的生物。这种心灵感应不允许接收者以心灵感应回应。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The otyugh makes three attacks: one with its bite and two with its tentacles.
ast.target: 奥提厄进行三次攻击：一次用其啃咬，另两次用其触手。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 12 (2d8 + 3) piercing damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw against disease or become poisoned until the disease is cured. Every 24 hours that elapse, the target must repeat the saving throw, reducing its hit point maximum by 5 (1d10) on a failure. The disease is cured on a success. The target dies if the disease reduces its hit point maximum to 0. This reduction to the target's hit point maximum lasts until the disease is cured.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中 +6，触及 5 尺，单一目标。命中：12（2d8 + 3）点穿刺伤害。若目标为生物，必须通过 DC 15 的体质豁免以抵御疾病，否则中毒，直到疾病被治愈。每经过 24 小时，目标必须重复该豁免，若失败，其生命值上限降低 5（1d10）点。成功则治愈疾病。若疾病使其生命值上限降至 0，目标死亡。该对生命值上限的降低持续到疾病被治愈为止。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) bludgeoning damage plus 4 (1d8) piercing damage. If the target is Medium or smaller, it is grappled (escape DC 13) and restrained until the grapple ends. The otyugh has two tentacles, each of which can grapple one target.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中 +6，触及 10 尺，单一目标。命中：7（1d8 + 3）点钝击伤害，外加 4（1d8）点穿刺伤害。若目标为中型或更小，它将被擒抱（逃脱 DC 13）并被束缚，直到擒抱结束。奥提厄有两条触手，每条可擒抱一个目标。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The otyugh slams creatures grappled by it into each other or a solid surface. Each creature must succeed on a DC 14 Constitution saving throw or take 10 (2d6 + 3) bludgeoning damage and be stunned until the end of the otyugh's next turn. On a successful save, the target takes half the bludgeoning damage and isn't stunned.
ast.target: 奥提厄将其擒抱的生物猛击在一起或撞向坚固表面。每个生物必须通过 DC 14 的体质豁免，否则受到 10（2d6 + 3）点钝击伤害并昏迷直到奥提厄下个回合结束。豁免成功则目标仅受一半钝击伤害且不昏迷。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 1 slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中 +3，触及 5 尺，单一目标。命中：1 点挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The owlbear has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight or smell.
ast.target: 鸮熊在依赖视觉或嗅觉的感知（察觉）检定上具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The owlbear makes two attacks: one with its beak and one with its claws.
ast.target: 鸮熊进行两次攻击：一次用喙，一次用爪子。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 10 (1d10 + 5) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+7 命中，触及 5 尺，单一生物。命中：10（1d10 + 5）穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The panther has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on smell.
ast.target: 黑豹在依赖嗅觉的感知（察觉）检定上具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the panther moves at least 20 ft. straight toward a creature and then hits it with a claw attack on the same turn, that target must succeed on a DC 12 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone. If the target is prone, the panther can make one bite attack against it as a bonus action.
ast.target: 若黑豹直线朝向一名生物移动至少 20 尺并在同一回合以爪击命中该生物，则目标必须进行一次 DC 12 的力量豁免，否则倒地。若目标倒地，黑豹可用一个附赠动作对其进行一次噬咬攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: As a bonus action, the spider can magically shift from the Material Plane to the Ethereal Plane, or vice versa.
ast.target: 蜘蛛可以用一个附赠动作以魔法从物质位面转移到以太位面，或反之亦然。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 7 (1d10 + 2) piercing damage, and the target must make a DC 11 Constitution saving throw, taking 18 (4d8) poison damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. If the poison damage reduces the target to 0 hit points, the target is stable but poisoned for 1 hour, even after regaining hit points, and is paralyzed while poisoned in this way.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+4 命中，触及 5 尺，单一生物。命中：7（1d10 + 2）穿刺伤害，且目标必须进行一次 DC 11 的体质豁免，失败则受到 18（4d8）点毒素伤害，成功则伤害减半。若该毒素伤害将目标降至 0 生命值，目标稳定但中毒 1 小时，即使恢复生命值后仍然如此，并在以此方式中毒期间陷入麻痹。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Any creature hostile to the pit fiend that starts its turn within 20 feet of the pit fiend must make a DC 21 Wisdom saving throw, unless the pit fiend is incapacitated. On a failed save, the creature is frightened until the start of its next turn. If a creature's saving throw is successful, the creature is immune to the pit fiend's Fear Aura for the next 24 hours.
ast.target: 除非深坑魔被失能，否则任何对其敌对且在其 20 尺内开始回合的生物必须进行一次 DC 21 的感知豁免。豁免失败时，该生物惊慌直到其下一个回合开始。若生物的豁免成功，则在接下来的 24 小时内免疫深坑魔的恐惧灵光。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The pit fiend has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.
ast.target: 深坑魔对抗法术和其他魔法效果的豁免具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The pit fiend's weapon attacks are magical.
ast.target: 深坑魔的武器攻击视为魔法。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
The pit fiend's spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 21). The pit fiend can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:
At will: detect magic, fireball
3/day each: hold monster, wall of fire
ast.target:
深坑魔的施法属性为魅力（法术豁免 DC 21）。深坑魔可以天生施放以下法术，无需材料成分：
随意：侦测魔法，火球术
每日 3 次各：禁锢怪物，火墙术

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The pit fiend makes four attacks: one with its bite, one with its claw, one with its mace, and one with its tail.
ast.target: 深坑魔进行四次攻击：一次用噬咬、一次用爪击、一次用钉头锤、一次用尾击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +14 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 22 (4d6 + 8) piercing damage. The target must succeed on a DC 21 Constitution saving throw or become poisoned. While poisoned in this way, the target can't regain hit points, and it takes 21 (6d6) poison damage at the start of each of its turns. The poisoned target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+14 命中，触及 5 尺，单一目标。命中：22（4d6 + 8）穿刺伤害。目标必须进行一次 DC 21 的体质豁免，否则中毒。以此方式中毒时，目标无法恢复生命值，并在其每个回合开始时受到 21（6d6）点毒素伤害。中毒目标可在其每个回合结束时重复豁免，成功则终止其自身的效果。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +14 to hit, reach 10 ft. , one target. Hit: 17 (2d8 + 8) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+14 命中，触及 10 尺，单一目标。命中：17（2d8 + 8）挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +14 to hit, reach 10ft., one target. Hit: 15 (2d6 + 8) bludgeoning damage plus 21 (6d6) fire damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+14 命中，触及 10 尺，单一目标。命中：15（2d6 + 8）钝击伤害，外加 21（6d6）火焰伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +14 to hit, reach 10ft., one target. Hit: 24 (3d1O + 8) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+14，触及10英尺，单一目标。命中：24（3d1O + 8）钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The planetar's weapon attacks are magical. When the planetar hits with any weapon, the weapon deals an extra 5d8 radiant damage (included in the attack).
ast.target: 星界天使的武器攻击为魔法。当星界天使用任何武器命中时，该武器造成额外5d8光耀伤害（已计入攻击）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The planetar knows if it hears a lie.
ast.target: 星界天使能知晓其听到的是否为谎言。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
The planetar's spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 20). The planetar can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:
At will: detect evil and good, invisibility (self only)
3/day each: blade barrier, dispel evil and good, flame strike, raise dead
1/day each: commune, control weather, insect plague
ast.target:
星界天使的施法属性为魅力（法术豁免DC 20）。星界天使可天生施放以下法术，无需材料成分：
随意施放：侦测善恶，隐形（仅自身）
每日3次：刃墙，驱散善恶，烈焰打击，死者复生
每日1次：通灵术，操控天气，虫群瘟疫

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The planetar has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.
ast.target: 星界天使对抗法术及其他魔法效果的豁免检定具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The planetar makes two melee attacks.
ast.target: 星界天使进行两次近战攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +12 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 21 (4d6 + 7) slashing damage plus 22 (5d8) radiant damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+12，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：21（4d6 + 7）挥砍伤害，外加22（5d8）光耀伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The planetar touches another creature. The target magically regains 30 (6d8 + 3) hit points and is freed from any curse, disease, poison, blindness, or deafness.
ast.target: 星界天使触碰另一个生物。目标魔法性恢复30（6d8 + 3）点生命值，并解除任何诅咒、疾病、中毒、失明或失聪。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The plesiosaurus can hold its breath for 1 hour.
ast.target: 蛇颈龙能屏住呼吸1小时。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (3d6 + 4) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+6，触及10英尺，单一目标。命中：14（3d6 + 4）穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 1 piercing damage, and the target must make a DC 10 Constitution saving throw, taking 5 (2d4) poison damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+5，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：1点穿刺伤害，且目标必须进行DC 10体质豁免，豁免失败则受到5（2d4）点毒素伤害，成功则伤害减半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (2d4 + 2) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+4，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：7（2d4 + 2）钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: As a bonus action, the priest can expend a spell slot to cause its melee weapon attacks to magically deal an extra 10 (3d6) radiant damage to a target on a hit. This benefit lasts until the end of the turn. If the priest expends a spell slot of 2nd level or higher, the extra damage increases by 1d6 for each level above 1st.
ast.target: 作为一个奖励动作，牧师可以消耗一个法术位，使其近战武器攻击命中目标时额外造成10（3d6）点光耀伤害。该效果持续到该回合结束。若牧师消耗的是2环或更高法术位，则额外伤害在1环之上每高一环增加1d6。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +2 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 3 (1d6) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+2，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：3（1d6）钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The pseudodragon has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight, hearing, or smell.
ast.target: 伪龙在依赖视觉、听觉或嗅觉的感知（Perception）检定上具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The pseudodragon has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.
ast.target: 伪龙在对抗法术和其他魔法效果的豁免检定上具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The pseudodragon can serve another creature as a familiar, forming a magic, telepathic bond with that willing companion. While the two are bonded, the companion can sense what the pseudodragon senses as long as they are within 1 mile of each other. While the pseudodragon is within 10 feet of its companion, the companion shares the pseudodragon's Magic Resistance trait. At any time and for any reason, the pseudodragon can end its service as a familiar, ending the telepathic bond.
ast.target: 伪龙可以作为魔宠侍奉另一生物，与愿意的同伴形成魔法的心灵感应联结。两者联结期间，只要彼此相距不超过1英里，同伴就能感知伪龙所感知的事物。当伪龙在其同伴10英尺以内时，同伴共享伪龙的魔法抗性特性。伪龙可在任何时候因任何原因结束其作为魔宠的服务，从而终止心灵感应联结。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) piercing damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 11 Constitution saving throw or become poisoned for 1 hour. If the saving throw fails by 5 or more, the target falls unconscious for the same duration, or until it takes damage or another creature uses an action to shake it awake.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+4命中，触及5英尺，单一生物。命中：4（1d4 + 2）点穿刺伤害，且目标必须通过DC 11的体质豁免，否则中毒1小时。若豁免失败5点或以上，目标在同样的持续时间内陷入昏迷，或直到其受到伤害或另一生物使用一个动作将其摇醒。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The worm can burrow through solid rock at half its burrow speed and leaves a 10-foot-diameter tunnel in its wake.
ast.target: 巨虫可以以其掘穴速度的一半穿过坚硬岩石，并在身后留下一个直径10英尺的隧道。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The worm makes two attacks: one with its bite and one with its stinger.
ast.target: 巨虫进行两次攻击：一次用其噬咬，一次用其毒刺。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 10 ft., one creature. Hit: 19 (3d6 + 9) piercing damage, and the target must make a DC 19 Constitution saving throw, taking 42 (12d6) poison damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+9命中，触及10英尺，单一生物。命中：19（3d6 + 9）点穿刺伤害，且目标必须进行DC 19的体质豁免，豁免失败则受到42（12d6）点毒素伤害，成功则伤害减半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The quasit has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.
ast.target: 小恶魔在对抗法术和其他魔法效果的豁免检定上具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The quasit can serve another creature as a familiar, forming a telepathic bond with its willing master. While the two are bonded, the master can sense what the quasit senses as long as they are within 1 mile of each other. While the quasit is within 10 feet of its master, the master shares the quasit's Magic Resistance trait. At any time and for any reason, the quasit can end its service as a familiar, ending the telepathic bond.
ast.target: 小恶魔可以作为魔宠侍奉另一生物，与其愿意的主人形成心灵感应联结。两者联结期间，只要彼此相距不超过1英里，主人就能感知小恶魔所感知的事物。当小恶魔在其主人10英尺以内时，主人共享小恶魔的魔法抗性特性。小恶魔可在任何时候因任何原因结束其作为魔宠的服务，从而终止心灵感应联结。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft ., one target. Hit: 5 (1d4 + 3) piercing damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 10 Constitution saving throw or take 5 (2d4) poison damage and become poisoned for 1 minute. The target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+4命中，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：5（1d4 + 3）点穿刺伤害，且目标必须通过DC 10的体质豁免，否则受到5（2d4）点毒素伤害并中毒1分钟。目标可在其每个回合结束时重复该豁免，成功则结束其自身所受效果。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: One creature of the quasit's choice within 20 ft. of it must succeed on a DC 10 Wisdom saving throw or be frightened for 1 minute. The target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, with disadvantage if the quasit is within line of sight, ending the effect on itself on a success.
ast.target: 小恶魔选择的、其20英尺内的一名生物必须通过DC 10的感知豁免，否则恐惧1分钟。目标可在其每个回合结束时重复该豁免，若小恶魔在其视线内则具有劣势，成功则结束其自身所受效果。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The quasit magically turns invisible until it attacks or uses Scare, or until its concentration ends (as if concentrating on a spell). Any equipment the quasit wears or carries is invisible with it.
ast.target: 小恶魔以魔法隐形，直到其发动攻击或使用Scare，或直到其专注结束（如同专注于一个法术）。小恶魔所穿戴或携带的任何装备也随之隐形。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The quipper has advantage on melee attack rolls against any creature that doesn't have all its hit points.
ast.target: 食人鱼对任何未处于满生命值的生物进行近战攻击检定时具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The quipper can breathe only underwater.
ast.target: 食人鱼只能在水下呼吸。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 1 piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+5命中，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：1点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The rakshasa can't be affected or detected by spells of 6th level or lower unless it wishes to be. It has advantage on saving throws against all other spells and magical effects.
ast.target: 罗刹除非自愿，否则不会被6环或更低环级的法术影响或侦测。它对所有其他法术和魔法效果的豁免检定具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
The rakshasa's innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 18, +10 to hit with spell attacks). The rakshasa can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

At will: detect thoughts, disguise self, mage hand, minor illusion
3/day each: charm person, detect magic, invisibility, major image, suggestion
1/day each: dominate person, fly, plane shift, true seeing
ast.target:
罗刹娑的天生施法能力为魅力（法术豁免 DC 18，法术攻击命中 +10）。罗刹娑可天生施放下列法术，且不需要材料成分：

随意施放：侦测思想、易容术、法师之手、次级幻影
每日 3 次各：魅惑人类、侦测魔法、隐形术、高等幻影、暗示术
每日 1 次各：支配人类、飞行术、异界之门、真知术

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The rakshasa makes two claw attacks
ast.target: 罗刹娑进行两次爪击

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The raven can mimic simple sounds it has heard, such as a person whispering, a baby crying, or an animal chittering. A creature that hears the sounds can tell they are imitations with a successful DC 10 Wisdom (Insight) check.
ast.target: 乌鸦可以模仿它听过的简单声音，例如人低语、婴儿哭泣或动物啾啾。听到这些声音的生物若通过 DC 10 的感知（洞悉）检定，即可辨别它们是模仿声。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 1 piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中 +4，触及 5 尺，单一目标。命中：1 点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 9 (1d10 + 4) piercing damage plus 3 (1d6) fire damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中 +6，触及 5 尺，单一目标。命中：9（1d10 + 4）点穿刺伤害，外加 3（1d6）点火焰伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The dragon exhales fire in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 13 Dexterity saving throw, taking 24 (7d6) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
ast.target: 巨龙在 15 尺锥形范围内喷吐火焰。该范围内的每个生物必须进行 DC 13 的敏捷豁免，失败则受到 24（7d6）点火焰伤害，成功则伤害减半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The shark has advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the shark's allies is within 5 ft. of the creature and the ally isn't incapacitated.
ast.target: 如果至少一名鲨鱼的盟友在目标生物 5 尺内且该盟友未丧失行动能力，则鲨鱼对该生物的攻击检定具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the rhinoceros moves at least 20 ft. straight toward a target and then hits it with a gore attack on the same turn, the target takes an extra 9 (2d8) bludgeoning damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 15 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.
ast.target: 如果犀牛在同一回合内直线移动至少 20 尺朝向目标并以角撞攻击命中，则目标额外受到 9（2d8）点钝击伤害。若目标是生物，则必须通过 DC 15 的力量豁免，否则倒地。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (2d8 + 5) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中 +7，触及 5 尺，单一目标。命中：14（2d8 + 5）点钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The roc has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.
ast.target: 洛克鸟在依赖视觉的感知（察觉）检定上具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The roc makes two attacks: one with its beak and one with its talons.
ast.target: 洛克鸟进行两次攻击：一次用喙，一次用爪。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +13 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 27 (4d8 + 9) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中 +13，触及 10 尺，单一目标。命中：27（4d8 + 9）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +13 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 23 (4d6 + 9) slashing damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 19). Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained, and the roc can't use its talons on another target.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中 +13，触及 5 尺，单一目标。命中：23（4d6 + 9）点挥砍伤害，且目标被擒抱（逃脱 DC 19）。在擒抱结束前，目标被束缚，且洛克鸟不能用爪攻击另一个目标。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The roper can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.
ast.target: 伏魔怪可以攀爬困难表面，包括倒挂在天花板上，且无需进行属性检定。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The roper makes four attacks with its tendrils, uses Reel, and makes one attack with its bite.
ast.target: 伏魔怪用触须进行四次攻击，使用“收线”，并用咬击进行一次攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 22 (4d8 + 4) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+7命中，触及5英尺，一个目标。命中：22（4d8 + 4）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 50 ft., one creature. Hit: The target is grappled (escape DC 15). Until the grapple ends, the target is restrained and has disadvantage on Strength checks and Strength saving throws, and the roper can't use the same tendril on another target.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+7命中，触及50英尺，一个生物。命中：目标被擒抱（逃脱DC 15）。在擒抱结束前，目标被束缚，并在力量检定与力量豁免上具有劣势，而且缠绕怪不能用同一根触手去对付另一个目标。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The roper pulls each creature grappled by it up to 25 ft. straight toward it.
ast.target: 缠绕怪将其擒抱的每个生物拉向自己，最多25英尺，直线移动。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The rug is incapacitated while in the area of an antimagic field. If targeted by dispel magic, the rug must succeed on a Constitution saving throw against the caster's spell save DC or fall unconscious for 1 minute.
ast.target: 该地毯在反魔法力场区域内会陷入失能。若被解除魔法作为目标，地毯必须通过一次对抗施法者法术豁免DC的体质豁免，否则昏迷1分钟。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While it is grappling a creature, the rug takes only half the damage dealt to it, and the creature grappled by the rug takes the other half.
ast.target: 当它擒抱一个生物时，地毯只承受所受伤害的一半，另一个半数由被地毯擒抱的生物承受。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one Medium or smaller creature. Hit: The creature is grappled (escape DC 13). Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained, blinded, and at risk of suffocating, and the rug can't smother another target. In addition, at the start of each of the target's turns, the target takes 10 (2d6 + 3) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+5命中，触及5英尺，一个中型或更小生物。命中：该生物被擒抱（逃脱DC 13）。在此擒抱结束前，目标被束缚、目盲且有窒息风险，且地毯不能再裹住另一个目标。此外，在目标每个回合开始时，目标受到10（2d6 + 3）点钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The rust monster can pinpoint, by scent, the location of ferrous metal within 30 feet of it.
ast.target: 锈蚀怪能通过气味精确定位其30英尺内含铁金属的位置。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Any nonmagical weapon made of metal that hits the rust monster corrodes. After dealing damage, the weapon takes a permanent and cumulative -1 penalty to damage rolls. If its penalty drops to -5, the weapon is destroyed. Non magical ammunition made of metal that hits the rust monster is destroyed after dealing damage.
ast.target: 任何命中锈蚀怪的非魔法金属武器都会被腐蚀。造成伤害后，该武器的伤害掷骰承受永久且可累积的-1惩罚。若其惩罚降至-5，该武器被摧毁。命中锈蚀怪的非魔法金属弹药在造成伤害后被摧毁。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
The rust monster corrodes a nonmagical ferrous metal object it can see within 5 feet of it. If the object isn't being worn or carried, the touch destroys a 1-foot cube of it. If the object is being worn or carried by a creature, the creature can make a DC 11 Dexterity saving throw to avoid the rust monster's touch.
If the object touched is either metal armor or a metal shield being worn or carried, its takes a permanent and cumulative -1 penalty to the AC it offers. Armor reduced to an AC of 10 or a shield that drops to a +0 bonus is destroyed. If the object touched is a held metal weapon, it rusts as described in the Rust Metal trait.
ast.target:
锈蚀怪会腐蚀其5英尺内可见的非魔法含铁金属物体。若该物体未被穿戴或携带，其触碰会摧毁其1英尺立方的部分。若该物体被生物穿戴或携带，该生物可进行一次DC 11敏捷豁免以避免锈蚀怪的触碰。
若被触碰的物体是正在穿戴或携带的金属护甲或金属盾牌，其提供的AC承受永久且可累积的-1惩罚。护甲被降至AC 10或盾牌降至+0加值时被摧毁。若被触碰的物体是手持金属武器，则按“锈蚀金属”特性描述生锈。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The tiger has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on smell.
ast.target: 老虎在依赖嗅觉的感知（智慧）检定上具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the tiger moves at least 20 ft. straight toward a creature and then hits it with a claw attack on the same turn, that target must succeed on a DC 14 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone. If the target is prone, the tiger can make one bite attack against it as a bonus action.
ast.target: 如果老虎在同一回合中直线向一个生物移动至少20英尺并以爪击命中该生物，则该目标必须通过一次DC 14力量豁免，否则被击倒。若目标倒地，老虎可以用一个奖励动作对其进行一次啃咬攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (1d10 + 5) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+6命中，触及5英尺，一个目标。命中：10（1d10 + 5）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 12 (2d6 + 5) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+6命中，触及5英尺，一个目标。命中：12（2d6 + 5）点挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The sahuagin has advantage on melee attack rolls against any creature that doesn't have all its hit points.
ast.target: 沙华鱼人对任何未满生命值的生物进行近战攻击掷骰时具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The sahuagin can breathe air and water, but it needs to be submerged at least once every 4 hours to avoid suffocating.
ast.target: 沙华鱼人可以呼吸空气和水，但它每4小时至少需要浸入水中一次以避免窒息。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The sahuagin can magically command any shark within 120 feet of it, using a limited telepathy.
ast.target: 萨胡金能够以有限的心灵感应，魔法般地指挥其120英尺内的任何鲨鱼。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The sahuagin makes two melee attacks: one with its bite and one with its claws or spear.
ast.target: 萨胡金进行两次近战攻击：一次用啃咬，另一次用爪击或长矛。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 3 (1d4 + 1) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+3命中，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：3（1d4 + 1）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 3 (1d4 + 1) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+3命中，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：3（1d4 + 1）点挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d6 + 1) piercing damage, or 5 (1d8 + 1) piercing damage if used with two hands to make a melee attack.
ast.target: 近战或远程武器攻击：+3命中，触及5英尺或射程20/60英尺，单一目标。命中：4（1d6 + 1）点穿刺伤害；若双手用于近战攻击，则为5（1d8 + 1）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A creature that touches the salamander or hits it with a melee attack while within 5 ft. of it takes 7 (2d6) fire damage.
ast.target: 在其5英尺内触碰火蜥蜴或以近战攻击命中它的生物，会受到7（2d6）点火焰伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Any metal melee weapon the salamander wields deals an extra 3 (1d6) fire damage on a hit (included in the attack).
ast.target: 火蜥蜴所持的任何金属近战武器命中时额外造成3（1d6）点火焰伤害（已计入攻击）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The salamander makes two attacks: one with its spear and one with its tail.
ast.target: 火蜥蜴进行两次攻击：一次用长矛，一次用尾击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20 ft./60 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) piercing damage, or 13 (2d8 + 4) piercing damage if used with two hands to make a melee attack, plus 3 (1d6) fire damage.
ast.target: 近战或远程武器攻击：+7命中，触及5英尺或射程20英尺/60英尺，单一目标。命中：11（2d6 + 4）点穿刺伤害；若双手用于近战攻击，则为13（2d8 + 4）点穿刺伤害，外加3（1d6）点火焰伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) bludgeoning damage plus 7 (2d6) fire damage, and the target is grappled (escape DC 14). Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained, the salamander can automatically hit the target with its tail, and the salamander can't make tail attacks against other targets.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+7命中，触及10英尺，单一目标。命中：11（2d6 + 4）点钝击伤害外加7（2d6）点火焰伤害，且目标被擒抱（逃脱DC 14）。在擒抱结束前，目标被束缚，火蜥蜴可以用尾巴自动命中目标，且火蜥蜴不能对其他目标进行尾击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The satyr has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.
ast.target: 萨堤尔对抗法术和其他魔法效果的豁免检定具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (2d4 + 1) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+3命中，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：6（2d4 + 1）点钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1 d6 + 3) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+5命中，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：6（1 d6 + 3）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Ranged Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, range 80/320 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) piercing damage.
ast.target: 远程武器攻击：+5命中，射程80/320英尺，单一目标。命中：6（1d6 + 3）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Gentle Lullaby. The creature falls asleep and is unconscious for 1 minute. The effect ends if the creature takes damage or if someone takes an action to shake the creature awake.
ast.target: 温柔摇篮曲。该生物入睡并昏迷1分钟。若该生物受到伤害，或有人采取动作将其摇醒，则效果结束。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +2 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 1 piercing damage, and the target must make a DC 9 Constitution saving throw, taking 4 (1d8) poison damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+2，触及5英尺，单个生物。命中：1点穿刺伤害，且目标必须进行DC 9体质豁免，失败则受到4（1d8）点毒素伤害，成功则伤害减半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The scout has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on hearing or sight.
ast.target: 斥候在依赖听觉或视觉的感知（感知）检定上具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The scout makes two melee attacks or two ranged attacks.
ast.target: 斥候进行两次近战攻击或两次远程攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, ranged 150/600 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d8 + 2) piercing damage.
ast.target: 远程武器攻击：命中+4，射程150/600英尺，单个目标。命中：6（1d8 + 2）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
Any humanoid that starts its turn within 30 feet of the hag and can see the hag's true form must make a DC 11 Wisdom saving throw. On a failed save, the creature is frightened for 1 minute. A creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, with disadvantage if the hag is within line of sight, ending the effect on itself on a success. If a creature's saving throw is successful or the effect ends for it, the creature is immune to the hag's Horrific Appearance for the next 24 hours.
Unless the target is surprised or the revelation of the hag's true form is sudden, the target can avert its eyes and avoid making the initial saving throw. Until the start of its next turn, a creature that averts its eyes has disadvantage on attack rolls against the hag.
ast.target:
任何在女巫30英尺内开始其回合且能看到女巫真身的类人生物必须进行DC 11感知豁免。豁免失败则该生物恐慌1分钟。生物可在其每个回合结束时重复豁免，若女巫在视线内则具有劣势；成功则终止自身所受效果。若生物豁免成功或效果结束，则在接下来的24小时内免疫女巫的恐怖外貌。
除非目标措手不及或女巫真身的显现十分突然，否则目标可以移开视线以避免进行初次豁免。直到其下一回合开始，移开视线的生物对女巫的攻击检定具有劣势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The hag targets one frightened creature she can see within 30 ft. of her. If the target can see the hag, it must succeed on a DC 11 Wisdom saving throw against this magic or drop to 0 hit points.
ast.target: 女巫以30英尺内她能看到的一名恐慌生物为目标。若目标能看到女巫，则必须进行DC 11感知豁免来抵抗此魔法，否则其生命值降为0。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
The hag covers herself and anything she is wearing or carrying with a magical illusion that makes her look like an ugly creature of her general size and humanoid shape. The effect ends if the hag takes a bonus action to end it or if she dies.
The changes wrought by this effect fail to hold up to physical inspection. For example, the hag could appear to have no claws, but someone touching her hand might feel the claws. Otherwise, a creature must take an action to visually inspect the illusion and succeed on a DC 16 Intelligence (Investigation) check to discern that the hag is disguised.
ast.target:
女巫用魔法幻象覆盖自身及其所穿所持之物，使其看起来像一个体型大致相同、类人生形的丑陋生物。若女巫用一个附赠动作结束该效果或她死亡，效果终止。
该效果造成的变化经不起物理触检。例如，女巫看起来没有爪子，但触摸她手的人可能感觉到爪子。除此之外，生物必须用一个动作进行目视检查幻象并通过DC 16智力（调查）检定，才能识破女巫的伪装。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The shadow can move through a space as narrow as 1 inch wide without squeezing.
ast.target: 暗影可以通过最窄仅1英寸宽的空间而无需挤压。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While in dim light or darkness, the shadow can take the Hide action as a bonus action. Its stealth bonus is also improved to +6.
ast.target: 在微光或黑暗中，暗影可以用附赠动作执行隐藏动作。其潜行加值也提高至+6。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While in sunlight, the shadow has disadvantage on attack rolls, ability checks, and saving throws.
ast.target: 在阳光下，暗影在攻击检定、属性检定和豁免检定上具有劣势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 9 (2d6 + 2) necrotic damage, and the target's Strength score is reduced by 1d4. The target dies if this reduces its Strength to 0. Otherwise, the reduction lasts until the target finishes a short or long rest.
If a non-evil humanoid dies from this attack, a new shadow rises from the corpse 1d4 hours later.
ast.target:
近战武器攻击：命中+4，触及5英尺，单个生物。命中：9（2d6 + 2）点黯蚀伤害，且目标的力量值降低1d4。若此效果使其力量降至0，则目标死亡。否则，该降低持续到目标完成一次短休或长休。
若一名非邪恶类人生物死于此攻击，则在1d4小时后会从尸体中升起一个新的暗影。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Whenever the shambling mound is subjected to lightning damage, it takes no damage and regains a number of hit points equal to the lightning damage dealt.
ast.target: 每当腐行藤堆受到闪电伤害时，它不受伤害，并恢复等同于所受闪电伤害的生命值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The shambling mound makes two slam attacks. If both attacks hit a Medium or smaller target, the target is grappled (escape DC 14), and the shambling mound uses its Engulf on it.
ast.target: 腐行藤堆进行两次猛击攻击。若两次攻击都命中中型或更小的目标，则目标被擒抱（逃脱DC 14），且腐行藤堆对其使用吞没。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The shambling mound engulfs a Medium or smaller creature grappled by it. The engulfed target is blinded, restrained, and unable to breathe, and it must succeed on a DC 14 Constitution saving throw at the start of each of the mound's turns or take 13 (2d8 + 4) bludgeoning damage. If the mound moves, the engulfed target moves with it. The mound can have only one creature engulfed at a time.
ast.target: 腐行藤堆吞没一名被其擒抱的中型或更小生物。被吞没的目标目盲、被束缚且无法呼吸，并必须在腐行藤堆每个回合开始时进行DC 14体质豁免，否则受到13（2d8 + 4）点钝击伤害。若腐行藤堆移动，被吞没的目标随之移动。腐行藤堆一次只能吞没一个生物。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The shield guardian is magically bound to an amulet. As long as the guardian and its amulet are on the same plane of existence, the amulet's wearer can telepathically call the guardian to travel to it, and the guardian knows the distance and direction to the amulet. If the guardian is within 60 feet of the amulet's wearer, half of any damage the wearer takes (rounded up) is transferred to the guardian.
ast.target: 护盾守卫与一枚护符魔法绑定。只要守卫与其护符处于同一存在位面，护符佩戴者便可通过心灵感应召唤守卫前往其所在位置，且守卫知晓护符的距离与方向。若守卫在护符佩戴者60英尺内，佩戴者所受任何伤害的一半（向上取整）转移给守卫。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The shield guardian regains 10 hit points at the start of its turn if it has at least 1 hit. point.
ast.target: 如果盾卫在其回合开始时至少还有 1 点生命值，则恢复 10 点生命值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A spellcaster who wears the shield guardian's amulet can cause the guardian to store one spell of 4th level or lower. To do so, the wearer must cast the spell on the guardian. The spell has no effect but is stored within the guardian. When commanded to do so by the wearer or when a situation arises that was predefined by the spellcaster, the guardian casts the stored spell with any parameters set by the original caster, requiring no components. When the spell is cast or a new spell is stored, any previously stored spell is lost.
ast.target: 佩戴盾卫护符的施法者可以使守卫存储一个 4 环或更低的法术。为此，佩戴者必须将该法术施放在守卫身上。该法术不会产生效果，但会被存储在守卫体内。当佩戴者下令或出现施法者预先设定的情况时，守卫会以原施法者设定的任何参数施放已存储的法术，且无需任何材料成分。当该法术被施放或存储了新的法术时，之前存储的法术将失效。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The guardian makes two fist attacks.
ast.target: 守卫进行两次拳击攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+7，触及 5 英尺，单一目标。命中：11（2d6 + 4）钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a creature makes an attack against the wearer of the guardian's amulet, the guardian grants a +2 bonus to the wearer's AC if the guardian is within 5 feet of the wearer.
ast.target: 当有生物对佩戴守卫护符的目标进行攻击时，若守卫在佩戴者 5 英尺内，守卫会使佩戴者的 AC 获得 +2 加值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
The dragon uses one of the following breath weapons.
Cold Breath. The dragon exhales an icy blast in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 13 Constitution saving throw, taking 18 (4d8) cold damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
Paralyzing Breath. The dragon exhales paralyzing gas in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in that area must succeed on a DC 13 Constitution saving throw or be paralyzed for 1 minute. A creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.
ast.target:
巨龙使用以下之一的吐息武器。
寒冷吐息。巨龙在 15 英尺锥形范围内吐出冰霜爆风。该区域内的每个生物必须进行 DC 13 体质豁免，豁免失败则受到 18（4d8）寒冷伤害，成功则伤害减半。
麻痹吐息。巨龙在 15 英尺锥形范围内吐出麻痹气体。该区域内的每个生物必须通过 DC 13 体质豁免，否则麻痹 1 分钟。生物可在其每个回合结束时重复该豁免，成功则终止自身效果。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The solar's weapon attacks are magical. When the solar hits with any weapon, the weapon deals an extra 6d8 radiant damage (included in the attack).
ast.target: 炽天使的武器攻击具有魔法性质。当炽天使用任意武器命中时，该武器额外造成 6d8 辉光伤害（已包含在攻击中）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The solar knows if it hears a lie.
ast.target: 炽天使能辨别它所听到的谎言。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
The solar's spell casting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 25). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:
At will: detect evil and good, invisibility (self only)
3/day each: blade barrier, dispel evil and good, resurrection
1/day each: commune, control weather
ast.target:
炽天使的施法属性为魅力（法术豁免 DC 25）。它可以天生施放以下法术，且不需要材料成分：
随意：侦测善恶，隐形（仅自身）
每日 3 次：剑刃屏障，驱散善恶，复生
每日 1 次：通神术，操控天气

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The solar has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.
ast.target: 炽天使在对抗法术和其他魔法效果的豁免检定上具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The solar makes two greatsword attacks.
ast.target: 炽天使进行两次巨剑攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +15 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 22 (4d6 + 8) slashing damage plus 27 (6d8) radiant damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+15，触及 5 英尺，单一目标。命中：22（4d6 + 8）挥砍伤害，外加 27（6d8）辉光伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Ranged Weapon Attack: +13 to hit, range 150/600 ft., one target. Hit: 15 (2d8 + 6) piercing damage plus 27 (6d8) radiant damage. If the target is a creature that has 190 hit points or fewer, it must succeed on a DC 15 Constitution saving throw or die.
ast.target: 远程武器攻击：命中+13，射程 150/600 英尺，单一目标。命中：15（2d8 + 6）穿刺伤害，外加 27（6d8）辉光伤害。若目标是生命值为 190 或更少的生物，则必须通过 DC 15 体质豁免，否则死亡。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The solar releases its greatsword to hover magically in an unoccupied space within 5 ft. of it. If the solar can see the sword, the solar can mentally command it as a bonus action to fly up to 50 ft. and either make one attack against a target or return to the solar's hands. If the hovering sword is targeted by any effect, the solar is considered to be holding it. The hovering sword falls if the solar dies.
ast.target: 炽天使释放其巨剑，使其以魔法方式悬浮在其 5 英尺内的空置空间中。若炽天使能看见这把剑，则可用一个附赠动作以意念命令它飞行至多 50 英尺，并对一个目标进行一次攻击或返回炽天使手中。若悬浮之剑成为任何效果的目标，则视为炽天使正持有该剑。若炽天使死亡，悬浮之剑会坠落。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The solar touches another creature. The target magically regains 40 (8d8 + 4) hit points and is freed from any curse, disease, poison, blindness, or deafness.
ast.target: 炽天使触碰另一生物。目标通过魔法恢复 40（8d8 + 4）点生命值，并摆脱任何诅咒、疾病、中毒、失明或耳聋。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The solar magically teleports, along with any equipment it is wearing or carrying, up to 120 ft. to an unoccupied space it can see.
ast.target: 日耀天使会施展魔法传送，连同其穿戴或携带的所有装备，最多传送至它能看见的120英尺内的一个未被占据的空间。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The specter can move through other creatures and objects as if they were difficult terrain. It takes 5 (1d10) force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.
ast.target: 幽影可以穿过其他生物和物体，视其为困难地形。若其回合结束时位于某个物体内部，则受到5（1d10）力场伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While in sunlight, the specter has disadvantage on attack rolls, as well as on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.
ast.target: 在阳光下，幽影的攻击掷骰具有劣势，并且依赖视觉的感知（感知）检定也具有劣势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Spell Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 10 (3d6) necrotic damage. The target must succeed on a DC 10 Constitution saving throw or its hit point maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the damage taken. This reduction lasts until the creature finishes a long rest. The target dies if this effect reduces its hit point maximum to 0.
ast.target: 近战法术攻击：命中+4，触及5英尺，单一生物。命中：10（3d6）黯蚀伤害。目标必须通过DC 10体质豁免，否则其生命值上限减少等同于所受伤害的数值。该减少持续至该生物完成一次长休。若该效果将其生命值上限降至0，则目标死亡。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 1 piercing damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 9 Constitution saving throw or take 2 (1d4) poison damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+4，触及5英尺，单一生物。命中：1点穿刺伤害，且目标必须通过DC 9体质豁免，否则受到2（1d4）毒素伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 10 ft., one creature. Hit: 7 (1d6 + 4) piercing damage, and the target must make a DC 13 Constitution saving throw, taking 31 (7d8) poison damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+7，触及10英尺，单一生物。命中：7（1d6 + 4）点穿刺伤害，且目标必须进行DC 13体质豁免，失败则受到31（7d8）毒素伤害，成功则伤害减半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +2 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 1 slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+2，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：1点挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Ranged Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, range 40/160 ft., one target. Hit: 1 piercing damage, and the target must succeed on a DC 10 Constitution saving throw or become poisoned for 1 minute. If its saving throw result is 5 or lower, the poisoned target falls unconscious for the same duration, or until it takes damage or another creature takes an action to shake it awake.
ast.target: 远程武器攻击：命中+6，射程40/160英尺，单一目标。命中：1点穿刺伤害，且目标必须通过DC 10体质豁免，否则中毒1分钟。若其豁免结果为5或更低，中毒的目标在相同持续时间内昏迷，或直到其受到伤害，或有其他生物用一个动作将其摇醒。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The sprite magically turns invisible until it attacks or casts a spell, or until its concentration ends (as if concentrating on a spell). Any equipment the sprite wears or carries is invisible with it.
ast.target: 小精灵会施展魔法变为隐形，直到它发动攻击或施放法术，或直到其专注结束（如同专注于一个法术）。小精灵穿戴或携带的任何装备也会随之隐形。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: On each of its turns, the spy can use a bonus action to take the Dash, Disengage, or Hide action.
ast.target: 在其每个回合，间谍可以用一个附赠动作进行疾走、脱离或躲藏动作。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The spy deals an extra 7 (2d6) damage when it hits a target with a weapon attack and has advantage on the attack roll, or when the target is within 5 ft. of an ally of the spy that isn't incapacitated and the spy doesn't have disadvantage on the attack roll.
ast.target: 当间谍以武器攻击命中目标且攻击掷骰具有优势时，或当目标在一名未被瘫痪的间谍盟友5英尺内且间谍的攻击掷骰没有劣势时，间谍额外造成7（2d6）点伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The spy makes two melee attacks.
ast.target: 间谍进行两次近战攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, range 30/120 ft., one target. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) piercing damage.
ast.target: 远程武器攻击：命中+4，射程30/120英尺，单一目标。命中：5（1d6 + 2）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the mephit dies, it explodes in a cloud of steam. Each creature within 5 ft. of the mephit must succeed on a DC 10 Dexterity saving throw or take 4 (1d8) fire damage.
ast.target: 当小劣魔死亡时，它会在一团蒸汽中爆炸。每个在小劣魔5英尺内的生物必须通过DC 10敏捷豁免，否则受到4（1d8）火焰伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The mephit can innately cast blur, requiring no material components. Its innate spellcasting ability is Charisma.
ast.target: 小劣魔可以天生施放朦胧术，不需要材料成分。其天生施法属性为魅力。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +2 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 2 (1d4) slashing damage plus 2 (1d4) fire damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+2 命中，触及 5 英尺，一个生物。命中：2（1d4）点挥砍伤害外加 2（1d4）点火焰伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The mephit exhales a 15-foot cone of scalding steam. Each creature in that area must succeed on a DC 10 Dexterity saving throw, taking 4 (1d8) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
ast.target: 小米夫吐出一个 15 英尺长的灼热蒸汽锥。该区域内的每个生物必须通过 DC 10 敏捷豁免，失败则受到 4（1d8）点火焰伤害，成功则受到一半伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The giant has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks made to hide in rocky terrain.
ast.target: 巨人在岩石地形中进行隐匿时的敏捷（潜行）检定具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. Hit: 19 (3d8 + 6) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+9 命中，触及 15 英尺，一个目标。命中：19（3d8 + 6）点钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Ranged Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, range 60/240 ft., one target. Hit: 28 (4d10 + 6) bludgeoning damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 17 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.
ast.target: 远程武器攻击：+9 命中，射程 60/240 英尺，一个目标。命中：28（4d10 + 6）点钝击伤害。若目标是生物，则必须通过 DC 17 力量豁免，否则被击倒。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If a rock or similar object is hurled at the giant, the giant can, with a successful DC 10 Dexterity saving throw, catch the missile and take no bludgeoning damage from it.
ast.target: 若有岩石或类似物体被投掷向巨人，巨人可通过 DC 10 敏捷豁免将其接住，并不受其钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 19 (3d8 + 6) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+10 命中，触及 5 英尺，一个目标。命中：19（3d8 + 6）点钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The giant can breathe air and water.
ast.target: 巨人可以在空气和水中呼吸。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
The giant's innate spellcasting ability is Charisma (spell save DC 17). It can innately cast the following spells, requiring no material components:

At will: detect magic, feather fall, levitate, light
3/day each: control weather, water breathing
ast.target:
巨人的天生施法能力为魅力（法术豁免 DC 17）。它可天生施展以下法术，无需材料成分：

随意：侦测魔法、羽落术、浮空术、光亮术
每个 3/日：操控天气、水下呼吸

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +14 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 30 (6d6 + 9) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+14 命中，触及 10 英尺，一个目标。命中：30（6d6 + 9）点挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Ranged Weapon Attack: +14 to hit, range 60/240 ft., one target. Hit: 35 (4d12 + 9) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 远程武器攻击：+14 命中，射程 60/240 英尺，一个目标。命中：35（4d12 + 9）点钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The giant hurls a magical lightning bolt at a point it can see within 500 feet of it. Each creature within 10 feet of that point must make a DC 17 Dexterity saving throw, taking 54 (12d8) lightning damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
ast.target: 巨人向其 500 英尺内可见的一点投出一道魔法闪电。该点 10 英尺内的每个生物必须进行 DC 17 敏捷豁免，失败则受到 54（12d8）点闪电伤害，成功则受到一半伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The fiend ignores the range restriction on its telepathy when communicating with a creature it has charmed. The two don't even need to be on the same plane of existence.
ast.target: 邪魔与其魅惑的生物进行心灵感应交流时无视距离限制。二者甚至不需要处于同一位面。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The fiend can use its action to polymorph into a Small or Medium humanoid, or back into its true form. Without wings, the fiend loses its flying speed. Other than its size and speed, its statistics are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed. It reverts to its true form if it dies.
ast.target: 邪魔可以用其动作变形为一个小型或中型类人生物，或变回其真身。没有翅膀时，邪魔失去飞行速度。除体型和速度外，其各形态的属性相同。其穿戴或携带的任何装备不会随之变化。若其死亡，将恢复为真身。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
One humanoid the fiend can see within 30 feet of it must succeed on a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw or be magically charmed for 1 day. The charmed target obeys the fiend's verbal or telepathic commands. If the target suffers any harm or receives a suicidal command, it can repeat the saving throw, ending the effect on a success. If the target successfully saves against the effect, or if the effect on it ends, the target is immune to this fiend's Charm for the next 24 hours.
The fiend can have only one target charmed at a time. If it charms another, the effect on the previous target ends.
ast.target:
邪魔在 30 英尺内可见的一名类人生物必须通过 DC 15 感知豁免，否则将被魔法魅惑 1 天。被魅惑的目标服从邪魔的口头或心灵命令。若目标受到任何伤害或被下达自杀指令，可重复豁免，成功则结束效果。若目标成功抵抗该效果，或该效果在其身上结束，则该目标在接下来的 24 小时内免疫此邪魔的魅惑。
邪魔一次只能魅惑一个目标。若其魅惑另一个，先前目标上的效果结束。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The fiend kisses a creature charmed by it or a willing creature. The target must make a DC 15 Constitution saving throw against this magic, taking 32 (5d10 + 5) psychic damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. The target's hit point maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the damage taken. This reduction lasts until the target finishes a long rest. The target dies if this effect reduces its hit point maximum to 0.
ast.target: 恶魔亲吻一个被其魅惑的生物或一个自愿的生物。目标必须进行一次DC 15的体质豁免以抵抗该魔法，失败则受到32（5d10 + 5）点心灵伤害，成功则伤害减半。目标的生命值上限减少，数值等于所受伤害。该减少持续到目标完成一次长休为止。若该效果将目标的生命值上限降至0，则目标死亡。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The fiend magically enters the Ethereal Plane from the Material Plane, or vice versa.
ast.target: 恶魔以魔法从物质位面进入以太位面，或反之。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The swarm can't use its blindsight while deafened.
ast.target: 蜂群在耳聋时无法使用其盲视。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The swarm has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on hearing.
ast.target: 蜂群在依赖听觉的感知（察觉）检定上具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 0 ft., one creature in the swarm's space. Hit: 5 (2d4) piercing damage, or 2 (1d4) piercing damage if the swarm has half of its hit points or fewer.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+4命中，触及0英尺，目标为蜂群空间内的一个生物。命中：5（2d4）点穿刺伤害；若蜂群生命值为其最大值的一半或更少，则为2（1d4）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 0 ft., one target in the swarm's space. Hit: 10 (4d4) piercing damage, or 5 (2d4) piercing damage if the swarm has half of its hit points or fewer.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+3命中，触及0英尺，目标为蜂群空间内的一个目标。命中：10（4d4）点穿刺伤害；若蜂群生命值为其最大值的一半或更少，则为5（2d4）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
Melee Weapon Attack: +3 to hit, reach 0 ft., one target in the swarm's space. Hit: 10 (4d4) piercing damage, or 5 (2d4) piercing damage if the swarm has half of its hit points or fewer.
A creature reduced to 0 hit points by a swarm of centipedes is stable but poisoned for 1 hour, even after regaining hit points, and paralyzed while poisoned in this way.
ast.target:
近战武器攻击：+3命中，触及0英尺，目标为蜂群空间内的一个目标。命中：10（4d4）点穿刺伤害；若蜂群生命值为其最大值的一半或更少，则为5（2d4）点穿刺伤害。
被蜈蚣群降至0生命值的生物会保持稳定，但会中毒1小时，即使恢复了生命值也仍然如此，并在以这种方式中毒时陷入麻痹。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 0 ft., one creature in the swarm's space. Hit: 7 (2d6) piercing damage, or 3 (1d6) piercing damage if the swarm has half of its hit points or fewer. The target must make a DC 10 Constitution saving throw, taking 14 (4d6) poison damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+6命中，触及0英尺，目标为蜂群空间内的一个生物。命中：7（2d6）点穿刺伤害；若蜂群生命值为其最大值的一半或更少，则为3（1d6）点穿刺伤害。目标必须进行一次DC 10的体质豁免，失败则受到14（4d6）点毒素伤害，成功则伤害减半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The swarm has advantage on melee attack rolls against any creature that doesn't have all its hit points.
ast.target: 蜂群对任何未满生命值的生物进行近战攻击掷骰具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The swarm can breathe only underwater.
ast.target: 蜂群只能在水下呼吸。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 0 ft., one creature in the swarm's space. Hit: 14 (4d6) piercing damage, or 7 (2d6) piercing damage if the swarm has half of its hit points or fewer.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+5命中，触及0英尺，目标为蜂群空间内的一个生物。命中：14（4d6）点穿刺伤害；若蜂群生命值为其最大值的一半或更少，则为7（2d6）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The swarm has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on smell.
ast.target: 蜂群在依赖嗅觉的感知（察觉）检定上具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +2 to hit, reach 0 ft., one target in the swarm's space. Hit: 7 (2d6) piercing damage, or 3 (1d6) piercing damage if the swarm has half of its hit points or fewer.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+2命中，触及0英尺，目标为蜂群空间内的一个目标。命中：7（2d6）点穿刺伤害；若蜂群生命值为其最大值的一半或更少，则为3（1d6）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target in the swarm's space. Hit: 7 (2d6) piercing damage, or 3 (1d6) piercing damage if the swarm has half of its hit points or fewer.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+4命中，触及5英尺，目标为蜂群空间内的一个目标。命中：7（2d6）点穿刺伤害；若蜂群生命值为其最大值的一半或更少，则为3（1d6）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The swarm can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.
ast.target: 蜂群可以攀爬困难表面，包括倒挂在天花板上，而无需进行属性检定。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While in contact with a web, the swarm knows the exact location of any other creature in contact with the same web.
ast.target: 当与蛛网接触时，蜂群能确切知晓任何其他与同一蛛网接触的生物的位置。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the tarrasque fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.
ast.target: 如果塔拉斯克未能通过一次豁免检定，它可以选择改为成功。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The tarrasque has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.
ast.target: 塔拉斯克对抗法术和其他魔法效应的豁免检定具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Any time the tarrasque is targeted by a magic missile spell, a line spell, or a spell that requires a ranged attack roll, roll a d6. On a 1 to 5, the tarrasque is unaffected. On a 6, the tarrasque is unaffected, and the effect is reflected back at the caster as though it originated from the tarrasque, turning the caster into the target.
ast.target: 每当塔拉斯克成为魔法飞弹法术、线状法术或需要远程攻击掷骰的法术的目标时，掷一次 d6。掷出 1 到 5 时，塔拉斯克不受影响。掷出 6 时，塔拉斯克不受影响，并将该效果反射回施法者，如同其源自塔拉斯克，使施法者成为目标。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The tarrasque deals double damage to objects and structures.
ast.target: 塔拉斯克对物体和建筑造成双倍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The tarrasque can use its Frightful Presence. It then makes five attacks: one with its bite, two with its claws, one with its horns, and one with its tai l. It can use its Swallow instead of its bite.
ast.target: 塔拉斯克可以使用它的恐怖威仪。随后进行五次攻击：一次啃咬、两次爪击、一次角击，以及一次尾击。它可以用吞噬代替啃咬。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +19 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 36 (4d12 + 10) piercing damage. If the target is a creature, it is grappled (escape DC 20). Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained, and the tarrasque can't bite another target.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+19，触及10英尺，单一目标。命中：36（4d12 + 10）点穿刺伤害。如果目标是生物，它会被擒抱（逃脱 DC 20）。在此擒抱结束之前，目标处于被束缚状态，且塔拉斯克无法啃咬其他目标。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +19 to hit, reach 15 ft., one target. Hit: 28 (4d8 + 10) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+19，触及15英尺，单一目标。命中：28（4d8 + 10）点挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +19 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 32 (4d10 + 10) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+19，触及10英尺，单一目标。命中：32（4d10 + 10）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +19 to hit, reach 20 ft., one target. Hit: 24 (4d6 + 10) bludgeoning damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 20 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+19，触及20英尺，单一目标。命中：24（4d6 + 10）点钝击伤害。如果目标是生物，它必须通过 DC 20 的力量豁免检定，否则会被击倒。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Each creature of the tarrasque's choice within 120 feet of it and aware of it must succeed on a DC 17 Wisdom saving throw or become frightened for 1 minute. A creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, with disadvantage if the tarrasque is within line of sight, ending the effect on itself on a success. If a creature's saving throw is successful or the effect ends for it, the creature is immune to the tarrasque's Frightful Presence for the next 24 hours.
ast.target: 塔拉斯克选择的、在其120英尺内且察觉到它的每个生物都必须通过 DC 17 的感知豁免检定，否则会陷入恐惧 1 分钟。生物可在其每个回合结束时重复该豁免；若塔拉斯克在其视线范围内则该豁免具有劣势，成功则结束其身上的效果。若生物的豁免成功或效果对其结束，则在接下来的 24 小时内免疫塔拉斯克的恐怖威仪。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The tarrasque makes one claw attack or tail attack.
ast.target: 塔拉斯克进行一次爪击或尾击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The tarrasque moves up to half its speed.
ast.target: 塔拉斯克移动至多其速度的一半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The tarrasque makes one bite attack or uses its Swallow.
ast.target: 塔拉斯克进行一次啃咬攻击或使用吞噬。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The thug has advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the thug's allies is within 5 ft. of the creature and the ally isn't incapacitated.
ast.target: 如果暴徒的至少一名盟友位于目标生物5英尺内且该盟友未丧失行动能力，暴徒对该生物的攻击掷骰具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The thug makes two melee attacks.
ast.target: 暴徒进行两次近战攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中 +4，触及 5 英尺，单一生物。命中：5（1d6 + 2）钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the tiger moves at least 20 ft. straight toward a creature and then hits it with a claw attack on the same turn, that target must succeed on a DC 13 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone. If the target is prone, the tiger can make one bite attack against it as a bonus action.
ast.target: 若老虎沿直线向某生物移动至少 20 英尺并在同一回合以爪击命中该生物，该目标必须通过 DC 13 力量豁免，否则倒地。若目标倒地，老虎可用一个附赠动作对其进行一次啃咬攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中 +5，触及 5 英尺，单一目标。命中：7（1d8 + 3）挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The treant deals double damage to objects and structures.
ast.target: 树人对物体和建筑造成双倍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The treant makes two slam attacks.
ast.target: 树人进行两次重击攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 16 (3d6 + 6) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中 +10，触及 5 英尺，单一目标。命中：16（3d6 + 6）钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Ranged Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, range 60/180 ft., one target. Hit: 28 (4d10 + 6) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 远程武器攻击：命中 +10，射程 60/180 英尺，单一目标。命中：28（4d10 + 6）钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The warrior has advantage on an attack roll against a creature if at least one of the warrior's allies is within 5 ft. of the creature and the ally isn't incapacitated.
ast.target: 若战士的至少一名盟友在该生物 5 英尺内且该盟友未陷入失能状态，战士对该生物的攻击检定具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the triceratops moves at least 20 ft. straight toward a creature and then hits it with a gore attack on the same turn, that target must succeed on a DC 13 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone. If the target is prone, the triceratops can make one stomp attack against it as a bonus action.
ast.target: 若三角龙沿直线向某生物移动至少 20 英尺并在同一回合以顶撞攻击命中该生物，该目标必须通过 DC 13 力量豁免，否则倒地。若目标倒地，三角龙可用一个附赠动作对其进行一次践踏攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 24 (4d8 + 6) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中 +9，触及 5 英尺，单一目标。命中：24（4d8 + 6）穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one prone creature. Hit: 22 (3d10 + 6) bludgeoning damage
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中 +9，触及 5 英尺，单一倒地生物。命中：22（3d10 + 6）钝击伤害

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The troll has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on smell.
ast.target: 巨魔在依赖嗅觉的感知（感知）检定上具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The troll regains 10 hit points at the start of its turn. If the troll takes acid or fire damage, this trait doesn't function at the start of the troll's next turn. The troll dies only if it starts its turn with 0 hit points and doesn't regenerate.
ast.target: 巨魔在其回合开始时恢复 10 点生命值。若巨魔受到酸或火焰伤害，该特性在巨魔下一回合开始时不生效。巨魔只有在其回合开始时生命值为 0 且未能再生时才会死亡。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The troll makes three attacks: one with its bite and two with its claws.
ast.target: 巨魔进行三次攻击：一次用啃咬，两次用爪击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d6 + 4) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+7，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：7（1d6 + 4）穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The tyrannosaurus makes two attacks: one with its bite and one with its tail. It can't make both attacks against the same target.
ast.target: 暴龙进行两次攻击：一次用咬击，一次用尾击。它不能对同一目标进行两次攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 33 (4d12 + 7) piercing damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it is grappled (escape DC 17). Until this grapple ends, the target is restrained, and the tyrannosaurus can't bite another target.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+10，触及10尺，单一目标。命中：33（4d12 + 7）穿刺伤害。若目标为中型或更小的生物，则其被擒抱（逃脱DC 17）。直到擒抱结束前，目标处于束缚状态，且暴龙不能咬击另一个目标。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 20 (3d8 + 7) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+10，触及10尺，单一目标。命中：20（3d8 + 7）钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the unicorn moves at least 20 ft. straight toward a target and then hits it with a horn attack on the same turn, the target takes an extra 9 (2d8) piercing damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 15 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.
ast.target: 若独角兽沿直线向目标移动至少20尺并在同一回合以角击命中该目标，则目标额外受到9（2d8）穿刺伤害。若目标为生物，则其必须通过DC 15力量豁免，否则被击倒倒地。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The unicorn has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.
ast.target: 独角兽对抗法术及其他魔法效果的豁免检定具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The unicorn's weapon attacks are magical.
ast.target: 独角兽的武器攻击为魔法攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The unicorn makes two attacks: one with its hooves and one with its horn.
ast.target: 独角兽进行两次攻击：一次用蹄击，一次用角击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft ., one target. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+7，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：11（2d6 + 4）钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft ., one target. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+7，触及5尺，单一目标。命中：8（1d8 + 4）穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The unicorn magically teleports itself and up to three willing creatures it can see within 5 ft. of it, along with any equipment they are wearing or carrying, to a location the unicorn is familiar with, up to 1 mile away.
ast.target: 独角兽将自身以及至多三个它能看见且在其5尺内的自愿生物连同其穿戴或携带的装备，魔法传送到一个它熟悉的位置，最远可达1英里。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The unicorn makes one attack with its hooves.
ast.target: 独角兽用其蹄子进行一次攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The unicorn creates a shimmering, magical field around itself or another creature it can see within 60 ft. of it. The target gains a +2 bonus to AC until the end of the unicorn's next turn.
ast.target: 独角兽在自身或其能看见的60尺内的另一生物周围创造一片闪烁的魔法力场。目标的AC获得+2加值，持续到独角兽下回合结束。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The unicorn magically regains 11 (2d8 + 2) hit points.
ast.target: 独角兽魔法性地恢复11（2d8 + 2）点生命值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
If the vampire isn't in sun light or running water, it can use its action to polymorph into a Tiny bat or a Medium cloud of mist, or back into its true form.
While in bat form, the vampire can't speak, its walking speed is 5 feet, and it has a flying speed of 30 feet. Its statistics, other than its size and speed, are unchanged. Anything it is wearing transforms with it, but nothing it is carrying does. It reverts to its true form if it dies.
While in mist form, the vampire can't take any actions, speak, or manipulate objects. It is weightless, has a flying speed of 20 feet, can hover, and can enter a hostile creature's space and stop there. In addition, if air can pass through a space, the mist can do so without squeezing, and it can't pass through water. It has advantage on Strength, Dexterity, and Constitution saving throws, and it is immune to all nonmagical damage, except the damage it takes from sunlight.
ast.target:
若吸血鬼不在阳光或流动的水中，它可以使用动作变形为超小型蝙蝠或中型的薄雾云团，或变回其真实形态。
处于蝙蝠形态时，吸血鬼不能说话，其步行速度为5尺，飞行速度为30尺。除体型与速度外，其数据不变。它穿戴的物品会随之变形，但其携带的物品不会。若其死亡，则会恢复为真实形态。
处于雾形态时，吸血鬼不能采取任何动作、说话或操纵物体。它无重量，飞行速度为20尺，可悬停，并可进入敌对生物的空间并停留在那里。此外，只要空气能通过某空间，薄雾就能不需挤压地通过，且无法穿过水。它在力量、敏捷与体质豁免检定上具有优势，并免疫所有非魔法伤害，但其受阳光造成的伤害除外。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the vampire fails a saving throw, it can choose to succeed instead.
ast.target: 如果吸血鬼在豁免检定中失败，它可以选择视为成功。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
When it drops to 0 hit points outside its resting place, the vampire transforms into a cloud of mist (as in the Shapechanger trait) instead of falling unconscious, provided that it isn't in sunlight or running water. If it can't transform, it is destroyed.
While it has 0 hit points in mist form, it can't revert to its vampire form, and it must reach its resting place within 2 hours or be destroyed. Once in its resting place, it reverts to its vampire form. It is then paralyzed until it regains at least 1 hit point. After spending 1 hour in its resting place with 0 hit points, it regains 1 hit point.
ast.target:
当它在休息地之外的生命值降至0时，只要不处于阳光或流水中，吸血鬼不会昏迷，而会转化为一团雾（如同“变形者”特性）。若无法转化，它会被摧毁。
当它以雾形态且生命值为0时，无法恢复为吸血鬼形态，并且必须在2小时内回到休息地，否则会被摧毁。一旦回到休息地，它会恢复为吸血鬼形态。随后它会陷入麻痹，直到至少恢复1点生命值。在休息地以0生命值度过1小时后，它恢复1点生命值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The vampire regains 20 hit points at the start of its turn if it has at least 1 hit point and isn't in sunlight or running water. If the vampire takes radiant damage or damage from holy water, this trait doesn't function at the start of the vampire's next turn.
ast.target: 若吸血鬼至少有1点生命值且不处于阳光或流水中，它在其回合开始时恢复20点生命值。若吸血鬼受到光耀伤害或圣水伤害，该特性在吸血鬼下个回合开始时不生效。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The vampire can climb difficult surfaces, including upside down on ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.
ast.target: 吸血鬼可以攀爬困难表面，包括倒挂在天花板上，而无需进行属性检定。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The vampire makes two attacks, only one of which can be a bite attack.
ast.target: 吸血鬼进行两次攻击，其中只有一次可以是咬击攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 8 (1d8 + 4) bludgeoning damage. Instead of dealing damage, the vampire can grapple the target (escape DC 18).
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+9，触及5英尺，单一生物。命中：8（1d8 + 4）钝击伤害。吸血鬼可以选择不造成伤害，而是擒抱目标（逃脱DC 18）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one willing creature, or a creature that is grappled by the vampire, incapacitated, or restrained. Hit: 7 (1d6 + 4) piercing damage plus 10 (3d6) necrotic damage. The target's hit point maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the necrotic damage taken, and the vampire regains hit points equal to that amount. The reduction lasts until the target finishes a long rest. The target dies if this effect reduces its hit point maximum to 0. A humanoid slain in this way and then buried in the ground rises the following night as a vampire spawn under the vampire's control.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+9，触及5英尺，单一自愿生物，或被吸血鬼擒抱、无助或被束缚的生物。命中：7（1d6 + 4）穿刺伤害，外加10（3d6）黯蚀伤害。目标的生命值上限减少等同于所受黯蚀伤害的数值，且吸血鬼恢复等同于该数值的生命值。该减少持续到目标完成一次长休为止。若此效果使目标的生命值上限降至0，目标死亡。以这种方式被杀死并埋入地下的类人生物，会在次夜作为受吸血鬼控制的吸血鬼衍体复活。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
The vampire targets one humanoid it can see within 30 ft. of it. If the target can see the vampire, the target must succeed on a DC 17 Wisdom saving throw against this magic or be charmed by the vampire. The charmed target regards the vampire as a trusted friend to be heeded and protected. Although the target isn't under the vampire's control, it takes the vampire's requests or actions in the most favorable way it can, and it is a willing target for the vampire's bit attack.
Each time the vampire or the vampire's companions do anything harmful to the target, it can repeat the saving throw, ending the effect on itself on a success. Otherwise, the effect lasts 24 hours or until the vampire is destroyed, is on a different plane of existence than the target, or takes a bonus action to end the effect.
ast.target:
吸血鬼以其30英尺内可见的一名类人生物为目标。若目标能看见吸血鬼，必须通过DC 17的感知豁免，否则被吸血鬼魅惑。被魅惑的目标将吸血鬼视为可信赖的朋友，愿意听从并保护它。尽管目标并未受吸血鬼控制，但它会尽可能以最有利的方式解读吸血鬼的请求或行动，并且愿意成为吸血鬼咬击攻击的目标。
每当吸血鬼或其同伴对目标造成任何伤害时，目标可以重复该豁免，若成功则结束自身所受的效果。否则，该效果持续24小时，或直到吸血鬼被摧毁、与目标位于不同位面，或吸血鬼以一个附赠动作结束该效果。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The vampire moves up to its speed without provoking opportunity attacks.
ast.target: 吸血鬼移动至多其速度，不会引发借机攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The vampire makes one unarmed strike.
ast.target: 吸血鬼进行一次徒手打击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The vampire makes one bite attack.
ast.target: 吸血鬼进行一次咬击攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The vampire regains 10 hit points at the start of its turn if it has at least 1 hit point and isn't in sunlight or running water. If the vampire takes radiant damage or damage from holy water, this trait doesn't function at the start of the vampire's next turn.
ast.target: 若吸血鬼至少有1点生命值且不处于阳光或流水中，它在其回合开始时恢复10点生命值。若吸血鬼受到光耀伤害或圣水伤害，该特性在吸血鬼下个回合开始时不生效。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
The vampire has the following flaws:
Forbiddance. The vampire can't enter a residence without an invitation from one of the occupants.
Harmed by Running Water. The vampire takes 20 acid damage when it ends its turn in running water.
Stake to the Heart. The vampire is destroyed if a piercing weapon made of wood is driven into its heart while it is incapacitated in its resting place.
Sunlight Hypersensitivity. The vampire takes 20 radiant damage when it starts its turn in sunlight. While in sunlight, it has disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks.
ast.target:
吸血鬼具有以下弱点：
禁入。吸血鬼未经住户之一邀请，无法进入住宅。
流水伤害。吸血鬼在流水中结束回合时受到20点强酸伤害。
穿心木桩。当吸血鬼在休息地陷入无助状态时，若有木制穿刺武器刺入其心脏，它会被摧毁。
阳光超敏。吸血鬼在阳光中开始回合时受到20点光耀伤害。处于阳光中时，它在攻击检定和属性检定上具有劣势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one willing creature, or a creature that is grappled by the vampire, incapacitated, or restrained. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) necrotic damage. The target's hit point maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the necrotic damage taken, and the vampire regains hit points equal to that amount. The reduction lasts until the target finishes a long rest. The target dies if this effect reduces its hit point maximum to 0.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+6，触及5英尺，单一自愿生物，或被吸血鬼擒抱、无助或被束缚的生物。命中：6（1d6 + 3）穿刺伤害，外加7（2d6）黯蚀伤害。目标的生命值上限减少等同于所受黯蚀伤害的数值，且吸血鬼恢复等同于该数值的生命值。该减少持续到目标完成一次长休为止。若此效果使目标的生命值上限降至0，目标死亡。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 8 (2d4 + 3) slashing damage. Instead of dealing damage, the vampire can grapple the target (escape DC 13).
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+6，触及5英尺，单一生物。命中：8（2d4 + 3）挥砍伤害。吸血鬼可以选择不造成伤害，而是擒抱目标（逃脱DC 13）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d8 + 3) slashing damage, or 8 (1d10 + 3) slashing damage if used with two hands.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+5，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：7（1d8 + 3）点挥砍伤害，或若双手使用则为8（1d10 + 3）点挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The fungus makes 1d4 Rotting Touch attacks.
ast.target: 该真菌进行1d4次腐朽之触攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +2 to hit, reach 10 ft., one creature. Hit: 4 (1d8) necrotic damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+2，触及10英尺，单一生物。命中：4（1d8）点黯蚀伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The vrock has advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects.
ast.target: 弗洛克对抗法术和其他魔法效果的豁免检定具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The vrock makes two attacks: one with its beak and one with its talons.
ast.target: 弗洛克进行两次攻击：一次用喙，一次用利爪。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 14 (2d10 + 3) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+6，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：14（2d10 + 3）点挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the horse moves at least 20 ft. straight toward a creature and then hits it with a hooves attack on the same turn, that target must succeed on a DC 14 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone. If the target is prone, the horse can make another attack with its hooves against it as a bonus action.
ast.target: 若马匹朝一名生物直线移动至少20英尺，并在同一回合以蹄击命中该生物，则该目标必须通过DC 14力量豁免，否则倒地。若目标倒地，马匹可用其蹄击对其进行一次额外攻击作为附赠动作。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 1 piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+5，触及5英尺，单一生物。命中：1点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The werebear can use its action to polymorph into a Large bear-humanoid hybrid or into a Large bear, or back into its true form, which is humanoid. Its statistics, other than its size and AC, are the same in each form. Any equipment it. is wearing or carrying isn't transformed. It reverts to its true form if it dies.
ast.target: 熊人可用其动作变形为大型熊-类人生物混合体或大型熊，或变回其真形（类人生物）。除体型和AC外，其数据在每种形态下都相同。它.穿戴或携带的任何装备不会变形。若其死亡，将恢复为真形。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The werebear has advantage on WisGlom (Perception) checks that rely on smell.
ast.target: 熊人对依赖嗅觉的WisGlom（察觉）检定具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: In bear form, the werebear makes two claw attacks. In humanoid form, it makes two greataxe attacks. In hybrid form, it can attack like a bear or a humanoid.
ast.target: 在熊形态下，熊人进行两次爪击。在类人形态下，它进行两次巨斧攻击。在混合形态下，它可以像熊或类人一样攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 15 (2d10 + 4) piercing damage. If the target is a humanoid, it must succeed on a DC 14 Constitution saving throw or be cursed with were bear lycanthropy.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+7，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：15（2d10 + 4）点穿刺伤害。若目标为类人生物，必须通过DC 14体质豁免，否则将被诅咒为熊人兽化。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (1d12 + 4) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+7，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：10（1d12 + 4）点挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The wereboar can use its action to polymorph into a boar-humanoid hybrid or into a boar, or back into its true form, which is humanoid. Its statistics, other than its AC, are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed. It reverts to its true form if it dies.
ast.target: 野猪人可用其动作变形为野猪-类人生物混合体或野猪，或变回其真形（类人生物）。除AC外，其数据在每种形态下都相同。它穿戴或携带的任何装备不会变形。若其死亡，将恢复为真形。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the wereboar moves at least 15 feet straight toward a target and then hits it with its tusks on the same turn, the target takes an extra 7 (2d6) slashing damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 13 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.
ast.target: 若野猪人朝目标直线移动至少15英尺，并在同一回合以獠牙命中该目标，则目标额外受到7（2d6）点挥砍伤害。若目标为生物，必须通过DC 13力量豁免，否则倒地。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: If the wereboar takes 14 damage or less that would reduce it to 0 hit points, it is reduced to 1 hit point instead.
ast.target: 如果野猪人受到14点或更少的伤害且该伤害会将其降至0生命值，则改为将其降至1生命值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The wereboar makes two attacks, only one of which can be with its tusks.
ast.target: 野猪人进行两次攻击，其中只有一次可以使用它的獠牙。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) bludgeoning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+5，触及范围5英尺，单一目标。命中：10（2d6 + 3）钝击伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 10 (2d6 + 3) slashing damage. If the target is a humanoid, it must succeed on a DC 12 Constitution saving throw or be cursed with wereboar lycanthropy.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+5，触及范围5英尺，单一目标。命中：10（2d6 + 3）挥砍伤害。如果目标是类人，则必须通过DC 12体质豁免，否则将受到野猪人兽化诅咒。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The wererat can use its action to polymorph into a rat-humanoid hybrid or into a giant rat, or back into its true form, which is humanoid. Its statistics, other than its size, are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed. It reverts to its true form if it dies.
ast.target: 鼠人可以用动作变形为鼠类-类人混合形态或巨鼠，或变回其类人的真实形态。除体型外，其各形态的属性相同。它所穿戴或携带的任何装备都不会随之变化。它死亡时会恢复为真实形态。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The wererat has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on smell.
ast.target: 鼠人在依赖嗅觉的感知（察觉）检定上具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The wererat makes two attacks, only one of which can be a bite.
ast.target: 鼠人进行两次攻击，其中只有一次可以是咬击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 4 (1d4 + 2) piercing damage. If the target is a humanoid, it must succeed on a DC 11 Constitution saving throw or be cursed with wererat lycanthropy.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+4，触及范围5英尺，单一目标。命中：4（1d4 + 2）穿刺伤害。如果目标是类人，则必须通过DC 11体质豁免，否则将受到鼠人兽化诅咒。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The weretiger can use its action to polymorph into a tiger-humanoid hybrid or into a tiger, or back into its true form, which is humanoid. Its statistics, other than its size, are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed. It reverts to its true form if it dies.
ast.target: 虎人可以用动作变形为虎类-类人混合形态或老虎，或变回其类人的真实形态。除体型外，其各形态的属性相同。它所穿戴或携带的任何装备都不会随之变化。它死亡时会恢复为真实形态。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The weretiger has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on hearing or smell.
ast.target: 虎人在依赖听觉或嗅觉的感知（察觉）检定上具有优势。

ast.name: desc
