ast.source: If the weretiger moves at least 15 feet straight toward a creature and then hits it with a claw attack on the same turn, that target must succeed on a DC 14 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone. If the target is prone, the weretiger can make one bite attack against it as a bonus action.
ast.target: 如果虎人在同一回合内直线移动至少15英尺并以一次爪击命中某生物，则该目标必须通过DC 14力量豁免，否则被击倒。如果目标处于倒地状态，虎人可以用额外动作对其进行一次咬击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: In humanoid form, the weretiger makes two scimitar attacks or two longbow attacks. In hybrid form, it can attack like a humanoid or make two claw attacks.
ast.target: 在类人形态下，虎人进行两次弯刀攻击或两次长弓攻击。在混合形态下，它可以像类人一样攻击或进行两次爪击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (1d10 + 3) piercing damage. If the target is a humanoid, it must succeed on a DC 13 Constitution saving throw or be cursed with weretiger lycanthropy.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+5，触及范围5英尺，单一目标。命中：8（1d10 + 3）穿刺伤害。如果目标是类人，则必须通过DC 13体质豁免，否则将受到虎人兽化诅咒。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The werewolf can use its action to polymorph into a wolf-humanoid hybrid or into a wolf, or back into its true form, which is humanoid. Its statistics, other than its AC, are the same in each form. Any equipment it is wearing or carrying isn't transformed. It reverts to its true form if it dies.
ast.target: 狼人可以用动作变形为狼类-类人混合形态或狼，或变回其类人的真实形态。除AC外，其各形态的属性相同。它所穿戴或携带的任何装备都不会随之变化。它死亡时会恢复为真实形态。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The werewolf has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on hearing or smell.
ast.target: 狼人依赖听觉或嗅觉的感知（察觉）检定上具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The werewolf makes two attacks: one with its bite and one with its claws or spear.
ast.target: 狼人进行两次攻击：一次用其咬击，一次用其爪击或长矛。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d8 + 2) piercing damage. If the target is a humanoid, it must succeed on a DC 12 Constitution saving throw or be cursed with werewolf lycanthropy.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+4，触及5英尺，一个目标。命中：6（1d8+2）点穿刺伤害。如果目标是类人生物，必须通过DC 12的体质豁免，否则被诅咒为狼人兽化。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 7 (2d4 + 2) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+4，触及5英尺，一个生物。命中：7（2d4+2）点挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee or Ranged Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft., one creature. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) piercing damage, or 6 (1d8 + 2) piercing damage if used with two hands to make a melee attack.
ast.target: 近战或远程武器攻击：命中+4，触及5英尺或射程20/60英尺，一个生物。命中：5（1d6+2）点穿刺伤害；若双手用于近战攻击，则为6（1d8+2）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (1d10 + 2) piercing damage plus 2 (1d4) cold damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+4，触及5英尺，一个目标。命中：7（1d10+2）点穿刺伤害外加2（1d4）点寒冷伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The dragon exhales an icy blast of hail in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 12 Constitution saving throw, taking 22 (5d8) cold damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
ast.target: 巨龙在15英尺锥形范围内吐出冰雹寒息。该区域内每个生物必须进行DC 12的体质豁免，失败则受到22（5d8）点寒冷伤害，成功则伤害减半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While in sunlight, the wight has disadvantage on attack rolls, as well as on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.
ast.target: 在阳光下，尸妖的攻击掷骰具有劣势，且依赖视觉的感知（察觉）检定也具有劣势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The wight makes two longsword attacks or two longbow attacks. It can use its Life Drain in place of one longsword attack.
ast.target: 尸妖进行两次长剑攻击或两次长弓攻击。它可以用吸取生命替代一次长剑攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 5 (1d6 + 2) necrotic damage. The target must succeed on a DC 13 Constitution saving throw or its hit point maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the damage taken. This reduction lasts until the target finishes a long rest. The target dies if this effect reduces its hit point maximum to 0.
A humanoid slain by this attack rises 24 hours later as a zombie under the wight's control, unless the humanoid is restored to life or its body is destroyed. The wight can have no more than twelve zombies under its control at one time.
ast.target:
近战武器攻击：命中+4，触及5英尺，一个生物。命中：5（1d6+2）点死灵伤害。目标必须通过DC 13的体质豁免，否则其生命值上限减少与所受伤害等量的数值。此降低持续至目标完成一次长休息。若此效果将目标的生命值上限降至0，目标死亡。
被此攻击杀死的类人生物会在24小时后作为僵尸复起，受尸妖控制，除非该类人生物被复活或其尸体被摧毁。尸妖同时最多控制十二个僵尸。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d8 + 2) slashing damage, or 7 (1d10 + 2) slashing damage if used with two hands.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中+4，触及5英尺，一个目标。命中：6（1d8+2）点挥砍伤害；若双手使用，则为7（1d10+2）点挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: As a bonus action, the will-o'-wisp can target one creature it can see within 5 ft. of it that has 0 hit points and is still alive. The target must succeed on a DC 10 Constitution saving throw against this magic or die. If the target dies, the will-o'-wisp regains 10 (3d6) hit points.
ast.target: 作为一个附赠动作，鬼火可以选择其5英尺内可见且生命值为0但仍存活的一个生物为目标。目标必须通过DC 10的体质豁免以对抗此魔法，否则死亡。若目标死亡，鬼火恢复10（3d6）点生命值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The will-o'-wisp can't wear or carry anything.
ast.target: 鬼火无法穿戴或携带任何物品。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The will-o'-wisp can move through other creatures and objects as if they were difficult terrain. It takes 5 (1d10) force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.
ast.target: 鬼火可以穿过其他生物和物体，如同它们是困难地形。若其回合结束时仍在物体内，则受到5（1d10）点力场伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The will-o'-wisp sheds bright light in a 5- to 20-foot radius and dim light for an additional number of ft. equal to the chosen radius. The will-o'-wisp can alter the radius as a bonus action.
ast.target: 鬼火在5到20英尺半径内散发明亮光照，并在等同于所选半径的额外英尺范围内散发微光。鬼火可用附赠动作改变半径。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Spell Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 9 (2d8) lightning damage.
ast.target: 近战法术攻击：命中+4，触及5英尺，一个生物。命中：9（2d8）点闪电伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The will-o'-wisp and its light magically become invisible until it attacks or uses its Consume Life, or until its concentration ends (as if concentrating on a spell).
ast.target: 鬼火及其光芒会以魔法变为隐形，直到它发动攻击或使用其“吞噬生命”，或其专注结束（如同专注于法术一样）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The wolf has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks made to hide in snowy terrain.
ast.target: 狼在雪地中进行隐藏的敏捷（潜行）检定具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) piercing damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 14 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+6命中，触及5尺，一个目标。命中：11（2d6 + 4）穿刺伤害。如果目标是生物，必须成功通过DC 14力量豁免，否则被击倒。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The wolf exhales a blast of freezing wind in a 15-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 12 Dexterity saving throw, taking 18 (4d8) cold damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
ast.target: 狼在15尺锥形范围内吐出一阵冰冷的狂风。该区域内的每个生物必须进行DC 12敏捷豁免，失败则受到18（4d8）寒冷伤害，成功则伤害减半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +4 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 7 (2d4 + 2) piercing damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 11 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+4命中，触及5尺，一个目标。命中：7（2d4 + 2）穿刺伤害。如果目标是生物，必须成功通过DC 11力量豁免，否则被击倒。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The worg has advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on hearing or smell.
ast.target: 座狼在依赖听觉或嗅觉的感知（察觉）检定上具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The wraith can move through other creatures and objects as if they were difficult terrain. It takes 5 (1d10) force damage if it ends its turn inside an object.
ast.target: 幽影可以穿过其他生物和物体，视其为困难地形。如果它在物体内结束其回合，则受到5（1d10）力场伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: While in sunlight, the wraith has disadvantage on attack rolls, as well as on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight.
ast.target: 在阳光下，幽影的攻击检定具有劣势，其依赖视觉的感知（察觉）检定也具有劣势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one creature. Hit: 21 (4d8 + 3) necrotic damage. The target must succeed on a DC 14 Constitution saving throw or its hit point maximum is reduced by an amount equal to the damage taken. This reduction lasts until the target finishes a long rest. The target dies if this effect reduces its hit point maximum to 0.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+6命中，触及5尺，一个生物。命中：21（4d8 + 3）死灵伤害。目标必须成功通过DC 14体质豁免，否则其生命值上限减少等同于所受伤害的数值。该减少持续至目标完成一次长休。若该效果使其生命值上限降至0，则目标死亡。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The wraith targets a humanoid within 10 feet of it that has been dead for no longer than 1 minute and died violently. The target's spirit rises as a specter in the space of its corpse or in the nearest unoccupied space. The specter is under the wraith's control. The wraith can have no more than seven specters under its control at one time.
ast.target: 幽影以10尺内一名死亡不超过1分钟且死于暴力的类人生物为目标。目标的灵魂在其尸体所在空间或最近的空闲空间中升起为幽魂。幽魂受幽影控制。幽影同一时间控制的幽魂不超过七个。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The wyvern makes two attacks: one with its bite and one with its stinger. While flying, it can use its claws in place of one other attack.
ast.target: 飞龙进行两次攻击：一次用咬击，一次用尾刺。飞行时，它可以用爪击代替另一次攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 10 ft., one creature. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+7命中，触及10尺，一个生物。命中：11（2d6 + 4）穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 10 ft., one creature. Hit: 11 (2d6 + 4) piercing damage. The target must make a DC 15 Constitution saving throw, taking 24 (7d6) poison damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+7命中，触及10尺，一个生物。命中：11（2d6 + 4）穿刺伤害。目标必须进行DC 15体质豁免，失败则受到24（7d6）毒素伤害，成功则伤害减半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The xorn can burrow through nonmagical, unworked earth and stone. While doing so, the xorn doesn't disturb the material it moves through.
ast.target: 克索恩能够在非魔法且未经加工的泥土与石头中掘地而行。这样移动时，它不会扰动所穿过的材料。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The xorn has advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks made to hide in rocky terrain.
ast.target: 克索恩在岩石地形中进行隐藏的敏捷（潜行）检定具有优势。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The xorn makes three claw attacks and one bite attack.
ast.target: 泽恩发起三次爪击和一次啃咬攻击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 13 (3d6 + 3) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+6命中，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：13（3d6 + 3）穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +6 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 6 (1d6 + 3) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+6命中，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：6（1d6 + 3）挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The dragon makes three attacks: one with its bite and two with its claws.
ast.target: 巨龙进行三次攻击：一次啃咬和两次爪击。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 15 (2d10 + 4) piercing damage plus 4 (1d8) acid damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+7命中，触及10英尺，单一目标。命中：15（2d10 + 4）穿刺伤害，外加4（1d8）酸蚀伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The dragon exhales acid in a 30-foot line that is 5 feet wide. Each creature in that line must make a DC 14 Dexterity saving throw, taking 49 (11d8) acid damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
ast.target: 巨龙在一条30英尺长、5英尺宽的直线上喷吐酸液。该直线内每个生物必须进行一次DC 14敏捷豁免，失败则受到49（11d8）点酸蚀伤害，成功则伤害减半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 16 (2d10 + 5) piercing damage plus 5 (1d10) lightning damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+9命中，触及10英尺，单一目标。命中：16（2d10 + 5）穿刺伤害，外加5（1d10）闪电伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +9 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 12 (2d6 + 5) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+9命中，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：12（2d6 + 5）挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The dragon exhales lightning in an 60-foot line that is 5 feet wide. Each creature in that line must make a DC 16 Dexterity saving throw, taking 55 (10d10) lightning damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
ast.target: 巨龙在一条60英尺长、5英尺宽的直线上喷吐闪电。该直线内每个生物必须进行一次DC 16敏捷豁免，失败则受到55（10d10）点闪电伤害，成功则伤害减半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 15 (2d10 + 4) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+7命中，触及10英尺，单一目标。命中：15（2d10 + 4）穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
The dragon uses one of the following breath weapons.
Fire Breath. The dragon exhales fire in a 40-foot line that is 5 feet wide. Each creature in that line must make a DC 14 Dexterity saving throw, taking 42 (12d6) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
Sleep Breath. The dragon exhales sleep gas in a 30-foot cone. Each creature in that area must succeed on a DC 14 Constitution saving throw or fall unconscious for 5 minutes. This effect ends for a creature if the creature takes damage or someone uses an action to wake it.
ast.target:
巨龙使用下列一种吐息武器。
火焰吐息。巨龙在一条40英尺长、5英尺宽的直线上喷吐火焰。该直线内每个生物必须进行一次DC 14敏捷豁免，失败则受到42（12d6）点火焰伤害，成功则伤害减半。
睡眠吐息。巨龙在一个30英尺锥形范围内喷吐睡眠气体。该区域内每个生物必须进行一次DC 14体质豁免，失败则昏迷5分钟。若该生物受到伤害或有人用一个动作将其唤醒，则该效果结束。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 16 (2d10 + 5) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+8命中，触及10英尺，单一目标。命中：16（2d10 + 5）穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +8 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 12 (2d6 + 5) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：+8命中，触及5英尺，单一目标。命中：12（2d6 + 5）挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
The dragon uses one of the following breath weapons.
Lightning Breath. The dragon exhales lightning in a 60-foot line that is 5 feet wide. Each creature in that line must make a DC 15 Dexterity saving throw, taking 55 (10d10) lightning damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
Repulsion Breath. The dragon exhales repulsion energy in a 30-foot cone. Each creature in that area must succeed on a DC 15 Strength saving throw. On a failed save, the creature is pushed 40 feet away from the dragon.
ast.target:
巨龙使用下列一种吐息武器。
闪电吐息。巨龙在一条60英尺长、5英尺宽的直线上喷吐闪电。该直线内每个生物必须进行一次DC 15敏捷豁免，失败则受到55（10d10）点闪电伤害，成功则伤害减半。
排斥吐息。巨龙在一个30英尺锥形范围内喷吐排斥能量。该区域内每个生物必须进行一次DC 15力量豁免。豁免失败则被推离巨龙40英尺。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
The dragon uses one of the following breath weapons.
Acid Breath. The dragon exhales acid in an 40-foot line that is 5 feet wide. Each creature in that line must make a DC 14 Dexterity saving throw, taking 40 (9d8) acid damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
Slowing Breath. The dragon exhales gas in a 30-foot cone. Each creature in that area must succeed on a DC 14 Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, the creature can't use reactions, its speed is halved, and it can't make more than one attack on its turn. In addition, the creature can use either an action or a bonus action on its turn, but not both. These effects last for 1 minute. The creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself with a successful save.
ast.target:
巨龙使用下列一种吐息武器。
酸蚀吐息。巨龙在一条40英尺长、5英尺宽的直线上喷吐酸液。该直线内每个生物必须进行一次DC 14敏捷豁免，失败则受到40（9d8）点酸蚀伤害，成功则伤害减半。
减速吐息。巨龙在一个30英尺锥形范围内喷吐气体。该区域内每个生物必须进行一次DC 14体质豁免。豁免失败则该生物不能使用反应，其速度减半，且在其回合内不能进行超过一次攻击。此外，该生物在其回合内只能使用一个动作或一个附赠动作，不能同时使用。以上效果持续1分钟。该生物可在其每个回合结束时重复该豁免，成功则结束其自身的效果。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 17 (2d10 + 6) piercing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中 +10，触及 10 英尺，单一目标。命中：17（2d10 + 6）点穿刺伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 13 (2d6 + 6) slashing damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中 +10，触及 5 英尺，单一目标。命中：13（2d6 + 6）点挥砍伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
The dragon uses one of the following breath weapons.
Fire Breath. The dragon exhales fire in a 30-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 17 Dexterity saving throw, taking 55 (10d10) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
Weakening Breath. The dragon exhales gas in a 30-foot cone. Each creature in that area must succeed on a DC 17 Strength saving throw or have disadvantage on Strength-based attack rolls, Strength checks, and Strength saving throws for 1 minute. A creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.
ast.target:
巨龙使用以下一种吐息武器。
火焰吐息。巨龙在 30 英尺锥形范围内喷吐火焰。该区域内的每个生物必须进行一次 DC 17 的敏捷豁免，豁免失败则受到 55（10d10）点火焰伤害，豁免成功则伤害减半。
虚弱吐息。巨龙在 30 英尺锥形范围内喷吐气体。该区域内的每个生物必须成功通过一次 DC 17 的力量豁免，否则在 1 分钟内进行基于力量的攻击检定、力量检定和力量豁免时具有劣势。生物可以在其每个回合结束时重复豁免，成功则终止其自身所受影响。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +7 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 15 (2d10 + 4) piercing damage plus 7 (2d6) poison damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中 +7，触及 10 英尺，单一目标。命中：15（2d10 + 4）点穿刺伤害，外加 7（2d6）点毒素伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The dragon exhales poisonous gas in a 30-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 14 Constitution saving throw, taking 42 (12d6) poison damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
ast.target: 巨龙在 30 英尺锥形范围内喷吐毒气。该区域内的每个生物必须进行一次 DC 14 的体质豁免，豁免失败则受到 42（12d6）点毒素伤害，豁免成功则伤害减半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Melee Weapon Attack: +10 to hit, reach 10 ft., one target. Hit: 17 (2d10 + 6) piercing damage plus 3 (1d6) fire damage.
ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中 +10，触及 10 英尺，单一目标。命中：17（2d10 + 6）点穿刺伤害，外加 3（1d6）点火焰伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The dragon exhales fire in a 30-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 17 Dexterity saving throw, taking 56 (16d6) fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
ast.target: 巨龙在 30 英尺锥形范围内喷吐火焰。该区域内的每个生物必须进行一次 DC 17 的敏捷豁免，豁免失败则受到 56（16d6）点火焰伤害，豁免成功则伤害减半。

ast.name: desc
ast.source:
The dragon uses one of the following breath weapons.
Cold Breath. The dragon exhales an icy blast in a 30-foot cone. Each creature in that area must make a DC 17 Constitution saving throw, taking 54 (12d8) cold damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
Paralyzing Breath. The dragon exhales paralyzing gas in a 30-foot cone. Each creature in that area must succeed on a DC 17 Constitution saving throw or be paralyzed for 1 minute. A creature can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success.
ast.target:
巨龙使用以下一种吐息武器。
寒冰吐息。巨龙在 30 英尺锥形范围内喷吐冰寒爆流。该区域内的每个生物必须进行一次 DC 17 的体质豁免，豁免失败则受到 54（12d8）点寒冷伤害，豁免成功则伤害减半。
麻痹吐息。巨龙在 30 英尺锥形范围内喷吐麻痹气体。该区域内的每个生物必须成功通过一次 DC 17 的体质豁免，否则被麻痹 1 分钟。生物可以在其每个回合结束时重复豁免，成功则终止其自身所受影响。

ast.target: 近战武器攻击：命中 +7，触及 10 英尺，单一目标。命中：15（2d10 + 4）点穿刺伤害，外加 4（1d8）点寒冷伤害。

ast.target: 巨龙在 30 英尺锥形范围内喷吐冰寒爆流。该区域内的每个生物必须进行一次 DC 15 的体质豁免，豁免失败则受到 45（10d8）点寒冷伤害，豁免成功则伤害减半。
